2) Attention to detail. Because we deal with medical and beauty clients, you must not be a person that is prone to errors in your writing and communication.

3) University education preferred.

4) Excellent use of computers and basic software like MS word, Google sheets etc.



HOW TO APPLY:

Please send your CV/resume and a 30-second to 1-minute video introduction to 
 subject should be as follows: Sales/Customer Service Associate - [Your Full Name]



Once your application is reviewed, you will be contacted via
 about a video or phone interview. After that, you will be notified whether or not you got the position.



Please do not send messages through this application as it is easier for us to organize things via
. If you have any inquiries, please send an
.



Thank you for your application and we hope you are chosen for an interview to join our team!

title: Electrical Estimator

Ensure compliance, track costs, and improve estimating accuracy

title: Paralegal Assistant

Manage arbitration lifecycle: evidence, briefs, scheduling

title: Title Processor
description:
Title Processor – Remote (Philippines)



Fast-paced U.S.-based title company is hiring an experienced Title Processor to join our team remotely from the Philippines.



We are seeking someone with a minimum of 5 years of title processing experience. Qualia experience is preferred.



Responsibilities include:



Processing purchase and cash transactions

Handling investor deals, assignments, and double closings

Managing private and traditional lender purchases

Processing refinances and land contracts

Clearing title requirements and coordinating with all parties

Managing
s, phone calls, and text communication

Working closely with clients, lenders, agents, and internal team



Expectations:



1-hour response time during working hours is mandatory



Schedule:

Must be available to work Monday through Friday, 8:00 AM to 6:00 PM Eastern Time, with occasional Saturday mornings.



Requirements:



Strong English communication (written and verbal)

Ability to thrive in a fast-paced title environment

Highly organized and detail-oriented

Reliable internet and computer setup

Ability to manage multiple files and deadlines efficiently



To Apply:

Please send your resume, summary of title processing experience, Qualia experience (if any), expected pay rate, and availability.

title: Bookkeeper
description:
We are looking for a reliable and detail-oriented Bookkeeper to join our bookkeeping department!



SCHEDULE:

Monday - Friday | 10:00 AM - 3:00 PM

Additional hours may be available for the right candidate as we grow together.



RESPONSIBILITIES:

- Maintain accurate financial records and ledgers

- Process and file expense reports

- Record day-to-day financial transactions

- Reconcile accounts and bank statements

- Assist the bookkeeping department with general accounting tasks



REQUIREMENTS:

- Hands-on experience with QuickBooks (a must)

- Experience filing and tracking business expenses

- Strong attention to detail and organizational skills

- Ability to work independently and meet deadlines

- Prior bookkeeping or accounting experience preferred



If you are dependable, numbers-savvy, and looking for a stable position with growth potential, we'd love to hear from you!



HOW TO APPLY:

To be considered for this position, please send the following:



1. Your Resume - detailing your work history and relevant experience



2. A Short Video Introduction - please record a brief video of yourself (2-3 minutes) that includes:

   - A short introduction (your name and background)

   - A summary of your bookkeeping work experience

   - Your experience with QuickBooks and any other relevant tools



IMPORTANT: Please use "Rite Care Bookkeeping" as the subject line of your application. Applications without the correct subject line, resume, AND video introduction will not be considered.



We look forward to meeting you!

title: Wedding Video Editor
description:
Work Hours



Part-time (24- 30 hours per week), with the possibility of moving to full-time within the next month. 400$pm



Scope of Work

Experience with animation (After Effects or similar) is a bonus

Enter "Story Telling" on the subject of your application



Test Edit



Yes — a test edit will be required:



3–5 minute edit



60–90 second reel



Equipment

Ideally a MacBook Pro (M2 chip or newer) or an equivalent high-performance setup on Windows.

title: Affiliate Recruiter (Remote) – $400 Potential | Daily Pay + Performance Bonuses
description:
We are looking for a driven and fast-moving Affiliate Recruiter to help grow our global affiliate network for an educational platform.



If you are skilled in outreach, active on social media, and motivated by performance-based income, this role is for you.



Role Overview

You will be responsible for:

-Finding influencers, creators, and affiliates

-Sending outreach messages (DMs/emails)

-Following up with leads

-Getting affiliates to sign up

-Ensuring affiliates post after joining

-Tracking all activity in Google Sheets



Compensation Structure

Monthly Rate - $400 USD

Daily Rate -$20 USD 

-Paid when daily requirements are completed



Base Earnings

-$1 USD per approved, quality affiliate signup



“Approved” means:

-Real influencer (not fake)

-Correct niche and audience

-From target regions

-Meets quality standards



Monthly Performance Bonus

To qualify:

-Recruit 40+ new affiliates



Posting Rate Bonus - $30 USD

-Maintain 40%+ posting rate to receive an additional 

-Paid on top of your normal earnings.



Example Earnings

-40 signups = $40

-$30 volume bonus

- $30 Posting Rate Bonus



Total of 100 USD bonus

The more affiliates you recruit, the more you earn.



Bonus Reset

-Resets every month

-Hit the target again and earn it again



Work System

-Must use a time tracker (Time Doctor)

-Daily reporting is required

-Work is output-based and performance-based



Ideal Candidate

-Experienced with Instagram, TikTok, or similar platforms

-Fast executor with strong work ethic

-Detail-oriented and organized

-Able to follow systems and scripts

-Comfortable with repetitive outreach work

-Experience in affiliate marketing or influencer outreach is a plus



How to Apply

Send a message with:



1. Your experience with outreach or affiliate marketing

2. Platforms you have used (Instagram, TikTok, etc.)

3. How many messages you can send per day

4. The word “AFFILIATE PRO” at the top of your application (so that we know that you have read everything)

title: Junior Animator / Video Editor (Remote – Philippines)
description:
About VocabCartoons



VocabCartoons is a fast-growing EdTech startup creating short, engaging animated videos that help children (ages 8–16) learn English vocabulary through stories, quizzes, and games.



We combine storytelling, animation, and AI tools to make learning fun, memorable, and accessible. Our platform is subscription-based, and we are focused on rapid growth through high-quality content and strong execution.



As an early tea
mber, you will work closely with a small, ambitious team and grow alongside the company.









Role Overview



We are looking for a junior animator / video editor with at least 6 months of experience, good English, and strong attention to detail.



This role focuses mainly on post-production and AI-assisted animation, not complex animation from scratch. You will use tools such as MagicLight AI and ChatGPT to efficiently produce short educational videos.



This role is ideal for someone early in their career who wants:



Stable, long-term work



Clear instructions and structure



Hands-on experience using modern AI tools in production



Compensation



USD $400 per month



Full-time, remote



Preferred minimum commitment: 6 months



30-day trial period









Incentive & Growth Plan



In addition to the base salary:



The Contractor’s monthly base salary will increase by USD $10 for every 1,000 new paying members gained by VocabCartoons.



Salary increases are cumulative and reviewed periodically.



This incentive is designed to reward long-term contribution as the company scales.









Required Experience & Skills



Must-have



Minimum 6 months experience in animation and/or video editing



Good written and spoken English





Comfortable using:



AI tools (MagicLight AI, ChatGPT, etc.)



Basic video editing software (After Effects, Premiere Pro, CapCut, or similar)



Ability to follow clear SOPs and instructions



Reliable internet connection and computer







 Nice-to-have (not required)



Experience with children’s or educational content



Basic subtitle timing and formatting experience



Simple motion graphics knowledge







Key Responsibilities





Animation & Video Assembly



Use MagicLight AI to generate animation scenes based on provided scripts



Assemble scenes into complete short videos



Ensure correct scene order and visual consistency



 Subtitles & Text







Use ChatGPT to:



Edit subtitles



Improve grammar and clarity



Ensure age-appropriate language



Sync subtitles accurately with audio





Post-Production



Add background music and simple sound effects



Add titles and on-screen text where required



Balance audio levels



Export videos in correct formats and resolutions







Final Delivery



Deliver clean, ready-to-publish videos



Follow file naming and folder structure



Apply small revisions when requested







What This Role Is NOT



To avoid confusion, this role does not include:



? Complex character design from scratch

? Full story writing or creative direction

? Advanced animation or VFX work



This is an execution-focused role, not a senior creative position.



Performance Expectations



With clear briefs and SOPs, a junior in this role should be able to:



Complete 1–2 short scenes per day, or







Finish one short video per day, depending on complexity



Accuracy and consistency are more important than speed.



Why This Is a Good Opportunity



Stable monthly income



Clear expectations and workflows



Opportunity to grow with a scaling startup



Hands-on experience using AI tools in content production



Predictable incentive-based salary growth

title: Virtual Assistant (Starting Immediately)
description:
I'm a tech sales professional looking for a reliable virtual assistant to support day-to-day administrative tasks. This is a long-term, part-time role with consistent hours.



Starting immediately is preferred!



**What you'll do:**

- Handle admin tasks related to a B2B tech sales role (CRM updates, scheduling, research, data entry, follow-up tracking, etc.)

- Receive and complete daily task assignments via async communication

- Strong attention to detail and written English communication

- Comfortable learning new tools and processes

- Prior admin or executive assistant experience preferred

- Fast internet speed is a must!

- Decent computer to handle multi tabs + sharing screen

- Must have a bachelor degree in  IT/Tech/Software/Engineer and equivalent !



**Hours & Pay:**

- 15 hours/week minimum, guaranteed

- Hours may increase based on performance



**To apply:**

Send a brief intro and your relevant experience. 

Include the word "UNLEASH" in your subject line.

In the application, please include:

- Your computer CPU + RAMS: include the specs of your computer/laptop here

s.

s 7 days a week (approx. 15–45 min/day)

title: AI Automation & Web Development Specialist
description:
We are looking for a skilled and motivated AI Automation & Web Development Specialist to join our team. The ideal candidate will help us design, build, and maintain intelligent automation workflows and modern web applications that streamline our business operations.



Responsibilities:

- Design, develop, and maintain AI-driven automation workflows for business processes

- Integrate AI APIs (OpenAI, Anthropic Claude, Gemini, etc.) into web applications and internal tools

- Build and maintain custom web applications and internal dashboards

- Set up, manage, and deploy applications using Docker containers

- Maintain code repositories and collaborate using GitHub (branching, pull requests, code reviews)

- Design, query, and optimize SQL databases (PostgreSQL, MySQL, etc.)

- Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms (AWS, GCP, Azure, DigitalOcean, etc.)

- Configure and maintain home automation / Home Assistant integrations where applicable

- Build automations using tools like n8n, Make (Integromat), Zapier, and custom Python/Node scripts

- Troubleshoot, debug, and document systems clearly



Required Skills:

- Strong experience with Docker and containerized deployments

- Proficient with Git and GitHub workflows

- Solid SQL knowledge and database design

- Cloud infrastructure experience (AWS / GCP / Azure / DigitalOcean)

- Experience with Home Assistant or similar home automation platforms

- Hands-on experience building AI automations and integrating AI APIs (OpenAI, Anthropic, etc.)

- Strong web development skills (JavaScript/TypeScript, Python, Node.js, React, or similar)

- Experience with workflow automation tools (n8n, Make, Zapier)

- Familiarity with REST APIs, webhooks, and authentication (OAuth, JWT)

- Good written and spoken English communication



Nice to Have:

- Experience with vector databases and RAG pipelines

- LangChain, LlamaIndex, or similar AI frameworks

- CI/CD pipelines (GitHub Actions)

- Linux server administration

- Frontend frameworks (Next.js, Tailwind CSS)



What We Offer:

- Long-term, stable position

- Competitive salary based on experience

- Flexible working hours

- Opportunity to work on cutting-edge AI projects

- Supportive and collaborative team environment



To Apply:

Please include a brief introduction, your relevant experience, links to your GitHub and any portfolio or projects you've built (especially anything involving AI automations, or web apps). Mention the word "automation-pro" at the top of your application so we know you read the full description.



We look forward to hearing from you!

title: Growth Operator (Paid Media + Client Success)
description:
We’re hiring a Growth Operator to own performance across our client accounts. This is not a passive role, you’ll actively monitor results, fix issues fast, coach tea
mbers, and build strong client relationships.



Your mission: ensure clients consistently hit new customer revenue targets with efficiency.



What Success Looks Like:

- Every account hits its AMER % target monthly across paid search & social

- You understand performance down to cost per outbound click and conversion rates and improve them

- Clients feel like they have a real partner, not just an agency

- You identify and fix problems early, no surprises



Requirements:

- 3+ years managing paid ads (Google, Meta preferred)

- Strong understanding of performance metrics (CPA, CTR, CVR, ROAS)

- Proven experience managing multiple client accounts

- Experience leading or mentoring tea
mbers

- Excellent English communication (written + spoken)

- Highly proactive and accountable (you don’t wait to be told what to do)



You must read this in order to be considered for the role:

title: E-commerce & Social Media Virtual Assistant
description:
E-commerce & Social Media Virtual Assistant – Home Decor Brand (Etsy + Content Growth) | Part-Time ? Full-Time**



Company: Nanaliese Home Decor

Industry: Home Decor (Bathroom, Wall Art, Cozy Lifestyle Aesthetic)

Platform: Etsy (Primary), expanding to social media growth

Location: Remote

Position Type: Part-Time (20 hrs/week) ? Full-Time Opportunity



About Us



Nanaliese Home Decor is a growing Etsy shop focused on creating calm, beautiful, and cozy home spaces through thoughtfully designed decor.



Our brand is centered around **warm, minimal, aesthetic living**—and we’re looking for someone who can help bring that vision to life both in our store and on social media.



Your Role



You will manage our Etsy store while also helping us **grow visibility through Instagram and TikTok content.**



This is a **creative + operational role**, perfect for someone who enjoys both organization and aesthetic content creation.



???? Responsibilities

Etsy Store Management



* Upload and optimize product listings (titles, descriptions, tags)

* Improve SEO for existing listings

* Ensure product images are clean, consistent, and high-converting

* Organize listings and keep the store visually appealing



Product Optimization

* Conduct keyword research for Etsy

* Update underperforming listings

* Follow structured templates for consistency



Order & Customer Support

* Monitor orders and ensure smooth fulfillment

* Respond to customer messages professionally

* Handle basic order-related concerns



Content Creation (Instagram & TikTok)

* Create and post short-form content (Reels/TikToks)

* Repurpose product images into aesthetic content

* Follow content direction (cozy, minimal, warm lifestyle)

* Post consistently (3–5x per week)



Design Support

Use Canva to create:

  * Mockups

  * Info cards

  * Simple promotional graphics



? Requirements

Experience



* Etsy experience (REQUIRED)

* Social media content creation (Instagram or TikTok REQUIRED)

* Print-on-Demand experience (preferred)



Skills

* Strong eye for aesthetic design (VERY important)

* Understanding of Etsy SEO

* Good English communication skills

* Organized and detail-oriented



Tools (Preferred)

* Canva

* CapCut or video editing apps

* ChatGPT or AI tools



Ideal Candidate

* Creative and understands visual branding

* Can follow a brand style (neutral, warm, minimal)

* Takes initiative and suggests ideas

* Reliable and consistent

* Interested in long-term growth



 Compensation

* Starting: $4/hour (based on experience)

* Performance-based increases

* Opportunity to transition to full-time



Growth Opportunity

You will have the opportunity to grow into a **Brand & Store Manager role**, helping scale the store and expand into new platforms.



How to Apply

To apply, include:

1. Links to Etsy stores you’ve worked on

2. Links to Instagram or TikTok accounts you’ve managed or created content for

3. Example of a product listing you optimized

4. Your favorite Canva or design project

5. Include the word **“COZY”** in your application



?? Important



We are looking for someone long-term who wants to grow with the brand.



---



We’re excited to find someone who loves beautiful spaces and wants to help build a brand that inspires others.

????

title: Creator Strategist / Video Editor (Ads & Short-Form Content)
description:
About the Role

We’re looking for a Creator Strategist, not just a video editor.

Your main job is to take our raw content (UGC, product footage, clips, etc.) and turn it into high-converting ads. This means you’ll be responsible for the entire creative process — from idea, to hook, to final edit.

If you’re someone who just waits for instructions and edits clips, this is NOT the role.

If you enjoy thinking creatively, testing ideas, and making content that performs — keep reading.



What You’ll Be Doing

Turn raw footage into engaging ad creatives (TikTok,
, IG Reels, etc.)



Come up with hooks, angles, and concepts before editing

Create multiple variations of ads for testing

Add captions, motion graphics, and simple design elements

Follow trends and adapt them into ads

Continuously improve creatives based on performance





What We’re Looking For

Strong video editing skills (CapCut, Premiere, Final Cut, etc.)



Experience creating short-form content or ads

You understand what makes people stop scrolling

You can think creatively — not just edit what’s given

Good English communication

Reliable, detail-oriented, and can meet deadlines





BIG PLUS (but not required)



Experience with eCommerce or DTC brands

Understanding of ad performance (CTR, retention, hooks, etc.)

Experience with UGC-style ads





How to Apply (IMPORTANT)

To make sure you actually read this, include the word “CREATOR” at the top of your application.

Also include:



Links to your best video edits (preferably ads or short-form content)

A short explanation of your creative process (how you come up with ideas)

Your expected monthly salary





Why Join Us



Long-term opportunity

Creative freedom — we value ideas, not just execution

Opportunity to grow into a lead creative role

title: Direct Response Meta Ads Video Editor
description:
We are a fast-growing eCommerce brand producing high-volume Meta ads at scale. We are looking for an exceptionally skilled Paid Social Creative Editor who can create AI-enhanced video and static ad creatives quickly.



This is not a basic editing role. We need someone who understands direct-response marketing, performance data, and fast iteration workflows.



What You’ll Do



• Create high-volume paid social creatives including UGC-style ads, product demos, problem-solution formats, voiceover visuals, and testimonial edits

• Generate AI-powered visuals using tools like HeyGen, Higgsfield, Google Gemini, AI UGC avatar tools, and AI image generators

• Build static ads using a mix of AI visuals and existing brand assets

• Work from creative briefs (concept, angle, script) and independently produce 3–10 video variations and 5–20 static image variations

• Rapidly iterate based on feedback and performance data

• Add captions and incorporate both pre-existing footage and newly generated AI elements

• Help improve CTR, hook rate, thumbstop ratio, and ROAS through creative ideas

• Deliver creatives in Meta-native formats (short-form, mobile-first, fast-paced, bold visuals)



Required Skills & Experience (Do Not Apply If You Don’t Meet These)

Direct-Response Creative Editing



• Strong understanding of high-performing Meta ad formats

• Deep knowledge of hooks, pacing, retention strategies, and CTA placement



AI Video & Image Generation (Advanced)



• Strong prompting ability

• Ability to generate AI actors, UGC avatars, AI B-roll, and AI product visuals

• Experience with workflows including storyboarding, prompt crafting, refining, and upscaling



Technical Editing Skills



• Proficiency in Adobe Premiere Pro, CapCut Desktop, DaVinci Resolve, or Final Cut Pro

• Experience with Photoshop, Canva, or Figma for static ads

• Ability to sync voiceovers and maintain tight pacing



Paid Social Creative Knowledge



• Understanding of creative testing

• Ability to interpret metrics like hook rate, thumbstop percentage, CTR, and watch-time drop-off



Work Speed



• Must produce high-volume output daily

• Must be able to deliver within 24–48 hours



English Proficiency



• Strong written and verbal communication skills



Who This Is For



• Someone who thinks like a performance marketer, not just an editor

• Someone who moves fast and can iterate based on data

• Someone experienced in AI creative workflows



Who This Is NOT For



• Basic video editors

• Designers focused only on aesthetics

• Anyone without direct-response ad experience

• Anyone unfamiliar with AI creative tools

title: Administrative assistant
description:
PermitFlow’s mission is to streamline and simplify construction permitting in the $1.6 trillion United States construction market. Our software reduces time to permit, supporting permitting end-to-end including permit research, application preparation, submission, and monitoring.



We’ve raised a $31m Series A led by Kleiner Perkins with participation from Initialized Capital, Y Combinator, Felicis Ventures, Altos Ventures, and the founders and executives from Zillow, PlanGrid, Thumbtack, Bluebeam, Uber, Procore, and more.



Our team is remote first and consists of architects, structural engineers, permitting experts, and workflow software specialists, all who have personally experienced the pain of permitting.



What You’ll Do:

Experienced Administrative Assistant



Experience managing teams



Strong communicator with excellent organizational skills and a flexible / self-motivated approach to business management



Communicate with 3rd parties through phone and



Support the company’s work to facilitate accelerating development and long-term success



What You Need:

A fast and reliable internet connection is required. Back up connection is recommended.



Laptop or Desktop with no less than 8 GB RAM, minimum of Intel Core i5 processor or equivalent.



A quality video camera is recommended for Zoo
etings



Noise cancelling microphone



Qualifications & Fit:

Proven experience in a similar role



Excellent organizational abilities



Outstanding communication and people skills



Good attention to detail



Computer literate; Familiarity with MS Office and common computer programs





Check out this page (
) to listen to what some of our international members have to say about working at PermitFlow!



You can submit your application at the following link:

title: Executive Assistant & Operations Specialist (Systems & Hospitality Focus)
description:
Honey Benefits is a hospitality-driven insurance benefits consultancy based in North Carolina. We are on a mission to grow to a 7-figure business by 2029 by replacing "boring" insurance models with energetic, transparent, and creative support.



I am the Founder, and I am looking for a dedicated Executive Assistant to act as my "Process Guardian." If you are someone who loves bringing order out of chaos, creating checklists, and ensuring that no detail is missed, you are the RightFit for this role.



What You Will Do:



Systems & Documentation: Organize digital client files, setup and manage our CRM data, and maintain our internal "Honey Benefits Operating Manual."



Inbox & Task Management: Review and respond to
s, create tasks based on our interactions, and help me prioritize my day for maximum impact.



Project Planning: Assist in planning internal projects, tracking milestones, and ensuring we meet our growth targets.



Radical Hospitality Support: Manage the logistics of our "Giftology" program (sending honey boxes and handwritten notes) to ensure our clients feel loved and cared for.



Operational Stability: You will be responsible for "staying with what works," protecting our established processes, and reducing uncertainty in our daily operations.



Are You the RightFit? You will thrive if:

-You naturally create flow charts or checklists for your work.

-You prefer following a proven procedure rather than "winging it."

-You are highly accurate with data and file organization.

-You feel a sense of accomplishment when a project is brought to full closure.



Requirements:

-Exceptional written English (hospitable yet professional tone).

-Experience with Google Workspace (Gmail, Drive, Gemini), CRM tools, and Project Management software.

-Ability to work US Eastern Time (NC) hours.

-High attention to detail—you catch the small things before they become big problems.

-Final candidates will be asked to take the KOLBE A assessment



How to Apply (The "Hospitality" Test):

-Start your cover letter with the word "HOSPITALITY."

-Tell me about the most complex filing or task system you have ever organized.

-Share with me your ideal working environment. I want this to be a win-win and a long term fit. 



Benefits

-Stable, long-term full-time role with a clear company vision.

-Opportunity to work directly with the Founder, Justin Thomas and shape a growing brand.

-A culture of "Radical Hospitality."



Skills Required

-Office & Admin:
 Management, Quality Assurance, Research, Data Entry, Project Management.



English: Speaking, Writing. Perhaps talking with clients down the road. 



Marketing & Sales: CRM, Canva, Social Media Posting (Basic).

title: Digital Marketing Specialist — Healthcare (Remote, Full-Time)
description:
Digital Marketing Specialist — Healthcare (Remote, Full-Time)

Remote · Full-time · US-based company · Reports to Co-Founder



About us

We're a US-based healthcare company supporting 50+ licensed medical providers across multiple states. Our marketing function is still being built — which means the person in this role won't inherit a polished playbook. They'll help write it.

We move fast, expect ownership, and want someone who treats obstacles as problems to solve — not reasons to pause.



About the role

You'll work directly with our Co-Founder on everything digital — from SEO content and paid campaigns to provider directory management and social media. Some of your work will be recurring and systematic. Some will be new, ambiguous, and require you to figure it out.

This is a full-time, long-term opportunity for someone who wants to own a meaningful marketing function, not just execute a checklist.



What you'll work on



SEO & content: Write and optimize blog posts, website copy, and landing pages with strong on-page SEO

Paid advertising: Set up, monitor, and optimize paid campaigns (Google, Meta, or similar)

Social media: Create, schedule, and manage organic content across
, Instagram, and LinkedIn

Provider directories: Manage and keep current 50+ provider listings across Google Business, Healthgrades, ZocDoc, Vitals, and WebMD

GoHighLevel: Campaign builds, automation edits, landing page updates, and contact list management

Graphic content: Create and edit visuals using Canva or Photoshop

Reporting: Track performance and flag what's working and what isn't — with a point of view





What we're looking for



4+ years of digital marketing experience, ideally supporting US clients

Hands-on experience with GoHighLevel (CRM, automations, campaigns)

Strong writer — clear, engaging, SEO-aware

Experience running or supporting paid ad campaigns

Solid grasp of social media content and scheduling

Healthcare marketing experience is a plus, not a requirement

Excellent written English — you'll be producing US-facing content





The skill set above describes the floor. What will set you apart is how you think. We want someone who hits a wall and finds a door — not someone who stops and waits to be told what to do next. If that's how you work, keep reading.



Tools



GoHighLevel, Google Ads, Meta Ads Manager

Canva, Adobe Photoshop

Google Business, Healthgrades, ZocDoc, Vitals, WebMD

WordPress, Google Workspace, Trello





Schedule & compensation



Full-time, long-term

Flexible hours with some US time zone availability expected

Competitive rate based on experience





How to apply

To be considered, send all of the following:



Your resume

Work samples — content, campaigns, social pages, graphics, anything relevant

A short intro video (1–2 minutes): who you are, what you do, and why this role fits you

Answer this question in your message (2–4 sentences): Tell us about a time a marketing task didn't go as planned — a tool broke, a platform changed, an account got flagged, anything. What happened, and what did you do?



Start your message with the word MARKREADY so we know you read this in full.

description:
About the Role



We are looking for a reliable, creative, and execution-focused Virtual Assistant to manage and grow our social media presence across TikTok, YouTube, and eventually
.



This role is highly hands-on. You will be responsible for posting content daily, sourcing viral clips, editing videos, and helping drive engagement and sales through TikTok Shop.



If you understand internet culture, viral trends, and how to scale content pages—this is for you.



Key Responsibilities

Post short-form video content daily on TikTok and YouTube Shorts

Source trending/viral clips from the internet and repurpose them

Download, edit, and repost content optimized for each platform

Go live on TikTok Shop to promote products and drive sales

Upload multiple videos per day on YouTube

Assist in scaling content volume and consistency

Use AI tools when needed to create or enhance videos

Follow trends and adapt content strategy quickly

Help manage and grow multiple social media pages

Requirements

Strong understanding of TikTok and YouTube algorithms

Video editing skills (CapCut, Premiere Pro, or similar)

Ability to identify viral content and replicate trends

Familiarity with AI tools for content creation is a plus

Fast, reliable internet and ability to work independently

What We’re Looking For

Someone who moves fast and gets content out consistently

Strong sense of what is funny, engaging, and shareable

Detail-oriented and organized

Willing to experiment and test new content ideas

Long-term mindset — we want to grow this role

Compensation

Opportunity to grow into a full-time role

How to Apply



Please include:



Links to social media accounts you’ve managed or grown

Examples of videos you’ve edited or created

A short note explaining why you’re a good fit

title: Full-Time E-commerce Creative Specialist
description:
Full-Time E-commerce Creative Specialist

Base Image Creation | High-Level Creative Team | Growth Opportunity



We are looking for a full-time E-commerce Creative Specialist who can create high-quality base images made specifically for video advertisements.



This is not a video editing role.



Your responsibility is to create the foundation image — the main visual that everything starts from.



These base images will later be used by our animation team for B-roll creation and by our video editing team for final advertisements.



You are the first and most important step in the creative process.



If the base image is weak, unrealistic, or low quality, the final ad will fail.



You will work from storyboard briefs created by our video editors. Based on these briefs, you must create strong, realistic, high-converting visual assets that feel premium, trustworthy, and natural.



The standard is simple:



there should be almost no visible difference between your work and reality.



We are looking for someone with very high standards, strong taste, attention to detail, and someone who understands what makes an ad look expensive, trustworthy, and built to convert.



You will be joining a fast-growing international e-commerce brand with a 15-person marketing team focused heavily on performance marketing and creative testing.



You will be working inside an international team, so fluent English communication is required — both written and spoken.



What You Will Do



Create high-quality base images for advertisement use



Turn storyboard briefs into strong visual foundations for video ads



Build animation-ready assets that can later be turned into B-roll



Make sure all visuals are realistic, premium, and conversion-focused



Avoid unnatural visuals, obvious mistakes, and scam-looking creatives



Continuously improve outputs so ads feel real and trustworthy



Stay updated with the newest creative systems and workflows



Work closely with our creative, animation, and video teams



Understand that your work is the starting point of the entire ad production process



What We Need



Full-time availability



Around 50 hours per week



Fluent English communication (written and spoken)



Comfortable working inside an international remote team



Very high standards for realism and quality



Strong understanding of premium e-commerce creatives



Ability to identify when content looks fake or unnatural



Someone who works fast without sacrificing quality



A-player mindset and strong ownership



Someone who wants to grow with the team long-term



Someone who understands that details d
 performance



Salary



$700 USD per month



Growth Opportunity



This role is for people who want to stay ahead of the market.



You will work inside a high-level marketing team and continuously learn the newest systems, workflows, and ways to create better-performing creatives.



The goal is not just making images.



The goal is becoming someone who understands how winning creatives are built from the very first frame.



If you are serious, hungry, and want to grow inside a real performance-driven team, apply here:




/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSc1JYDDpJx0l3YO6j9zM2JZ2SsFWcN1ZbVm-3u3kOIoOQGvww/viewform?usp=dialog

title: Technical Virtual Assistant / Right Hand for Online Coaching Business
description:
I run an online coaching business and I'm looking for an advanced  technical VA to be my right hand on digital projects. You won't be working  alone. I already have other tea
mbers in place, but you will be the  person I lean on for technical execution and creative output across the  business. 

This is a long-term role for someone who is fast, resourceful, and can  figure things out without a lot of hand holding. If you love variety, picking  up new tools quickly, and being the person who makes things happen  behind the scenes, keep reading. 

What You'll Be Doing 

1. Assistant and Logistics Manager

• Keep projects moving by managing to-dos and following up on  loose ends 

• Manage technical problems and organizational problems

• Handle research tasks, and admin work as it  pops up 

• Document workflows so we can scale what's working 

• Be the "make sure it actually gets done" person on the team 

2. Presentation Creation  

• Build slide decks for coaching content, webinars, and training  sessions 

• Turn raw outlines and bullet points into polished, on-brand  presentations 

• Update existing decks with new content, branding, and visuals • Tools: Google Slides, Keynote, PowerPoint, Canva 

2. Graphic Design  

• Create social media graphics, ad creatives, thumbnails, and  lead magnet covers 

• Light photo editing, mockups, and layout work 

• Keep everything consistent with brand colors, fonts, and style • Tools: Canva, Photoshop, or Figma (any of these is fine) 

3. Video Editing and Short-Form Content  

• Edit short clips for Reels, TikTok, and YouTube Shorts • Cut long-form webinars and coaching calls into highlight clips • Add captions, b-roll, music, and simple effects 

• Tools: CapCut, Descript, Premiere, or similar 

4.
 and Instagram Ads  

• Help set up and launch new ad campaigns inside Ads Manager

• Duplicate winning ads, swap creatives, build new audiences • Pull weekly performance reports and flag what's working vs  not 

• You don't need to be a full media buyer, but you do need to  know your way around Ads Manager and pixel basics 

5. Website and Funnel Edits  

• Make edits to existing pages (copy swaps, image swaps,  button tweaks, section rebuilds) 

• Comfortable doing light HTML and CSS edits when a page  builder isn't enough 

• Experience with page builders like GoHighLevel, ClickFunnels,  WordPress, Webflow, or similar 



Who You Are  

• 3+ years supporting an online business, agency, or  entrepreneur 

• Strong written and spoken English 

• Available for daily overlap with US time zones (we can discuss  specifics) 

• Tech savvy, fast learner, comfortable jumping between tools • Reliable, proactive, and detail oriented 

• Honest about what you know and what you don't 

• AI tools (ChatGPT, Claude, etc.) are part of how you already  work 

Bonus Points If You Have  

• Experience with
 marketing platforms (GoHighLevel,  ActiveCampaign, ConvertKit) 

• Experience with webinar or coaching businesses specifically • A good eye for design even on quick turnaround work • Ability to write decent copy when needed

How to Apply  

Please record a short custom video (2 to 3 minutes) covering: 1. Your name and background 

2. Your experience with each of the task categories above (be  specific about which tools you've actually used) 

3. One recent project you're proud of and why 

4. Why this role interests you 

Applications without a video will not be considered. Please also include  links to a portfolio or work samples if you have them. 

Looking forward to meeting you.

title: CPA – Pharmaceutical Company/Healthcare exp
description:
We are seeking a detail-oriented and experienced Certified Public Accountant (CPA) to oversee financial operations within a pharmaceutical environment. This role is responsible for financial reporting, compliance, budgeting, and supporting strategic decision-making while ensuring adherence to industry regulations and standards.



Key Responsibilities

Oversee day-to-day financial operations including general ledger, accounts payable/receivable, and payroll

Prepare accurate and timely financial statements in accordance with GAAP/IFRS

Manage month-end and year-end closing processes

Develop and monitor budgets, forecasts, and financial models

Ensure compliance with regulatory requirements specific to the pharmaceutical industry

Coordinate and lead internal and external audits

Monitor cash flow, cost controls, and profitability analysis

Support pricing strategies, product costing, and margin analysis

Collaborate with operations, procurement, and regulatory teams on financial planning

Maintain compliance with tax regulations and manage tax filings

Implement and improve internal controls and financial systems

Qualifications

Certified Public Accountant (CPA) required

Bachelor’s degree in Accounting, Finance, or related field (Master’s preferred)

5–10+ years of experience in accounting or finance, preferably in pharmaceuticals, healthcare, or manufacturing

Strong knowledge of GAAP, financial reporting, and regulatory compliance

Experience with ERP systems (e.g., SAP, Oracle, NetSuite)

Advanced Excel and financial modeling skills

Strong analytical and problem-solving abilities



If you qualify and are interested in the job, please send your updated CV to 
 and we will get in touch with you for a quick interview.

title: Customer Service Representative
description:
About Us: At Gordon Sinclair, we are trusted makers of well-crafted and beautifully brandable merchandise for work, home, and all the 
nts in between. Our foundation is built on the following core values:



Trustworthy: Our foundation is built on trust and integrity. We are reliable, honest, and committed to doing the right thing.

One Team: Together, we achieve greatness. We celebrate our victories, learn from our losses, and support each other every step of the way. Our strength lies in our unity.

Resourceful: We are proactive problem-solvers. We encourage continuous learning and adapt to challenges with innovative solutions, ensuring confidentiality and excellence for our employees and customers.

Creative: Innovation is at our core. We bring creativity to our product decoration and customer service, always finding unique solutions to meet our customers' needs.

Positive: We foster a positive environment by assuming good intentions, celebrating successes publicly, and providing constructive feedback privately. Respect for everyone is paramount.

Accountable: We uphold the highest standards. We follow through on our commitments and set clear expectations, holding ourselves and each other accountable.



Job Summary

As a Customer Service Representative, you will be the first point of contact for our customers, assisting them via chat, phone, and
. You will handle inquiries about orders, products, pricing, and policies while ensuring a smooth and professional customer experience. The ideal candidate has a strong background in customer service and excellent English communication skills.



Key Responsibilities

• Respond to customer inquiries promptly and professionally via phone, chat, and
.

• Provide accurate information about products, orders, and company policies.

• Assist customers with order placement, modifications, and tracking.

• Resolve customer concerns efficiently while maintaining a positive brand image.

• Collaborate with internal teams to address customer needs and escalate issues when necessary.

• Maintain detailed and accurate customer interaction records in our system.

• Uphold company standards for customer service excellence.



Preferred Qualifications

• 3+ years of customer service experience in a fast-paced environment.

• Fluent in English with advanced written and verbal communication skills.

• Strong problem-solving skills and ability to work independently.

• Experience handling multiple communication channels

• Proficiency in CRM systems or customer support software is a plus.

• Ability to multitask and stay organized while managing a high volume of customer interactions.

Technical Requirements

• Computer: Reliable Windows or Mac computer with up-to-date software.

• Headset: Noise-canceling headset with a built-in microphone for clear communication.

• Internet: Stable high-speed internet connection (minimum 25 Mbps download speed).

• Work Environment: Quiet, professional home office setup.

Benefits

• Competitive hourly pay of $8.00

• Remote work

• Opportunities for professional growth and advancement

• Supportive and collaborative work environment



If you have a passion for customer service and want to be part of a dynamic and growing company, we'd love to hear from you!

Prerequisite of application is completing a Culture Index survey.-

title: Credit & Documentation Analyst
description:
Waste Solution Services



Reports To: Director of AP



Role Overview



As a Credit & Documentation Analyst, you play a critical role in ensuring billing accuracy and cost recovery. You will be responsible for collecting, validating, and organizing supporting documentation to resolve billing discrepancies, as well as submitting and tracking credit requests with vendors. Your work ensures that all adjustments are properly documented, processed, and recovered in a timely manner.

________________________________________

Key Responsibilities



Documentation & Validation 

• Collect and organize supporting documentation from internal teams and external partners. 

• Review billing discrepancies and validate accuracy against contracts, invoices, and service records. 

• Ensure all required documentation is complete before submitting credit requests.



Credit Management 

• Submit credit requests to vendors accurately and in a timely manner. 

• Track all submitted credits and maintain up-to-date status records. 

• Follow up with vendors to ensure credits are processed and applied.



Data Tracking & Integrity 

• Maintain detailed logs of all discrepancies, documentation, and credit activity. 

• Ensure records are updated across systems and aligned with internal databases. 

• Support accurate reporting of credits and recoveries.



Cross-Team Coordination 

• Work closely with billing, sales, and operations teams to gather required information. 

• Communicate updates on credit status and outstanding discrepancies. 

• Escalate issues when documentation or vendor responses are delayed.



Process & Quality 

• Identify recurring billing issues and recommend process improvements. 

• Assist in maintaining and updating SOPs (Standard Operating Procedures). 

• Ensure compliance with company documentation standards and workflows.

________________________________________



Who You Are

• Detail-Oriented: You understand that accurate documentation is critical and ensure nothing is overlooked.

• Organized & Process-Driven: You can manage multiple credit requests and documentation streams at once.

• Persistent & Proactive: You follow through with vendors and internal teams until issues are resolved.

• Tech-Savvy: You are comfortable working across multiple systems, spreadsheets, and tracking tools.

• Strong Communicator: You can clearly communicate discrepancies, requirements, and updates across teams.

________________________________________

Qualifications & Skills

• 1–3 years of experience in billing, accounts receivable, or administrative support roles.

• Strong organizational and documentation management skills.

• Experience handling discrepancies, credits, or vendor coordination is a plus.

• Proficiency in spreadsheets and data tracking tools.

• Preferred but not required: experience with QuickBooks, NetSuite, Salesforce, or similar systems.

title: Content Strategist & Manager
description:
We are looking for a Senior Content Strategist and Social Media Manager who brings deep, earned expertise to this role.  Someone who already knows how social media works at a strategic level — the psychology behind why content stops the scroll, the difference between awareness content and conversion content, why what works on one platform fails on another, and how to build a content strategy that actually grows an account and drives sales.



This is a collaborative role. You will work directly with Keenya. She shares what is happening in the business — the offers, the webinars, the content drops, the priorities — and you build the strategy on top of that. You bring the thinking. You bring the plan. You do not wait to be told what to post.



What We Learned From Our Last Hire

We have been through this search recently and we know what we are looking for. The person we want understands the psychology of content at a deep level. They know the difference between content that builds awareness with cold audiences and content that converts warm audiences into buyers. They can look at a business and immediately understand how to translate what is happening in that business into a content strategy that grows and sells. If that description fits you, keep reading.



What You Will Do

Content Strategy

Receive a weekly briefing from Keenya and build a full multi-platform content strategy around it — without being told what to post, how many times to post, or what angle to take



Come to every week with a proactive plan that accounts for growth content, authority content, and conversion content across every platform



Understand the audience at each stage of the funnel — cold audiences who have never heard of Keenya, warm audiences who follow but have not bought, and existing buyers who need to ascend — and write content that speaks correctly to each stage



Think about content the way a marketer does — every post has a purpose, a target, and a measurable goal

Identify what is working, what is not, and bring data-informed observations to Keenya proactively



Content Creation

Write captions, scripts, and hooks for all platforms — formatted, platform-specific, and ready to use with no reformatting needed



Write short-form video scripts and hooks that Keenya can film — with awareness versus conversion content clearly distinguished in your approach



Write promotional content for webinars, offers, challenges, and launches that is built to convert, not just inform



Write in Keenya's voice — direct, warm, faith-forward, and conversational. Not in your voice. Not in a marketing template. Hers.



Adapt content intelligently across platforms — what you write for
 is not what you write for YouTube, and you know why



Platform Management



Manage the content calendar and keep it one full week ahead at all times



Schedule and publish content on all managed platforms on time, every time



Promote the newsletter, both podcasts, and YouTube content every single week without being reminded — this is a standing, non-negotiable responsibility



Engage with comments and community interactions on managed platforms



Monitor platform performance and bring strategic observations to Keenya weekly



Weekly Planning & Communication

Submit a complete weekly content plan every Monday — a real strategic plan, not a list of post topics



Bring at least one proactive strategic insight or content idea each week that Keenya did not ask for



Communicate proactively and clearly — no going quiet, no missing deadlines without early notice



Study the business before building the strategy — you cannot build a strategy for a business you have not taken the time to understand



Who You Are

You have years of real social media strategy experience — not just posting experience, but strategic experience where you have been responsible for account growth and conversion results



You understand the psychology of content deeply. You know why certain content stops the scroll, why certain hooks work on cold audiences and others do not, and why awareness content and conversion content require completely different approaches



You can look at a business and immediately start thinking about how to translate what that business does into a content strategy that grows and sells — without needing everything handed to you



You are the person in the room who knows things others do not. You bring ideas, frameworks, and strategic perspective that add real value



You write well. Captions, scripts, hooks, promotional copy — you do all of it at a high level and you do it in someone else's voice without it sounding like you



You are proactive by default. You do not wait to be told. You bring the plan, you flag the opportunities, you ask the questions that need asking before problems happen



You thrive in a fast-paced entrepreneurial environment where priorities shift and speed matters



What We Mean By Awareness vs. Conversion Content

This distinction matters to us and we want anyone applying for this role to understand it clearly before they apply.



Platforms

You will be building strategy for and managing content across multiple platforms. The exact scope will be confirmed during the interview based on your experience and strengths.



Platform

Notes


64,000+ followers. Relationship and conversion platform. Your primary execution platform.

YouTube

9,600+ subscribers. Authority and education platform. Strategy and promotion.

LinkedIn

5,400+ followers. Thought leadership platform. Consistent posting and repurposing.

Threads

Active account. Conversational, insight-driven content.

Instagram 33,800  & TikTok 514,000

You will write scripts and hooks for these platforms. Keenya manages all filming and posting on both herself.





Tools We Use

Tool

Purpose

ManyChat

DM automation and comment keyword triggers on Instagram and

Canva

Graphics, carousels, and visual content creation

Metricool

Scheduling and analytics

Notion

Content calendar and project management

Meta Business Suite

 and Instagram management

YouTube Studio

YouTube content management

Google Drive

File storage and team collaboration



How to Apply

To be considered, please submit all of the following. Applications missing any of these will not be reviewed.



A brief introduction — who you are, your background in social media strategy, and why this role fits where you are in your career

Two or three examples of your strategic work — content calendars, strategy documents, campaign plans, or written content you have produced for a client or employer



Your answer to the following scenario question (required):



Scenario Question — Required

Keenya has a webinar on Wednesday evening that pitches her $47/month membership. 



Her podcast episode drops Monday morning. Her newsletter goes out Thursday. She also has a $7 hooks bundle available at all times via a comment trigger on Instagram and
.



What is your content plan for
 and YouTube that week? Walk us through what you would post, when, and why. Show us how you think.

title: Electrical Engineer - Solar & Battery Systems (Remote)
description:
Please follow the application instructions below.



About PropFix.ie



PropFix.ie is Ireland's trusted property maintenance specialist, offering comprehensive solutions with years of expertise across the construction and renovation sectors. We transform spaces through our diverse range of services, from handyman solutions and office fit-outs to complete renovations, house extensions, and specialized installations including doors, floors, and partitions.



Our commitment to delivering high-quality property maintenance and electrical solutions has made us a trusted partner for residential, commercial, and industrial clients nationwide. With decades of experience in electrical systems, installations, and maintenance, we take pride in our technical expertise and craftsmanship—ensuring our clients’ properties remain safe, efficient, and fully compliant with modern standards.



Role Overview



We are seeking a skilled and detail-oriented Electrical Engineer to join our team. This role involves electrical design, project coordination, system analysis, and technical documentation. The successful candidate will work closely with project managers, site teams, and clients to ensure accurate planning, safe installations, and seamless execution of all electrical works—from concept design to project completion.



Key Responsibilities

Electrical Engineering & Design



Electrical System Design: Develop, review, and interpret electrical plans, schematics, and load calculations.

Technical Specifications: Prepare detailed specifications, diagrams, SLDs (single-line diagrams), and layout drawings.

Material & Equipment Selection: Determine appropriate electrical components, materials, and equipment required for projects.

Compliance & Standards: Ensure designs meet electrical codes, safety standards, and regulatory requirements.



Project Coordination & Client Management



Site Coordination: Work with contractors, site engineers, and electricians to ensure proper installation and site execution.

Client Communication: Liaise with clients to clarify requirements, provide technical updates, and explain engineering decisions.

Documentation: Prepare project reports, progress updates, testing results, QA/QC records, and risk assessments.

Change Management: Document revisions to electrical plans and update load calculations, cost impacts, and schedules accordingly.



Testing, Maintenance & Quality Control



System Testing: Perform testing, commissioning, and troubleshooting of electrical systems and equipment.

Preventive Maintenance: Evaluate system performance and recommend maintenance schedules or upgrades.

Safety Compliance: Ensure all electrical work follows safety protocols, lock-out/tag-out procedures, and hazard assessments.



Financial Administration & Office Support



Cost Estimation: Prepare electrical cost estimates, material take-offs, and assist in budget planning.

Invoice & Documentation: Support invoicing, procurement coordination, and inventory updates for electrical materials.

Technical Records: Maintain accurate documentation, permits, and electrical certification records.



Required Skills & Experience

Technical Requirements



Electrical Engineering: Proven experience in electrical design, installation supervision, testing, and commissioning.

Codes & Standards: Strong understanding of local electrical codes, NEC/IEC standards, and safety regulations.

Technical Proficiency: Skilled in electrical drafting tools (AutoCAD, Revit MEP, or similar) and testing instruments.

Project Knowledge: Familiarity with construction processes, electrical layouts, and engineering documentation.



Professional Skills



Analytical Ability: Strong problem-solving and technical analysis skills.

Communication: Excellent verbal and written communication for client and contractor coordination.

Organization: Ability to handle multiple projects, documentation, and scheduling tasks efficiently.

Adaptability: Capable of managing both office-based work and technical project duties.



What We Offer



Competitive compensation package

Opportunities to work with clients across Ireland and the UK

Professional development and training programs

Collaborative and supportive remote work environment

Clear career advancement pathways

Exposure to diverse engineering and construction projects

Flexible remote working systems with comprehensive support



Application instructions

Please complete the attached application form and submit it along with your CV:

title: Part-Time Real Estate Bookkeeper (Cleanup and Reconciliation)
description:
Role Overview



We are looking for a detail-oriented and proactive Real Estate Bookkeeper who specializes in cleanup and reconciliation of historical financial records.



This role focuses on bringing messy or incomplete books to accuracy, ensuring all accounts are properly reconciled and ready for ongoing monthly bookkeeping.



???? Key Responsibilities

???? Cleanup & Catch-Up Bookkeeping

Review and clean up historical financial records (multiple months/years backlog)

Identify and correct discrepancies, uncategorized transactions, and duplicate entries

Ensure all transactions are properly recorded and categorized



???? Bank & Account Reconciliation

Perform monthly bank and credit card reconciliations

Investigate and resolve unreconciled balances and discrepancies

Ensure financial records match bank statements accurately



???? Real Estate-Specific Bookkeeping

Record and track:

Rental income and expenses

Property-related costs (maintenance, utilities, repairs)

Owner distributions and capital contributions

Maintain clean records per property or entity



???? Financial Accuracy & Reporting

Prepare accurate financial reports (P&L, Balance Sheet) after cleanup

Ensure books are audit-ready and properly structured

Flag inconsistencies or unusual transactions proactively



???? Documentation & Organization

Request and organize missing documents (bank statements, receipts, etc.)

title: Mobile App Developer — Heaven on Earth App
description:
About the Project

We're building the Heaven on Earth App, a spiritual wellness and community resonance platform. Think of it as a movement in app form. Users practice a simple "Glowing Heart" 5-second mindfulness technique, activate their "glow," and appear as beacons of light on a live global map. Then it stays lit for 24 hours, and resets. The primary goal is to reach 144,000 active beacons glowing simultaneously across the world. I have made a little animation that is to play once people press the glow button, that then materializes into the glow. 

We already have professional visual mockups from 
sign. The design work is done. We need someone who can bring the functionality to life.

This is not a generic meditation app. It's a real-time, map-based resonance tracker with content delivery, social sharing, and a growing community at its core.



What You'll Build (V1)

The Glow Map (Core Feature)



Users tap to activate their "glow" after doing a short breathwork/presence practice

An animation video starts,that ends on a map of the Globe with their beacon lit

Their beacon appears on a real-time global map, alongside all other people who have glowed today. With time, iot wioll be possible to get information on the other people who have done it. For V1 it is not needed to be that deep.

A live counter tracks collective progress toward 144,000 beacons

Glowing status has a time window (e.g. the beacon stays lit for a set period)



Content Hub



Deliver guided meditations, audio teachings, and written content (books, lessons)

Mix of free and gated/paid content

Clean, beautiful content browsing experience



Good News Section



A curated feed of positive, uplifting news

Simple content management (we provide the content, you build the display)



Sharing and Viral Features



Share your glow status to Instagram, WhatsApp, etc.

Invite friends to join the resonance field

Track how many people you've invited/activated



Personal Tracker



Daily practice log

Streak tracking

Personal stats (total glows, days active, etc.)



User System



Sign up / login 
 + social auth)

User profiles

Push notifications





Tech Stack (Flexible)

We're open to your recommendation, but here's what we're leaning toward:



Frontend: React Native or Flutter (cross-platform, iOS + Android)

Backend: Firebase or Supabase (real-time database for the map, auth, storage)

Map: Google Maps or Mapbox for the beacon display

Content Delivery: Cloud storage for audio/video files



If you have experience with a stack that fits this better, tell us. We care about the result, not the specific tools.



What We're Looking For



2+ years of experience building and shipping mobile apps (React Native or Flutter preferred)

Experience with real-time features (live data, maps, WebSockets or Firebase Realtime DB)

Ability to take visual mockups and translate them into functional, polished screens

Comfortable working independently with weekly check-ins

Good communication in English

Bonus: Experience with AI-assisted development tools (Claude Code, Cursor, etc.)

Bonus: Interest in or openness to spiritual wellness, mindfulness, or conscious community





What You Get



Competitive monthly rate ($1,200 – $1,800 based on experience), paid reliably

13th month bonus

Creative freedom within the design framework

A meaningful project with real purpose (not another e-commerce clone)

Potential long-term role as the app grows (V2 includes a service marketplace, V3 includes blockchain/token features)

Work directly with the founder





How to Apply

Please include in your application:



A brief intro about yourself

Links to 1–3 mobile apps you've built or worked on (App Store / Play Store links preferred)

Your preferred tech stack for this project and why

Your honest estimate of timeline for V1

Your monthly rate expectation

Whether you have experience with AI-assisted coding tools



We'll review applications promptly. If there's a fit, we'll schedule a quick video call to walk through the mockups together.



This is a project with heart. We're building something that brings people together in presence and light. If that resonates with you, we'd love to hear from you.

title: Wedding Video Editor
description:
Hi! Thanks for taking the time to read my job post. 

Starting this June, I will be launching into a busy, full time wedding videographer season until the October, and I am looking to work with someone who has experience editing wedding films in Premiere Pro. 



My goal for this season is for you to do the set up work with the footage and for me to execute the deliverables (highlight film, speeches, raw footage). So on a Sunday I will upload all the footage to my google drive and then you will cull all the footage and organize it by sections and colour code so that it's prepared for me to start editing the highlight. 



I often have two weddings in a weekend, a few weekends with three, so I'll need your help for 10 hours per week, to help manage my footage and get me further along in the editing process. 



I want to start with you soon so I can train you before my wedding season starts. I want to do some video calls (I only speak English) and have make me some content so you can learn my style and what I'm expecting. 



I like working with someone who is independent and detailed oriented. Ideally you're even better with Premiere then I am! I'm currently editing all my own stuff, so I'm pretty good with Premiere haha.



What's a quote that you're currently loving!?



Looking forward to chatting !

title: Social Media Editor
description:

This role is perfect for someone who understands creator content, internet culture, storytelling, clean pacing, hooks, captions, and how to make short-form videos feel engaging without being overly edited.



I’m not looking for someone to just cut clips together. I’m looking for an editor who can look at existing footage, find the strongest 
nts, suggest creative edits, recommend hooks, and help shape the footage into content that feels engaging, polished, and social-first.



This role will start with short-form video editing. Over time, there may be an opportunity to expand into YouTube long-form editing as well.



Pay:

$300/month to start for a 30-day trial period

Potential to increase if the fit is strong and the workload grows

2–3 edits per week

1 round of revisions per video

Short-form content only to start



Responsibilities:

Review raw footage and identify strong hooks, 
nts, story beats, and usable clips

Recommend creative edits based on the footage provided

Add clean captions, hooks, zooms, cuts, sound effects, and engaging pacing

Create videos that feel natural, aesthetic, polished, and social-first

Follow editing references closely while also bringing creative ideas

Stay aware of social media trends, viral formats, and editing styles

Organize edited files clearly



Requirements:

Strong experience editing short-form video

Familiar with CapCut, Adobe Premiere Pro, Final Cut, or similar editing tools

Strong understanding of TikTok/Reels/Shorts pacing

Good eye for lifestyle, wellness, beauty, fitness, and creator content

Able to spot engaging 
nts inside raw footage

Creative enough to suggest edit ideas, hooks, and formats

Able to adapt to a creator’s style quickly

Reliable, organized, and communicative

Comfortable receiving feedback and making revisions

Able to meet weekly deadlines



Bonus Skills:

Experience editing for influencers, creators, or personal brands

Experience editing wellness, beauty, fitness, lifestyle, relationship, or podcast-style content

Please include:

Your editing software

Your availability

A brief note on how you approach turning raw footage into a strong video

The word “GLOW” in your application so I know you read this



Applications without video samples will not be considered.

title: Phone-First Customer Experience VA (US Company | Pacific Time)
description:
We’re hiring a confident, phone-savvy professional to become the first voice customers hear at Graham Landscape & Design.



This is not a back-office admin job.    



This role is for someone who thrives in live conversations, builds instant trust, and can guide customers with clarity and warmth while managing systems at the same time.  



If you take pride in excellent communication and love helping customers feel taken care of, you will do very well here. 



Your performance directly impacts customer experience, booked appointments, and company growth.



Primary Responsibility: Phone Excellence

Your #1 priority is handling incoming customer calls exceptionally well — every time. You will:

- Answer all inbound calls within 30 seconds using approved greeting scripts

- Handle calls via Dialpad with professionalism, clarity, and urgency

- Confidently guide callers through conversations

- Gather critical customer information accurately (Full name, Service address, Phone number, Service need)

- Determine whether the caller is a new customer, a previous or an existing customer, or a new owner of a serviced property

- Verify and update customer records in the CRM

- Book the first sales or service appointment during the call whenever possible

- Clearly explain next steps, expectations, and service policies (including drive-time billing when applicable)

- Handle missed calls by returning them within 30 minutes

- Leave clear, complete, and accurate call notes to ensure seamless handoff to sales or service teams

- Uphold Service Beyond Expectation on every single interaction



This role is accountable for call quality, lead accuracy, and appointment success — not just answering the phone.



Secondary Tasks (When Phones Are Quiet)

When call volume is low, you may assist with:

- Light CRM or QuickBooks data updates

- Appointment confirmations

- Calendar updates

- Follow-ups on missed calls or leads

Phone coverage always comes first.



Must-Have Qualifications

- Strong phone confidence and professional speaking voice

- Reliable availability: 8:00 AM – 5:00 PM US Pacific Time

- Ability to multitask systems while speaking with customers

- Willingness to follow structured SOPs

Compensation & Growth

- Long-term stability with a growing company

- Opportunity to grow into expanded administrative or coordination roles



We value reliability, initiative, and accountability.



This Role Is NOT a Fit If

- You struggle with multitasking while speaking

- You are uncomfortable following structured processes

- You are not available in Pacific Time consistently



How to Apply (Follow Exactly):

Send one
 only to
