title: Recruiting Partner (Strong Communications Skills are a MUST)
description:
ABOUT US

We are a mission-driven talent placement firm that connects U.S. businesses with skilled virtual professionals in the Philippines. We are rooted in the belief that every person has a God-given spark, and our role is to help ignite it. We are looking for a long-term partner who wants to grow with us, not just fill a role.



ABOUT THE ROLE

We are hiring a Recruiting Partner to serve as the right hand to our Founder. This is a true “second brain” position for someone who is hungry to learn, eager to build relationships, and ready to become an indispensable part of our team.

You will own the recruiting function and partner with the Founder on operational priorities. You will start by focusing on candidate recruitment for our Filipino talent placement business, with a clear pathway into U.S.-based recruitment as you develop your skills and demonstrate readiness.



WHAT YOU WILL DO



Recruiting & Candidate Management

• Conduct daily candidate interviews and screening calls, building genuine, relationship-driven conversations

• Source candidates on OnlineJobs.ph and LinkedIn Recruiter for open positions

• Eventually lead pre-recorded candidate interviews directly, conducting them on camera with confidence and professionalism

• Upload pre-recorded interviews to Vimeo, create chapter markers, and prepare clean links for client review

• Serve as the subject matter expert for our Applicant Tracking System

• Manage candidate pipelines, track placement progress, and follow up with active and placed talent

• Serve as the ongoing point of contact for placed candidates, nurturing long-term relationships



Client-Facing Communication

• Represent our brands with integrity and grace in all client and candidate interactions

• Communicate clearly and confidently with U.S.-based clients and candidates, with a neutral and professional English-speaking style

• Provide timely updates, respond to inquiries, and anticipate needs



Operational Support

• Maintain rigorous organization across all files, folders, trackers, systems, and communication

• Partner with the Founder on day-to-day operational priorities and special projects

• Manage job postings, opening and closing positions, and tracking recruitment metrics

• Organize and maintain information in Notion for internal documentation and workflows



TOOLS YOU WILL USE

Zoho Recruit (ATS), LinkedIn / LinkedIn Recruiter, OnlineJobs.ph, Vimeo, Notion, Google Workspace, Zoom / Google Meet. We will train you on all tools.



WHAT MAKES THE BEST RECRUITING PARTNER

These are the qualities that separate a good recruiter from an exceptional one. If these resonate with how you already work, you will thrive here.

• Relentlessly Organized. Our business runs on multiple systems and serves two brands. Without obsessive organization, the wheels come off fast. The best Recruiting Partner treats organization as the foundation of the role, not an afterthought.

• Genuine Warmth, in Writing and on Camera. Our brand voice is distinctly warm but professional. Candidates and clients should feel like they are talking to someone who genuinely cares.

• Tech and AI Fluency. Not just “I have used ChatGPT.” Real workflow-level use of AI to draft, organize, research, and create documents.

• Discretion and Integrity. You will handle confidential client contracts, candidate financial information, and sensitive HR matters. Confidentiality is sacred.

• Sound Judgment Under Ambiguity. Recruiting is full of gray areas. The best Recruiting Partner catches important 
nts without being told and brings them to the Founder with a clear point of view.

• Systems Thinker. You ask: “Should this go in the SOP? Should we update the template? Is there a pattern here?” You protect the Founder’s time.

• Brand Fluency. You can switch tones gracefully and represent each brand authentically.

• Skin in the Game. Our commission structure rewards production. You see that as fuel, not pressure.



WHO YOU ARE

• Hungry to learn and grow, personally and professionally

• A natural relationship builder who genuinely enjoys connecting with people

• Detail-oriented and comfortable managing multiple priorities in a fast-paced environment

• A clear, confident communicator in English (spoken and written) with a professional, neutral accent for U.S. client interactions

• Tech-savvy and a quick learner with new platforms and tools

• Proactive and resourceful. You anticipate needs and take action without being told

• Loyal, accountable, and committed to long-term growth within the team

• Based in the Philippines with a reliable internet connection, laptop, and dedicated workspace



PREFERRED BACKGROUND

• Experience in customer service, sales, and/or administrative support

• Previous experience as an executive assistant or in a client-facing role

• Familiarity with recruiting is a plus but not required. We will train you.

• Comfortable working U.S. Eastern Time business hours



COMPENSATION & BENEFITS

Base Salary: Dependent on experience, with opportunity for increases based on performance and demonstrated value over time.

Commission: Earned per placement with no cap. Full structure shared during interviews.

Additional Benefits:

• Internet and phone expenses covered

• Headset provided upon hire

• Laptop available if needed

• Assistance with workspace setup if needed

• Ongoing mentorship, training, and professional development

• Clear pathway for advancement and expanded responsibilities



GROWTH PATH

Phase 1 – Foundation: Learn the business, tools, and processes. Begin conducting candidate calls.

Phase 2 – Expansion: Take on expanded recruiting responsibilities. Lead pre-recorded interviews. Increase placement volume and commission.

Phase 3 – Partnership: Become the Founder’s trusted second brain. Own key operational processes. Earn increased base salary and take on leadership-level responsibilities.



OUR VALUES

Growth Mindset. Relationship First. Loyalty & Partnership. Excellence with Heart.

We are looking for a long-term partner, not a short-term hire. We invest in you, and we ask for commitment in return.

title: Espesyalista sa AI Creative (Full-Time) – Base Image Creation para sa Video Ads
description:
Full-Time AI Creative Specialist

Base Image Creation | High-Level Creative Team | Growth Opportunity



Naghahanap kami ng full-time AI Creative Specialist na kayang gumawa ng high-quality base images na specifically para sa video advertisements.



Hindi ito video editing role.



Ang pangunahing responsibilidad mo ay gumawa ng foundation image — ang main visual na pinagmumlan ng lahat.



Ang mga base images na ito ay gagamitin ng aming animation team para sa B-roll creation at ng aming video editing team para sa final advertisements.



Ikaw ang unang at pinakaimportanteng step sa buong creative process.



Kapag mahina, unrealistic, o low quality ang base image, babagsak ang final ad.



Magtatrabaho ka gamit ang storyboard briefs na ginagawa ng aming video editors. Base sa mga briefs na ito, kailangan mong gumawa ng strong, realistic, at high-converting visual assets na premium tingnan, trustworthy, at natural.



Simple lang ang standard:



halos walang dapat makita na difference sa pagitan ng gawa mo at ng totoong reality.



Naghahanap kami ng taong may napakataas na standards, magandang creative taste, matinding attention to detail, at may malalim na understanding kung ano ang nagpapamukhang expensive, trustworthy, at built to convert ang isang ad.



Sasali ka sa isang fast-growing international e-commerce brand na may 15-person marketing team na heavily focused sa performance marketing at creative testing.



Makikipagtrabaho ka sa isang international team, kaya fluent English communication is required — both written and spoken.



What You Will Do



Create ng high-quality base images para sa advertisement use



Gawing strong visual foundations ang storyboard briefs para sa video ads



Build ng animation-ready assets na puwedeng gawing B-roll later



Siguraduhin na lahat ng visuals ay realistic, premium, at conversion-focused



Iwasan ang unnatural visuals, obvious mistakes, at scam-looking creatives



Patuloy na i-improve ang outputs para mas magmukhang real at trustworthy ang ads



Manatiling updated sa newest creative systems at workflows



Makipagtrabaho nang closely sa aming creative, animation, at video teams



Unawain na ang trabaho mo ang starting point ng buong ad production process



What We Need



Full-time availability



Around 50 hours per week



Fluent English communication (written and spoken)



Comfortable working inside an international remote team



Napakataas na standards para sa realism at quality



Strong understanding ng premium e-commerce creatives



Kayang makita agad kapag fake o unnatural ang content



Mabilis magtrabaho nang hindi sinasakripisyo ang quality



A-player mindset at strong ownership



Taong gustong mag-grow with the team long-term



Taong naiintindihan na details ang nagde-d
 ng performance



Salary



$700 USD per month



Growth Opportunity



Ang role na ito ay para sa mga taong gustong manatiling ahead of the market.



Magtatrabaho ka sa loob ng isang high-level marketing team at tuloy-tuloy kang matututo ng newest systems, workflows, at ways para gumawa ng better-performing creatives.



Ang goal ay hindi lang paggawa ng images.



Ang goal ay maging isang tao na tunay na nakakaintindi kung paano binubuo ang winning creatives mula sa pinakaunang frame.



Kung seryoso ka, gutom sa growth, at gusto mong lumago sa loob ng isang tunay na performance-driven team, apply here:

title: AI Automation Specialist / Agent Creator/ Tech genius
description:
We are looking for a highly skilled AI Automation Specialist / Agent Creator who can help our team design, build, and improve AI-powered workflows for real business operations.



This role will start at 10 hours per week as a consulting and implementation position. The goal is to work with our leadership team to identify where automation can improve daily operations, then build practical systems that save time, reduce manual work, and improve follow-through. As the role grows, this may transition into a full-time position.



What You’ll Do

You will help us turn business problems into smart automation solutions.



Responsibilities include:

Build AI-powered workflows and automations for real business operations

Create agent-style systems that can assist with tasks, decisions, follow-up, and process execution

Connect software platforms using tools like Zapier, Make, n8n, APIs, and webhooks

Automate workflows involving:


Calendars

Forms

Spreadsheets

CRM data

Project and task systems

Reporting

Document handling

Notifications and alerts



- Work with leadership to understand current processes and recommend automation opportunities

- Help the team understand how AI and automation can be incorporated into daily business operations

- Test, troubleshoot, and improve automations over time

- Record walkthroughs of automation processes so the team can review and understand how they work

- Train selected tea
mbers on how to use, monitor, and maintain the automations

- Document workflows clearly so they can be maintained and expanded

- Recommend better tools, better system design, and better ways to use AI across the company



You can also add this under What We’re Looking For:

- Can explain automation workflows clearly and teach non-technical tea
mbers how to use them

- Comfortable creating simple training videos, walkthroughs, or documentation for internal use





Please include the following in your application:

- A short introduction about your experience with AI and automation

- Examples of automations or workflows you have built

- The tools you are most comfortable using

- Your availability for 10 hours per week

title: Sales Manager
description:
PLEASE APPLY HERE: 




 builds outbound sales teams for founder-led, bootstrapped, B2B companies ($500K to $5M ARR) in the US and Europe. We need an additional Sales Team Implementation Manager to help us scale.

  

In this role, you’ll lead and manage client sales team implementations end-to-end, while partnering closely with our founder on strategy, priorities, and continuous improvement of our outbound playbook. 



This is a high-ownership seat: part client delivery, part sales operations oversight, and a key right hand to a strategic executive.



The ideal candidate must be a strong sales leader, but also must be able to work with and alongside other strong personalities. Why? 



Your sales leadership experience will allow you to slot directly into this role, since you already know the general management principles of dialing and sales teams. However, you'll be following the 
 playbook and working with the 
 founder to adjust that playbook to the realities of the specific client.



Additionally, you'll be interacting with the founder (or founders) on the client side. If it's not already clear, bootstrapped founders tend to have very strong personalities.



What You’ll Be Doing:

 • Lead outbound sales implementations for a 
 client.

 • Translate our outbound sales playbook into practical hiring, onboarding, metrics, and performance systems for the client.

 • Directly manage offshore dialers and salespeople, maintaining accountability through scorecards and simple performance rhythms.

 • Run performance reviews with the client team, assess progress, and work with the 
 founder to adjust strategy as needed.

 • Work closely with our founder on non-client-facing founder priorities: process upgrades, internal projects, and playbook refinements.

 • Keep implementation projects organized, including timelines, deliverables, handoffs, and documentation.

 • Coordinate meetings, reporting, and other lightweight activities that keep delivery running smoothly.



We’re Looking For Someone Who Has:

 • Four-plus years of outbound B2B sales management experience, as a leader or coach.

 • Strong operational discipline: you like metrics, routines, and making performance visible.

 • Confidence running multiple workstreams without dropping details.

 • A founder-friendly mindset: proactive, structured, reliable, and comfortable with fast shifts.

 

This is a full-time, remote role. Your work hours will need to overlap with 9am to 4pm US Eastern Time. 

We rely heavily on Apple devices, applications, and services. You should have a post-2021 Mac for this job.

title: Social Media & Growth Marketing Specialist (Hospitality Brand)
description:
Kwackers Kitchen & Sports Bar is not looking for a typical Social Media VA.



We are looking for a growth-focused marketing operator who can help turn Kwackers into one of the most recognised and talked-about food brands in Southampton.



This role is about driving attention, engagement, and ultimately customers through content — not just posting on social media.



You will play a key role in building the brand, creating high-performing content, and supporting lead generation for bookings, events, and customer growth.



This is a long-term opportunity for someone who wants to grow within a business and take ownership of marketing performance.



Key Responsibilities:

Create and publish high-quality short-form video content (TikTok, Instagram Reels)

Develop content that drives engagement, emotion, and footfall

Manage and grow Kwackers’ presence across LinkedIn, Instagram, and TikTok

Identify trends and turn them into brand-relevant content

Track performance and optimise content based on results

Update and manage WordPress website (blogs, landing pages, events)

Support SEO strategy and keyword-based content creation

Assist in lead generation campaigns (offers, promotions,
 capture)

Bring new ideas weekly to improve marketing performance



Requirements:

Minimum 2 years experience in social media marketing or digital marketing

Proven track record of growing social media accounts (must provide evidence)

Strong video editing skills (CapCut or similar)

Experience creating viral or high-performing content

Basic understanding of SEO and WordPress

Strong written English and communication skills

Ability to work independently and take ownership of results



What We Are Looking For:

Someone who understands how to create content that drives real business results

A creative thinker who brings ideas, not just follows instructions

A fast executor who can produce content consistently

Someone who is serious about building a long-term career



Working Hours & Pay:

Starting at 20 hours per week (increasing to full-time based on performance)

Starting from $10/hour (depending on experience and proven results)

Opportunity for growth, increased pay, and long-term role

title: SEO Portfolio Manager (Senior SEO Growth Lead)
description:

We have built a strong internal team in the Philippines, including 25+ highly skilled tea
mbers across SEO, development, and content. We are now looking to add a Senior SEO Portfolio Manager who can take ownership of a group of websites and help drive the next level of growth.

 What This Role Is

A strategic operator role (thinking + execution)

High ownership over a portfolio of websites

Supported by an experienced in-house SEO, content, and development team

Focused on real outcomes, not theory

A path to becoming a vertical lead within the organization

Not checklist-based SEO



 Ownership Model

You will be assigned a group of websites or a vertical (e.g., construction, medical, real estate).

Developing strategy within your assigned portfolio

Executing and improving performance

Driving measurable growth in traffic and conversions

You are expected to think, act, and execute like an owner.

Take ownership of 5–10 websites (100–500+ pages each)

Identify why sites are underperforming and fix them

Build and execute SEO strategies within your portfolio

Optimize:

Meta titles and descriptions (CTR-focused)

Page structure and internal linking

Increase click-through rates

Improve rankings on existing pages

Identify and resolve:

Content gaps

Cannibalization

Indexing and technical issues

Work with writers and developers to improve or replace low-quality content

Use AI tools like ChatGPT and Claude to scale content intelligently

Continuously test new ideas and strategies to win in competitive markets

Collaborate with internal team (strategy, SEO specialists, developers)



Strategic Expectations

You are expected to:

Identify opportunities the team has missed

Propose and test new ideas based on real data

Improve performance continuously—not just execute instructions

You will not wait for direction on everything—you will drive results.



Success in This Role Looks Like

Clear, measurable SEO wins within 60–90 days



 Requirements

Strong understanding of:

CRO (titles, descriptions, user behavior)

mbers)

 Not a Fit If You

 Compensation & Details

Full-time (40 hours/week)

Long-term role with growth opportunities



 Growth Opportunity

This role can evolve into:

Vertical Lead (owning a full business category within the portfolio)





 Application Requirement (Mandatory)

A website you worked on

What was wrong

What you changed

The results you achieved

title: Experienced Cold Caller / Telemarketer for U.S. Insurance Leads
description:
Job Title: Experienced Cold Caller / Telemarketer for U.S. Insurance Leads

Company: DialXpress

Location: Remote

Job Type: Full-time

Shift: U.S. business hours, Monday to Friday

Experience Required: Minimum 2 years cold calling or telemarketing experience



About Us

DialXpress is a U.S.-based outbound calling company serving insurance agencies nationwide. The company focuses on calling x-dates, internet leads, aged leads, former customers, and requotes, with a live-caller model only. DialXpress positions itself as an approved vendor and emphasizes compliant calling, high dial volume, and warm handoffs for quoting.



About the Role

We are hiring an experienced cold caller / telemarketer who knows how to get through lists, handle objections, speak clearly, and generate real conversations with U.S. prospects. This is not an entry-level role. We want someone who is comfortable making high-volume outbound calls, following call flows, updating the CRM properly, and helping produce quote opportunities for insurance agencies.



You will be calling leads provided by the client or campaign, using approved scripts and processes. DialXpress provides the staffing side of the operation, while clients provide the lead data, dialer access, and campaign instructions.



What You’ll Be Doing



Make outbound calls to U.S. leads daily

Work internet leads, aged leads, x-dates, former customers, and requote opportunities

Speak with prospects professionally and confidently

Follow campaign scripts while still sounding natural

Qualify interest and transfer or hand off warm prospects when appropriate

Log call outcomes, notes, dispositions, and follow-up actions correctly

Follow compliance rules and do-not-call procedures

Maintain strong daily activity and productivity standards

Communicate with management about lead quality, objections, and call results



What We’re Looking For



At least 2 years of experience in cold calling, telemarketing, appointment setting, or outbound sales

Strong spoken English with a clear and neutral accent

Confident on live calls

Good objection handling skills

Comfortable with repetitive outbound work and performance tracking

Reliable internet and quiet work environment

Experience calling U.S. consumers or business owners is preferred

Insurance lead calling experience is a major plus

Experience using dialers, CRMs, and call disposition systems is preferred



Important Requirements



Must be comfortable making a high volume of outbound calls daily (400+)

Must follow scripts, compliance rules, and company processes

Must update records accurately after calls

Must show up consistently and be dependable

Must be coachable and open to feedback



What Makes This Role Different



Live-caller environment only

No robocalls

No AI voice

Warm handoff style campaigns when applicable

DialXpress is built around lead engagement and structured follow-up cadence, including immediate engagement and extended follow-up windows.



Compensation



Hourly rate: $2.00-$3.00

Full-time schedule: 9am-8pm EST (9am-5pm EST Early Shift) (12pm-8pm Late Shift)

Start date: ASAP



How to Apply

To apply, send:



Your resume

A short voice recording introducing yourself

A summary of your cold calling / telemarketing experience

Any experience you have with insurance, live transfers, appointment setting, or U.S. outbound calling

Your internet speed and computer setup



Application Screening Question

Please answer these with your application:



How many years of cold calling experience do you have?

Have you called U.S. leads before?

What industries have you called in?

Are you comfortable with high-volume outbound calling every day?

Have you worked with dialers and CRMs before?

What is your expected hourly rate?



If you want, I can turn this into a more aggressive OnlineJobs.ph-style version optimized to attract stronger sales reps instead of general telemarketers.

title: AI Video Editor — Animated Videos (VEO3)
description:
We are looking for a skilled AI Video Editor who can produce dynamic, animated short-form videos for TikTok. This is a long-term full-time position for someone who is creative, detail-oriented, and can consistently deliver high-quality AI-generated content every single day.

This role is different from standard AI video editing — the videos are fully animated, built from multiple AI-generated clips stitched seamlessly together. You will be working with Veo3, Nano Banana Pro, and potentially ElevenLabs to produce scroll-stopping content in the health and natural remedy niche.

Here is exactly how the workflow works:



You will be given exact video ideas, scripts, and concepts by us

Use Nano Banana Pro (Higgsfield or FLOW) to generate the character images needed

Upload images into Veo3 to generate animated clips

Use ElevenLabs or provided audio for voiceover where needed

Stitch all clips together in CapCut or your preferred tool

Ensure audio is consistent, flows at the same pace, and uses the same voice throughout

Add captions

Upload finished video to Google Drive and share with us



? Veo3 access will be provided by us.

The style is fast-paced, animated, and visually dynamic — multiple scenes cutting into each other throughout the video.



REQUIREMENTS:



Hands-on experience with Veo3

Experience with Nano Banana Pro (Higgsfield or FLOW)

Familiarity with ElevenLabs or similar AI voiceover tools is a plus

Strong understanding of animated AI video production workflows

Proficient in CapCut or similar editing software

Excellent attention to audio quality, pacing, and consistency throughout stitched videos

Able to follow instructions and replicate a specific video style precisely

Fluent in written and spoken English

Portfolio required — must include recent AI-generated animated video work

Long-term commitment — frequent job-hoppers will not be considered

Reliable internet connection, able to deliver 6–8 videos per day

Self-motivated and communicates proactively





HOW TO APPLY:

Complete our application form here:

]

 and include the link in the application form.

title: E-Commerce Virtual Assistant (Amazon FBA / Wholesale Reselling): Weekly Pay & Growth Opportunities
description:
Hi there!



We're searching for a highly motivated and detail-oriented E-Commerce Virtual Assistant to join our remote team. 



This remote position offers an exciting opportunity for you to contribute to our client's success while enjoying the freedom and flexibility of a work-from-home lifestyle.



If you're passionate about helping others succeed and want to grow your career in a dynamic and supportive environment, then read on…





== WHY WORK WITH US ==



Make a Difference at Pro Sulum: An Award-Winning Company Where You Matter.



We're not just about accolades (like being on the Inc. 5000 list) - we're about empowering our team to create real impact. At Pro Sulum, your contributions matter, and your unique talents are valued. Join a company that fosters personal growth, celebrates individuality, and champions success for all.



-> Benefits:

 * Competitive salary (Php 30,000 to Php 40,000) depending on experience

 * Pay Increase Opportunity Every 6 Months

 * Weekly Pay

 * Paid Service Incentive Leaves

 * Monthly Incentives

 * Referral Incentives

 * Virtual Company Events

 * Dynamic, fun, and supportive team

 * Full-time role as an independent contractor (not BPO)

 * Long-term opportunity with career growth and advancement





== THE POSITION ==



As the E-Commerce Virtual Assistant, your main responsibility is to identify profitable products, source suppliers, and help manage backend Amazon FBA operations.



You’ll be responsible for turning product ideas into actual inventory that sells, handling everything from research and supplier outreach to profitability analysis and listing support.



This is a build-phase role, meaning you’ll help lay the foundation of the business. The focus is on quality over quantity, finding a few strong, profitable products rather than chasing volume.

If you’re analytical, proactive, and comfortable working with numbers, this role offers serious growth potential.





-> Requirements:

• Experience with Amazon FBA or other similar marketplace is a must

• Strong analytical and research skills

• High attention to detail (critical for margins & logistics)

• Strong written English 
-heavy role)

• Ability to follow systems and learn quickly

• Resourcefulness in finding suppliers and opportunities

• Available to work full-time (40 hrs/wk).

• Can work during standard US business hours.

• Fast, stable internet connection (Minimum download speed 10 Mbps)

• Working computer/laptop (Minimum Requirement: Processor - Intel i5 or equivalent, RAM - 8GB).

• Backup power source or work location for power outages.





-> Tools/Software:

• Google Workspace (Sheets), MS Office (Excel), Amazon Seller Central, various research & product validation tools





-> Nice to Have:

• Familiarity with product research tools

• Experience in wholesale sourcing or online arbitrage





-> Responsibilities:

Duties and Responsibilities include but are not limited to:

• Research high-demand, profitable products on Amazon and other marketplaces

• Analyze sales velocity, competition, pricing trends, and profit margins

• Create weekly shortlists (5–10 vetted products) with strong potential

• Identify and reach out to wholesalers and suppliers

• Build supplier relationships through
 communication

• Assist with onboarding requirements and negotiate pricing when needed

• Calculate full landed costs including product cost, shipping, and Amazon fees

• Ensure all products meet profitability thresholds before approval

• Flag potential risks such as low margins or slow-moving inventory

• Coordinate shipments to Amazon warehouses (FBA)

• Ensure proper packaging, labeling, and compliance with Amazon standards

• Monitor inventory levels and product performance

• Assist with product listings (titles, descriptions, keywords)

• Track rankings, sales trends, and optimize listings over time

• Prepare weekly buying recommendations including:

– Direct purchase links

– Cost breakdown

– Expected profit margins





-> About You:

For this position, the successful candidate will have/be:

* High Attention to Detail: You are accurate, consistent, and thorough in your work. 

* Dependable & Trustworthy: You complete tasks on time and follow through on your commitments.

* Resourceful & Proactive: You tackle challenges head-on and solve problems independently.

* Great Communicator: You excel in both written and verbal English communication.





== HOW TO APPLY ==



Ready to join us? Apply now and unlock your future with Pro Sulum!



If you are interested in this position and believe you have the qualities listed above to be successful, please complete this Google Form and FOLLOW THE INSTRUCTIONS carefully.



APPLY HERE >>>



 - Due to the high volume of applications we receive, only candidates selected for further consideration will be contacted to move forward in the hiring process.

 - If you're a good fit for the role, you'll receive an
 from the Pro Sulum Recruitment Team within 1-2 weeks.



Congratulations on taking the first step towards a rewarding career with Pro Sulum! We're excited to learn more about you and explore the possibility of you joining our team.

title: Community Operations & Customer Service Specialist
description:
WE'RE HIRING!



Are you a people-person who LOVES to talk, motivate, and make things happen? Do you get energy from connecting with others and helping them succeed? Then keep reading — this role was made for you!

STEP 1: CREATE YOUR VIDEO (This Is How You Apply!)



Before you submit anything else, we need to see YOU! Record a short 2-3 minute video and tell us:

1. Your name and a quick intro about yourself

2. Why you're excited about working with the Digital Product Creators community

3. What makes you the perfect person to call and support our members every single day

4. How you use Go High Level and your experience with the platform

5. One fun fact about yourself!



No video = No application. Show us your personality — we want to meet YOU!

About the Role: You Will Be on the Phone Every Single Day

Let's be upfront: calling clients is the core of this position. You will be picking up the phone daily to welcome new members, re-engage inactive ones, and be the warm, energetic voice of our community. If you love connecting with people and have the gift of gab — you are going to thrive here!

Daily Client Calls (Your #1 Priority):



• Call and welcome every new member within 24 hours of sign-up — make them feel like a VIP from Day 1!

• Call Ultimate 5-Day Mentorship Experience sign-ups within 48 hours — catch them while they are fired up!

• Proactively call members who have gone quiet at the 15, 30, 45, and 60-day marks — be their accountability partner!

• Answer all incoming calls to the Digital Product Creators Customer Service line — you are the voice of our brand!



More Ways You'll Make an Impact:



• Host engaging sessions inside the Digital Product Creators Community — bring the energy!

• Train members to use Canva for stunning digital product banners and designs

• Manage the chat box during LIVE Zoom certification trainings

• Pitch upgrades to the $497, $997, and $1,997 Digital Marketing System plans

• Monitor and respond to support
s 
 from 11:00 AM to 8:00 PM EST

• Interview top-performing members to create inspiring Case Studies and Success Blueprints



Required Skills & Experience:



• Go High Level (GHL) — REQUIRED: You must have hands-on experience with Go High Level. This is non-negotiable. We use GHL daily to manage pipelines, automations, and member communications.



• Proven customer service or client-facing experience — you are comfortable on the phone every day

• Canva experience (or willingness to learn quickly)

• Comfortable with Zoom and online community platforms

• Strong written communication for
 support



Who Is This Perfect For?

• You LOVE talking to people and could make friends anywhere

• You are organized, reliable, and never drop the ball on follow-ups

• You are motivated by commissions and love seeing people win

• You can work independently and manage your time like a boss

• You are energetic, empathetic, and customer-obsessed



Ready to Join the Team?

Record your 2-3 minute intro video (make sure you tell us your Go High Level experience!), then submit your application today.



We cannot wait to meet you!



Digital Product Creators Community

title: Facebook Ads Strategist (Meta-to-Amazon & Shopify Specialist)
description:
We aren't looking for someone who simply "boosts posts." We need a technical architect of growth—someone who understands the intricate plumbing of cross-platform attribution and can navigate the "black box" of Amazon’s ecosystem.



If you know how to bridge the data gap between Meta Ads and Marketplace sales while maintaining a high-performance Shopify presence, we want you on our team.



The Mission

Your primary objective is to drive high-intent traffic to our Amazon listings and Shopify store. You will be responsible for ensuring we capture every possible data point for retargeting and optimization, even when the platform destination makes tracking difficult.



Key Responsibilities

Full-Funnel Meta Management: End-to-end strategy, setup, and scaling of
/Instagram campaigns with a ruthless focus on ROAS.



The "Amazon Connection": Masterfully utilize Amazon Attribution to track off-platform performance and measure the impact of social spend on marketplace sales.



Advanced Tracking & API Integration: Manage the Meta Pixel and Conversions API (CAPI) on Shopify. Implement intermediate landing pages or attribution tags to simulate "pixel-level" data for Amazon conversions.



A/B Testing & Creative Iteration: Constantly evolve ad creative, copy, and funnel environments to lower CAC and improve click-through quality.



Holistic Reporting: Deliver weekly insights on spend, attributed sales, and the organic ranking lift (A9 algorithm impact) on Amazon.



What We’re Looking For

Amazon-to-Meta Expertise: You understand the nuances of driving external traffic (Direct-to-Listing vs. Landing Pages) and how it affects conversion rates and ranking.



Shopify Mastery: Deep knowledge of the Shopify-Meta ecosystem, including Advantage+ campaigns and catalog synchronization.



Post-iOS14 Technical Savvy: You are a tracking expert. You know how to use "super URLs," Attribution Tags, and specialized funnels to maintain visibility in a privacy-first world.



The Right Metrics: You don't report on "likes." You speak the language of ROAS, MER (Marketing Efficiency Ratio), and TACOS.



Requirements

2+ years of dedicated Meta Ads management for E-commerce brands.



Proven experience managing monthly budgets of $10k+.



Expertise in Amazon Attribution and the Brand Registry ecosystem.



Strong copywriting skills and the ability to provide high-level creative direction for visuals.



How To Apply

Note: Do not apply through this platform. Applications submitted via OLJ will not be entertained. To be considered, you must
 
 directly.



Subject Line: FB Ads Specialist - [Your Full Name]



Please attach the following:

Cover Letter

Resume

Portfolio (Case studies preferred)

A brief Video Introduction

Current Rate (per hour or per month)

Confirmation: Are you comfortable using a time tracker?

Confirmation: Are you able to work during EST hours?

title: Credit Repair FTC Report Processor - Immediate High-Volume
description:
We are a fast-growing US credit repair organization. We currently have an immediate backlog of 40+ clients requiring FTC Identity Theft reports to be processed today, with a continuous pipeline of new files arriving every week.

We are hiring for an immediate piece-rate gig paying $2.00 - $5.00 per completed client file (rate based on your proven experience and the complexity of the file as some clients may require multiple reports). Because some clients have heavy files requiring multiple reports due to form limitations, you will be compensated per client, not just per report. If you can knock this backlog out efficiently and flawlessly, this will immediately turn into a permanent Part-Time or Full-Time role on our team.

This is an urgent need, so we are seeking an experienced FTC processor who can hit the ground running. While we have detailed SOPs for our specific workflow, the ideal candidate will already be familiar with the platform and standard workarounds.

Please ensure you meet these technical requirements before applying:

• File Handling: You must know how to download and open a .html credit report file directly in an internet browser (like Chrome or Edge) to view the data.

• FTC Workarounds: You must know the standard methods to bypass the FTC website's paste restrictions (such as using the "Inspect Element" tool or browser extensions) to quickly enter large amounts of information into the personal statement area.

• FTC Platform Navigation: You must know to always select "Submit without an account" and how to troubleshoot basic website glitches (like clearing cache).

• High Accuracy: You must be meticulous in verifying names, SSNs, and addresses before submitting.

A Note on Experience: Because this is a time-sensitive backlog, please do not misrepresent your skill set. We are looking for true experience, and your first batch will be a paid test of your speed and accuracy using these methods and could potentially be upgraded to a part-time / full-time VA role.

Please provide work samples if possible.

Thank you!

title: Project Manager & Executive Assistant
description:
Project Manager & Executive Assistant

About Us



EVORETRO is a fast-growing international brand specializing in protective and display solutions for collectibles (trading cards, graded cards, figures, and more).



We operate across multiple product lines, global markets, and cross-functional teams—managing product launches, marketing campaigns, and operational initiatives simultaneously.



We are seeking a highly organized and execution-driven professional to support leadership while ensuring company-wide projects are delivered on time and at high quality.



Role Mission

Ensure the company is focused on the right priorities and that all initiatives are executed efficiently, on time, and with accountability.

Act as the bridge between leadership and operational teams, supporting the COO and department heads to drive results across the organization.

Key Responsibilities

1. Project & Program Management

Maintain a master tracker of all company initiatives, including projects, tasks, deadlines, and dependencies.

Ensure each initiative has: clear ownership, defined deadlines, and measurable outcomes.

Drive projects from planning ? execution ? completion, ensuring quality and accountability.

2. Executive Support

Act as a right-hand to the COO and leadership team, managing schedules, meetings, and strategic priorities.

Prepare executive reports, presentations, and updates on key initiatives.

Filter and escalate critical information to leadership while ensuring smooth day-to-day operations.

3. Cross-Department Alignment

Serve as the central point of contact across departments.

Ensure all teams are aligned with company priorities and strategic goals.

Coordinate between marketing, operations, product, and leadership to prevent misalignment.

4. Team Accountability & Execution Oversight

Hold tea
mbers and department leads accountable for deliverables.

Conduct regular follow-ups and challenge delays, vague updates, and low-quality work.

Push for clarity, speed, and results across all initiatives.

5. Strategic Planning & Translation

Work with leadership to translate company strategy into actionable execution plans.

Break down high-level goals into department-level initiatives and tasks.

Ensure priorities are realistic and resources are properly allocated.

6. Reporting & Visibility

Provide structured updates to leadership: On track / At risk / Delayed.

Highlight key blockers, risks, and actionable insights.

Ensure full visibility and transparency across all major initiatives.

7. Process & Systems Optimization

Build, standardize, and optimize workflows, SOPs, and operational systems.

Implement tools (Asana, dashboards, trackers) and enforce usage.

Identify inefficiencies, eliminate bottlenecks, and maintain operational excellence.

8. Risk & Resource Management

Identify risks, delays, and operational gaps early.

Proactively coordinate resources and solve issues to maintain timelines.

Escalate critical issues to leadership as needed.



Ideal Candidate Must-Have

3–5+ years experience in Project/Program Management, Operations, or Executive Support.

Proven experience managing cross-functional teams and multiple priorities.

Strong execution, follow-up, and organizational skills.

Excellent communication skills (English required).



Core Strengths

Execution-driven: consistently delivers results.

Strategic thinker: prioritizes initiatives aligned with company goals.

High accountability mindset: ensures nothing slips through the cracks.

Strong communicator: able to work with executives and operational teams.

Systems-oriented: thrives on structure, tracking, and optimization.



Personality Fit

Proactive and results-oriented.

Comfortable asking tough questions and holding teams accountable.

Maintains high standards and does not accept “half-done” work.

Calm under pressure, capable of managing complexity.



Bonus Skills / Experience

Experience with Asana or similar project management tools.

Experience in e-commerce, Amazon, or product-based businesses.

Experience working with remote or international teams.

PMP, Agile, or similar certifications.



KPIs / Success Metrics

Percentage of projects delivered on time.

Cross-department alignment and communication effectiveness.

Reduction in delays and bottlenecks.

Project completion rate.

Quality of deliverables (rework reduction).

Operational efficiency improvements.

Clarity and effectiveness of executive reporting.



Why Join EVORETRO

High-impact role supporting leadership directly.

Opportunity to shape company operations and execution.

Work in a fast-growing international brand with cross-functional exposure.

title: Lead Generation and Skip Tracing Specialist

You will utilize your research skills, attention to detail, and persistence to support our sales and operations teams. Your efforts will directly contribute to our company’s success by ensuring we have a robust pipeline of qualified leads and accurate information on individuals.

Develop and implement effective lead generation strategies to meet company targets.

Requirements:

Ability to work independently and as part of a team in a fast-paced environment.

Preferred Qualifications:

What We Offer:

title: Amazon Research & Category Analyst
description:
Amazon Research & Category Analyst 





We’re looking for a data-driven and strategic Amazon Research & Category Analyst to help us identify winning products and scale our Amazon business.



This role goes beyond basic research—you will directly influence product decisions, launches, and revenue growth.



???? Role Overview



Your main goal is to identify high-potential product opportunities and turn them into profitable Amazon listings through deep research and analysis.



You will work closely with our Amazon Manager, CEO, and Product Development team to support category growth and expansion.



???? Key Responsibilities



1. Market & Keyword Research



Identify high-volume, low-competition keywords

Analyze search trends, seasonality, and demand

Build keyword strategies for new and existing products



2. Product Research & Validation



Find winning product opportunities based on data (demand, margins, trends)

Analyze product-market fit (TCG, collectibles, accessories)

Validate ideas before development



3. Competitor Analysis



Analyze top-performing ASINs (pricing, reviews, positioning, content)

Identify gaps and opportunities in the market

Benchmark against competitors



4. Category & Listing Optimization



Support category ranking and positioning strategies

Optimize listings (titles, bullet points, backend keywords)

Maintain catalog accuracy (images, variations, product data)



5. Product Opportunity Analysis



Review internal product lists and recommend improvements

Evaluate new ideas from the product team

Support product launches with data-backed insights



Requirements

Proven experience in Amazon product research / analysis

Strong understanding of Amazon SEO and ranking factors

Experience with tools like Helium 10, DataDive, Jungle Scout

Highly analytical and detail-oriented

Able to turn data into clear, actionable strategies

Experience in TCG / collectibles / hobby niche is a plus



What Success Looks Like

Consistently identifying winning products ahead of competitors

Improving rankings through strong keyword strategies

Increasing conversion rates via optimized listings

Supporting faster, smarter, and more profitable product launches



Who You’ll Work With

Reports to: Amazon Manager

Collaborates with: CEO, Product Development, Marketing Team



Why Join Us?

This is not just a research role.

???? Your work will directly impact what products we launch, how we scale, and how we grow revenue.



???? How to Apply (IMPORTANT)



To be considered, follow these steps:



Send a lionk to your resume

Include samples of product research or keyword research you’ve done

Answer this question:

“How do you identify a winning product on Amazon?”

Applications that do not follow instructions will not be prioritized.

title: Junior Systems Administrator (Client Services)
description:
We are seeking a proactive Junior Systems Administrator to help manage and maintain the IT infrastructure and business applications for our diverse group of clients. In this role, you will be responsible for ensuring that our clients' systems are secure, up-to-date, and performing optimally.



This is a dynamic MSP role where no two days are the same. You will move between different client environments, gaining hands-on experience managing various cloud setups, security protocols, and enterprise software. This is a perfect role for someone who wants to move beyond basic helpdesk support and into multi-tenant systems management.



Key Responsibilities

*Client System Administration

- Assist in the administration of core business platforms for clients (e.g., Microsoft 365, Entra ID/Active Directory, and CRM systems).

- Monitor client system health, performance, and security logs to identify and resolve potential issues proactively.

- Manage user onboarding/offboarding, permissions, and access levels across various client software platforms.

*Security & Compliance Management

- Help implement and enforce security best practices for clients, including MFA, password policies, and endpoint protection.

- Assist with software patching, updates, and system backups to ensure client data integrity and business continuity.

- Participate in basic security audits and help document compliance procedures for client environments.

*Infrastructure & Network Support

- Support the configuration and maintenance of client network devices (firewalls, switches, and Wi-Fi access points).

- Assist in managing client cloud infrastructure and virtual environments.

- Troubleshoot hardware and software issues escalated from the general support level.

*Documentation & Client Communication

- Maintain accurate records of client system configurations, hardware inventory, and software licenses.

- Create and update "How-To" guides and technical documentation for client users and internal tea
mbers.

- Provide clear, professional updates to clients regarding the status of their systems and projects.



Qualifications (Required)

*Technical Foundation: 0–3 years of experience in IT support or a related technical role (MSP experience is a major plus).

*Operating Systems: Strong familiarity with Windows 10/11 and a basic understanding of Windows Server.

*Cloud Basics: General knowledge of Microsoft 365 administration (users, groups, and licenses).

*Networking Knowledge: Understanding of basic networking concepts (TCP/IP, DNS, DHCP, VPNs).

*API Awareness: Basic understanding of how APIs work and comfort navigating technical documentation.

*Communication: Excellent verbal and written communication skills with a strong customer-service mindset.



Preferred (Nice to Have)

*Experience with virtualization (Hyper-V, VMware) or cloud platforms (Azure, AWS).

*Familiarity with security tools (Antivirus, Firewalls, MDM solutions).

*Any IT certifications (CompTIA A+, Network+, Security+, or Microsoft Fundamentals).



Why Join Us?



We believe in creating an environment where our tea
mbers can thrive both professionally and personally. Here’s what we offer:



*Career Growth: Paid certifications, training, and structured onboarding to help you advance your skills.

*Attractive Compensation: Competitive salary, performance-based incentives (monthly profit share and end-of-year bonus), and 13th-month pay.

*Health & Wellness: Monthly healthcare allowance to support your well-being.

*Work-Life Balance: 100% remote work with company-provided equipment.

*Supportive Culture: Be part of a forward-thinking team that values collaboration, innovation, and having fun while doing great work.



What Sets Us Apart?



*Performance-Based Rewards: Monthly profit sharing and bonuses for high-performing tea
mbers.

*Continuous Learning: We invest in your growth with paid certifications and training.

*Collaborative Environment: Work with a team that values your input and supports your success.

*Flexibility: Enjoy the freedom of remote work while contributing to impactful projects.



How to Apply

If you’re ready to take your IT career to the next level, we’d love to hear from you! Apply now and join a team that’s passionate about technology, growth, and delivering exceptional service.



**Submit your application and include the numbers (1989) in your subject line. This helps us ensure you’ve read the full job description.



**Please also attach your updated CV to your application or provide a link to your CV. Applications without a CV will not be considered.



**Currently looking for candidates in NCR or nearby areas of the Philippines



This is an overnight position. The working hours for this role are 8:00 AM - 5:00 PM CST Monday to Friday.



We look forward to hearing from you.

title: Part-Time VA (with Path to Full-Time) for U.S. Home Services Company — Customer Service, Job Audits, Reviews, Payroll Pr
description:
Schedule: Monday–Friday, must overlap with U.S. Central Time business hours (approximately 8:00 AM – 5:00 PM CST). Roughly 4 hours/day to start, scaling to 8 hours/day when moved to full-time.



About Us

We're Royalty Home Services, a window cleaning and home services company based in Iowa, USA. We're a small but growing team and we treat our people right. We're looking for a sharp, reliable VA to become a long-term part of our crew — not a temporary helper.



The Growth Path

This role starts part-time so we can get to know each other and make sure we're a great fit. Based on your performance over the first 60–90 days, this role is designed to grow into a full-time position with expanded responsibilities and pay. We're growing fast and we want someone who wants to grow with us.



What You'll Be Doing

This is a real role with real responsibilities. Your day-to-day will include:



1. Customer Service — Responding to customer texts,
s, and inquiries promptly and professionally. Following up on quotes and estimates. Booking and confirming appointments.

2. Daily Job Audits — Reviewing every job in our CRM (Rotor) at the end of each day. Confirming all customer info, photos, notes, and payment details are properly entered by our field crews. Flagging anything missing or incomplete.

3. Customer Reviews — Reaching out to recent customers to request Google reviews. Tracking review response rates and following up.

4. Payroll Rough Drafts — Pulling job and hours data each pay period and putting together a draft summary of employee hours and commissions for the owner to review and finalize.



Who We're Looking For



1. At least 1–2 years of VA experience (please don't apply if this is your first VA role — we don't have time to train from scratch)

2. Excellent written English — you'll be talking directly with our American customers

3. Comfortable with CRM tools (we use Rotor; experience with Jobber, Housecall Pro, or ServiceTitan is a big plus)

4. Detail-obsessed — the job audit role lives or dies on catching small mistakes

5. Reliable internet and a quiet workspace for occasional voice calls

6. Good with spreadsheets (Google Sheets) for the payroll piece

7. Self-starter who doesn't need to be micromanaged

8. Wants a long-term, full-time role (this is not for someone juggling 3 other clients)



What We Offer



-Stable long-term role with a U.S. business owner who values his team

-Clear path from part-time to full-time within 60–90 days for the right person

-13th month bonus after 6 months

-Paid Philippine holidays after probation

-Performance-based raises every 6 months

-Real responsibility and growth as we expand



How to Apply



1. Start your message with the word "WINDOWS" so I know you read this fully.

2. Tell me about a time you caught a mistake in someone's data or notes that saved your last employer money or a headache.

3. List any CRMs or job management tools you've used.

4. Send a 1–2 minute Loom or voice recording introducing yourself in English (this is required — we need to hear your spoken English).

5. Tell me what time zone you'd be working from and confirm you can work 8 AM – 5 PM CST overlap.

6. Confirm you're open to growing into a full-time role within 60–90 days.



Looking forward to meeting our next tea
mber.

— Lance

description:

Account Manager

Greetings from Local Visibility - your future workplace filled with positivity and endless possibilities! We are seeking talented account managers to join our dynamic team!

Local Visibility is a growing digital marketing agency specializing in lead generation for home improvement and service companies in the US and Canada. We have been in business for 14 years and take pride in providing high-quality services.

As an account manager, you are responsible for managing the relationships with clients. They must speak English fluently without an accent. Additionally, the candidate must be presentable, as this is a client-facing role, and should have a strong background working with American clients.

title: Short Form Video Editor for INSTAGRAM (Reels)
description:
Job Title



Full Time Short Form Video Editor (Reels) With Film B Roll Sourcing



Overview



We are hiring a full time editor to produce high performing short form reels built around our talking head recordings, with B roll sourced from well known movies that visually match the story, emotion, and meaning of the script. This is not a basic cutting job. The output must match a specific pacing, caption style, and overall “feel” that we will provide via a reference video.



What You Will Edit



You will receive a raw recording of our founder speaking to camera. Your job is to turn that into a finished reel by layering in movie B roll that reinforces the message, then adding our captions in a very specific, consistent style.



Output Expectations



You will deliver a 60 reels per month if working full time - 30 for part time



Core Responsibilities



You will source B roll clips from famous movies that match the script meaning, tone, and emotion, and you will build a clean, fast paced narrative with strong retention. You will edit and time captions exactly as provided, using our required caption style with zero deviations. You will assemble the final reel in 9:16 format with correct pacing, sound design, and overall polish. You will maintain an organised B roll library so sourcing becomes faster over time and we are not re finding the same types of scenes repeatedly. You will deliver consistently and communicate clearly on progress, questions, and revisions.



Required Skills



You must be a strong short form editor with proven reels or TikTok work. You must be excellent at storytelling through B roll selection, not just transitions. You must be highly detail oriented because caption formatting and timing must match our reference exactly. You must work fast without quality drop and be able to hit volume targets. You must be fluent in English and able to interpret script meaning and emotion accurately. You must have strong organisation habits for file naming, folders, and project management.



Software



Premiere Pro, Final Cut, or CapCut is fine as long as you can match the reference output consistently and export correctly for Instagram Reels.



How To Apply



Send 1 portfolio link that shows short form edits similar to this style. Include 1 to 2 sentences confirming you can source movie style B roll to match a script, and that you can replicate caption style precisely. If you are shortlisted, we will ask you to complete a paid test edit using our raw clip and the reference video.



Compensation



Competitive and based on experience, speed, and quality. This is a full time role with long term potential if you consistently hit the quality bar and monthly output.



Reference Video



We will attach a reference video in the job post. Your work must match that style. Please watch a few times to understand

title: Personal & Business Finance Assistant Needed

Long-term preferred

Start with a few hours per week and grow as business grows

title: Remote Salesforce Admin

mbers to improve CRM adoption and data quality

 tools, or web forms

title: Revenue Cycle Operations Associate
description:
INCLUDE LINK TO YOUR CV



Job Overview



We are seeking a high-level Revenue Cycle Strategist & Consultant who can go beyond basic billing and step into a true operator role. This is for someone who understands how a U.S. healthcare practice makes money—and can diagnose, fix, and optimize the entire revenue cycle from end to end.



You will work directly with leadership to assess real clinic environments, uncover inefficiencies, and implement systems that improve cash flow, collections, and operational performance. This role also involves training and guiding virtual assistants, with the potential to grow into a leadership position overseeing a full revenue cycle function.



What You’ll Do



Revenue Cycle Audit & Strategy



Conduct end-to-end audits of clinic revenue cycles (intake ? billing ? collections)

Identify bottlenecks, inefficiencies, and missed revenue opportunities

Clearly explain issues, root causes, and actionable solutions



Optimization & Execution



Clean up aging accounts receivable (AR) and resolve denials

Improve billing accuracy, turnaround time, and reimbursement cycles

Fix front-end issues (insurance verification, authorizations, intake errors)

Implement strategies to improve overall collections and cash flow



Systems & Process Building



Design and standardize repeatable workflows and SOPs

Map out scalable processes across the full revenue cycle

Build structured systems that can be replicated across multiple clinics



Training & Team Development



Train and mentor VAs on billing, verification, authorizations, and AR follow-up

Break down complex workflows into simple, teachable steps

Help maintain performance standards and accountability



Client-Facing Consulting



Communicate directly with clinic owners and stakeholders

Lead discussions, ask insightful questions, and provide recommendations

Operate with confidence as a trusted advisor on revenue cycle performance

Qualifications



Required:



3–7+ years of experience in U.S. healthcare revenue cycle management

Hands-on experience with:

Insurance verification and authorizations

Medical billing (CPT, ICD-10)

Payment posting and AR follow-up

Denials and collections management

Experience working with Medicare, Medicaid, and commercial payers

Familiarity with clearinghouses (e.g., Office Ally, Change Healthcare) and EMRs (e.g., WebPT, Athena, Kareo)

Strong analytical thinking and problem-solving ability



Strongly Preferred:



Experience leading or supervising a billing team

Proven track record improving collections or reducing AR days

Experience rebuilding or optimizing a broken billing system

Background in PT, OT, Speech Therapy, or Chiropractic practices

Ideal Candidate

Thinks like an owner, not just a task-doer

Highly detail-oriented and process-driven

Proactive and able to work independently without constant direction

Strong communicator with confidence in client-facing settings

Calm under pressure and solutions-focused

Ambitious and interested in growing into a leadership role

Growth Opportunity



This role is designed to evolve into:



Lead Revenue Cycle Consultant for multiple clients

Trainer and mentor for a team of Revenue Cycle VAs

Builder of standardized systems across clinics

Potential leader of a dedicated Revenue Cycle Division

Compensation

Competitive hourly rate based on experience and expertise

Opportunity for expanded role and increased responsibility over time

 & Instagram)

title: Facebook Ads Specialist (Amazon & Shopify Focus)
description:
We are looking for a high-level
 Ads Specialist who 
’t just "run ads," but understands the intricate plumbing of cross-platform attribution. If you know how to navigate the "black box" of Amazon traffic and bridge the gap between Meta and Marketplace sales, we want to talk to you.



Your primary mission will be to drive high-intent traffic to our Amazon listings and Shopify store while ensuring we capture as much data as possible for retargeting and optimization.



Key Responsibilities

Full-Funnel Meta Management: Strategy, setup, and scaling of
/Instagram ad campaigns focused on ROAS and conversion.



The "Amazon Connection": Utilize Amazon Attribution to track off-Amazon traffic and bridge the data gap.



Pixel & API Integration: Implement and manage the Meta Pixel and Conversions API (CAPI) on Shopify, and use tools (like Attribution tags or specialized landing pages) to simulate "pixel" tracking for Amazon sales.



A/B Testing: Constantly iterate on creative, copy, and landing page environments to lower CAC.



Reporting: Provide weekly insights on spend, attributed sales, and organic ranking lift on Amazon.



What We’re Looking For

Proven Amazon-to-Meta Experience: You understand the nuances of driving external traffic to Amazon (landing pages vs. direct-to-listing) and how it affects the "A9" ranking algorithm.



Shopify Mastery: Deep knowledge of the Shopify-Meta ecosystem, including catalog syncs and Advantage+ campaigns.



Technical Savvy: You know how to set up tracking in a post-iOS14 world. You should be familiar with creating "super URLs" or using intermediate landing pages to capture data before the user hits Amazon.



Results-Oriented: You speak in terms of ROAS, MER (Marketing Efficiency Ratio), and TACOS, not just "clicks" and "likes."



Requirements

2+ years of dedicated experience managing Meta Ads for E-commerce brands.

Demonstrated success in managing monthly budgets of $10k+.

Expertise in Amazon Attribution and the Amazon Brand Registry ecosystem.

Ability to craft compelling ad copy and provide creative direction for high-converting visuals.



How to Apply

If you have the skills to scale our brand across both Shopify and Amazon, please follow the instructions below carefully:



Send your applications  to  
 Line: FB Ads Specialist - [Your Full Name]

 attachment: 



1. Cover Letter

2.  Resume

3.  Portfolio (case studies preferred),

4. A brief Video Introduction.

5. Current Rate per Hour / Month

6. Are you comfortable using time tracker?

7. Are you fine to work in EST hours? 



Note: Any applications submitted through OLJ platform will not be entertained. Please
 the address above directly to be considered for the role.

title: Financial Analyst
description:
We help Americans buy profitable businesses so they can build real wealth and escape the corporate 9–5 grind. We're a fast-growing, detail-driven remote team that values ownership and execution.



Our core values are Team-First Performance, Perfect Professionalism, and Mastery Through Feedback. We move with urgency, hold high standards, and improve continuously.



As a Closing Analyst, you own the final mile of execution. You manage documentation, lender coordination, compliance reviews, and deadlines to ensure deals move from signed offers to close without friction. This isn’t administrative follow-up. It’s precision, accountability, and protecting the integrity of every transaction.



About the Role



We’re looking for a sharp, proactive analyst to drive execution from signed LOI to close. You’ll oversee closing workflows, handle documentation quality control, manage lender and legal communication, and step in across diligence, underwriting, and final approvals to keep deals moving. You don’t wait for issues to escalate. You identify blockers early and push transactions across the finish line.



Results / Success Metrics

Deals submitted accurately and on time, consistently meeting SLAs

Clean, audit-ready documentation and deal folders

Clear, proactive communication with lenders and internal teams

Minimal rework due to documentation or compliance issues

Timely resolution of risks, blockers, or process gaps





Responsibilities

Coordinate deal closings, managing documentation, tracking lender requirements, and ensuring submission readiness

Monitor and prioritize lender, legal, and financial communications; address inquiries and resolve documentation gaps

Track and manage critical deal deadlines using shared timelines to ensure timely approvals and responses

Maintain organized and compliant deal folders in Google Drive and Notion, including proper file naming, version control, and retention standards

Conduct compliance reviews of active SBA 7(a) loan packages against SBA and lender guidelines

Update financial models, reconcile P&Ls and balance sheets, and finalize projections as needed

Lead deal kick-off calls and lender intro calls independently after onboarding

Own daily cadence calls and ongoing deal-related communications

Proactively flag risks, challenges, and process improvement opportunities to improve deal execution efficiency



Requirements

1+ year of related experience in lending operations, M&A, or deal execution

Strong attention to detail and organizational skills

Ability to manage multiple deals simultaneously in a fast-paced environment

Clear, professional written and verbal communication

Financial literacy with P&Ls, balance sheets, and projections

Experience with loan documentation, SBA 7(a), or lending operations preferred

Proficient with Google Workspace and documentation tools

Comfortable working independently and taking full ownership of assigned deals



Nice to Have

Experience with Notion, Slack, Google Calendar, or other collaboration tools

Background in startups or fast-growing teams



Why Join Us

Fully remote work setup

Collaborative and supportive team environment

Opportunity to grow with a scaling organization

Meaningful impact on deal execution and building strong teams

description:

Our core values are Team-First Performance, Perfect Professionalism, and Mastery Through Feedback. We win as a team, communicate clearly and professionally, and constantly improve through honest, direct feedback.



As Assistant Deal Manager, you keep the entire deal pipeline moving. You manage communications, watch the CRM like a hawk, audit SLAs, chase follow-ups, and make sure brokers and sellers stay happy and engaged. You work hand-in-hand with the Deal Manager, Communications Team, and Seller Call Coordinators so nothing falls through the cracks. This isn't just admin—it's about building trust, enforcing discipline, and creating speed in a high-volume environment.
