title: Human Resources Manager / Talent & People Operations
description:
Location: Remote (U.S. Hours Required)

Reports To: CEO / Leadership Team



Company Overview

We are a growth-focused organization operating across real estate development, distribution, and commercial operations. As we continue to scale, we are building out a strong internal team and are seeking a dedicated Human Resources Manager to lead hiring, employee management, and HR operations.



Position Summary

The Human Resources Manager will be responsible for full-cycle recruiting, employee lifecycle management, and HR operations across the organization.

This role will play a critical part in building the company’s team by leading talent acquisition, developing HR processes, and supporting employee growth and performance.



Key Responsibilities



Talent Acquisition & Recruiting

- Lead full-cycle recruitment, including sourcing, screening, and hiring

- Conduct headhunting and proactive candidate outreach

- Create and manage job postings across recruiting platforms

- Develop, review, and update job descriptions

- Set up and manage company accounts on recruiting platforms

- Monitor applications and maintain candidate pipelines

- Screen candidates and assist in shortlisting

- Coordinate with hiring managers and schedule interviews

- Develop standardized interview formats and evaluation criteria

- Draft and communicate offer letters



Employee Onboarding & Experience

- Manage onboarding process for new hires

- Conduct employee orientation

- Prepare onboarding materials and documentation

- Communicate company policies and expectations



HR Operations & Administration

- Develop and maintain HR policies and procedures

- Ensure compliance with labor laws and regulations

- Maintain employee records and documentation



Compensation, Payroll & Benefits

- Assist in compensation management

- Oversee payroll coordination, deductions, and taxes

- Ensure timely payroll processing

- Support benefits administration



Performance Management & Development

- Coordinate performance reviews

- Work with leadership on evaluations

- Track employee performance and development goals



Training & Development

- Coordinate training programs

- Identify skill-building and development opportunities

- Support continuing education initiatives



Employee Relations & Communication

- Serve as point of contact for employee concerns

- Draft and distribute company communications and memos

- Promote a positive workplace environment



Qualifications

- 5+ years of HR or recruiting experience

- Strong communication and organizational skills

- Ability to multitask and manage priorities

- High attention to detail and professionalism



What We Offer

- Competitive compensation

- Remote work environment (U.S. hours required)

- Opportunity to build HR systems and processes

- Direct collaboration with leadership

- Growth opportunities



Application Instructions

Please include a brief voice or video introduction with your application.

title: Social Media Strategist & Content Manager
description:
About Funnel Digital Marketing



Funnel Digital Marketing is a performance marketing agency that brings Fortune 500-level expertise to small and medium-sized businesses. We specialize in paid search, SEO, programmatic advertising, and social media, and we are known for being data-driven, transparent, and genuinely invested in our clients' success. While large agencies reserve their best talent for their biggest accounts, we give every client access to senior-level strategy and execution from day one.



The agency was founded in 2018 and is led by Kenneth Hamner, who has 20 years of experience in digital marketing. Today, Funnel works with clients across a range of industries, delivering measurable results through strategies that are grounded in data and built around each client's specific goals. The agency is growing, and this role is a key part of scaling our lead generation efforts.



The Opportunity



We are looking for a Social Media Strategist & Content Manager who can plan, create, and manage content consistently.

This is a hands-on role. You will be responsible for writing posts, creating simple graphics, and maintaining a consistent presence across our social platforms.

This is not just a “post and forget” role; you should understand what makes content effective and be able to improve it over time.



What You Will Do



Social Media Management & Posting

Manage Funnel’s social media accounts (primarily 
 and
)

Schedule and publish posts consistently

Maintain a content calendar and posting cadence

Ensure content is aligned with brand voice and positioning



Content Creation (Writing + Graphics)

Write social media posts based on briefs, ideas, or raw input

Turn notes, voice ideas, or documents into structured content

Create simple, clean graphics using Canva (or similar tools)

Ensure visuals are consistent with brand style and messaging

Repurpose blogs, decks, and existing materials into posts



Content Strategy Support

Suggest ideas for improving content performance

Help identify what types of content work best

Contribute to improving overall content direction



Engagement & Community

Monitor comments and messages

Respond or flag important interactions

Support basic community engagement



Performance Tracking

Track basic metrics (engagement, consistency, reach)

Identify what is working and suggest improvements



What We Are Looking For



Required

Experience managing social media accounts

Strong writing skills (clear, simple, and structured)

Strong graphic design ability (Canva or similar)

Organized and consistent with execution

Able to work independently without constant supervision



Preferred

Experience with LinkedIn content

Experience creating branded social media visuals

Experience working with agencies or multiple brands



What Success Looks Like



Success in this role is defined by consistency, quality, and reliability.

Content is posted consistently and on schedule, with both writing and visuals aligned to the brand.

Graphics are clean, simple, and professional — not overly designed, but clear and effective.

You are organized, proactive, and able to manage your workload without needing constant follow-up.

Over time, content becomes more structured, more engaging, and more aligned with the agency’s positioning.



Compensation & Setup



This is a contract-based, part-time role.

Time Commitment:

~3 hours per day, Monday to Friday (approximately 15 hours per week)

Work is structured and manageable with clear direction.

Compensation:

$300 USD per month

Work Style: Fully remote, async

Tools: Slack, Google Docs/Drive, Canva



This role is ideal for someone who wants to:

Build experience managing a real agency brand

Improve both content and design skills

Work in a structured and consistent environment

Strong performers may be given more responsibility and increased compensation over time.



How to Apply



When applying through OnlineJobs.ph, please assign at least 10 points to your application.

Applications with fewer than 10 points will not be reviewed.



Include:

A short summary of your experience

Examples of posts and graphics you have created

Portfolio, samples, or screenshots of your work



Final Step (Required)

Answer this question in your application:

If you were managing Funnel’s LinkedIn starting next week, what types of content would you post in the first 2–3 weeks?

title: Framer Specialist
description:
We’re looking for a talented Framer Specialist to join our growing team, working across a mix of creative and high-impact digital projects.



About Us

We’re an Australian-based digital growth agency specialising in web design and online presence for clients across a range of industries. Alongside this, we run a fast-growing digital invitation brand, where the majority of your work will take place — creating elegant, high-end, and visually engaging experiences.



About the Role

This role is ideal for someone who is highly creative, detail-oriented, and confident working independently. You’ll be bringing designs to life in Framer, contributing ideas, and helping elevate the overall user experience across our projects.



This is not just a UI/UX role — we’re looking for someone who thinks beyond standard layouts. You should be comfortable pushing creative boundaries, customising visuals using different tools, and confidently integrating various platforms into your builds.



What We’re Looking For



* Strong expertise in Framer (essential)

* A portfolio of previous work to showcase your design and build capabilities

* Experience with Tally and/or Softr (or a strong willingness to learn)

* Ability to think outside the box and bring creative ideas to life

* Confidence working with and integrating different tools and applications into Framer such as; Figma

* Strong communication skills and reliability

* A proactive mindset — someone who takes initiative and ownership

* Trustworthy, organised, and able to manage their time effectively

* Flexible with working hours and availability

* Committed and dedicated to delivering high-quality work



What You’ll Be Doing



* Designing and building websites and digital experiences in Framer

* Customising visuals using a variety of tools to elevate the end product

* Integrating external tools and platforms into Framer builds

* Working across both client projects and our digital invitation platform

* Researching, learning, and experimenting with new tools to continuously improve the product

* Collaborating with our team on concepts, layouts, and user journeys



Why Join Us



* Flexible working hours

* Variety of creative projects across different industries

* Opportunity to grow with a fast-moving digital brand

* A collaborative and supportive working environment

title: Amazon Listing & AI Integration Specialist
description:
***Very important: Do take note that the applicant is required to share their updated CV with appropriate access. Applicants who are non compliant with this will be automatically ignored.***



We are seeking a meticulous, data-driven Amazon Listing Specialist who leverages cutting-edge technology to scale brand performance. The ideal candidate is an expert in the Amazon ecosystem and an early adopter of AI-driven workflows. You will navigate complex technical workflows, manage account health, and use AI to optimize asset management and PDF editing.



Key Responsibilities:

1. Technical Platform & AI Integration

• Create new product listings (ASINs) from scratch in Seller Central while ensuring full data and compliance accuracy.

• Manage bulk data uploads and complex template transformations using flat files.

• Use AI tools to streamline the creation and editing of product documentation and PDF assets, ensuring professional-grade formatting.

• Troubleshoot and resolve complex Parent/Child variation issues to ensure a seamless customer experience.

2. Account Health (AHR) & Crisis Management

• Monitor and maintain the Account Health Rating (AHR) by independently resolving "High Severity" policy violations, such as restricted claims or image issues.

• Diagnose and fix sudden drops in organic ranking or sales using a structured, data-driven approach.

• Swiftly resolve suppressed ASINs to minimize revenue loss.

• Develop an immediate action plan for compliance warnings to protect the store's standing without outside help.

3. Content Optimization & SEO

• Develop sophisticated keyword strategies across Titles, Bullet Points, and Backend Search Terms to maximize visibility.

• Write high-converting copy that balances aggressive SEO with human readability.

• Design and implement A+ Content (Enhanced Brand Content) to drive significant sales lifts.

• Analyze low Conversion Rates (CR) and implement critical content changes to improve performance.

4. Quality Control & Prioritization

• Maintain a meticulous personal checklist to ensure 100?curacy in product data before publishing.

• Manage a high-volume queue, prioritizing tasks such as fixing suppressed ASINs over new listing creation when necessary to protect the bottom line.



Required Qualifications & Skills

• Amazon Expertise: Expert-level proficiency in Amazon Seller Central, inventory flat files, and variation logic.

• AI & Technical Skill: Proven experience using AI tools for content generation and PDF editing/manipulation.

• Policy Knowledge: Deep understanding of Amazon compliance to maintain a strong Account Health Rating.

• Strategic SEO: Advanced knowledge of Amazon’s search algorithm and keyword placement.

• Meticulous Execution: A highly reliable work ethic with a focus on precision to avoid costly data mistakes.



***Very important: Do take note that the applicant is required to share their updated CV with appropriate access. Applicants who are non compliant with this will be automatically ignored.***

title: Experienced SMM and Video Editor 4-5+ years experience
description:
JSK Advisory is a fast-growing marketing and automation agency helping professional service firms, eCommerce brands, and local service businesses scale using modern marketing systems. We are a startup but growing fast and are looking for an experienced and proactive person to join our social media and creative editing team. This is a fantastic opportunity to work with national brands across ecommerce and professional services and the right person will have long term career development opportunites. We're also based in Sydney Australia with only a 3 hour timezone difference from the Philippines, allowing you to work daytime hours (no graveyard shift!).



This role is focused on creating high-quality short-form content and ad creatives for
 and Instagram across our agency account, eCommerce brand and professional service clients. You will edit raw footage and voiceovers into polished videos, develop strong hooks for organic and paid content, add captions, on-screen text, graphics, and transitions, and ensure consistent visual quality and branding across all accounts. You will be fully managing the organic social media for our ecommerce brand 
 and tasked with growing views and engagement. You need to show examples of similar
 ad videos that you've edited in the past using the latest captioning styles. You must be able to use VEED and Higgs field or create videos that look similar. 



Copywriting is also an important part of this role. You will write clear, professional social media captions with strong hooks and calls to action, create visually engaging and scroll-stopping posts, and use AI tools such as ChatGPT to support ideation, repurposing, and content refinement. You will apply storytelling and direct-response principles appropriate for professional services and eCommerce audiences.



To be considered for this role, you must have at least four years of experience in video editing, graphics design and social media management creation. Experience working with professional service firms and eCommerce brands is a bonus. You should be proactive, detail-oriented, and comfortable managing creative work across multiple brands. You must have experience using Higgs field and VEED all platforms that can generate similar output. Especially
 ad videos that look professional and use professional captioning. 



As JSK Advisory continues to grow, this role offers clear long-term career pathways into
 Ads management and senior creative or account management positions. Salary is $800-$1100pm based on experience and skills.



To apply, please provide your cover letter, resume, portfolio, Words Per Minute typing speed (
/student/tests). Also include a one-minute video introducing yourself, outlining your experience, and explaining why you would be a good fit for the role. You must include the videos you have edited in the past.

title: Junior Automation Specialist
description:
Who is Bare?

Bare is the new way to funeral. We are a holistic end of life care provider, allowing our families to grieve in their own way, at their own pace, knowing their loved one is cared for by a team who truly understand their needs.



By combining empathy with technology, we’re creating end-of-life experiences that are simple, personalized and affordable. In only five years, we’ve served more than 30,000 families, have become Australia’s most awarded end-of-life provider (with awards in customer service, innovation and digital disruption), and have built a team of more than 100 people committed to changing the way Australians deal with end-of-life. And we’re just getting started.



We’re looking for a passionate and detail-oriented Junior Automation Specialist to join our high-performing remote team. If you're a proactive professional who thrives on ownership, continuous improvement, and meaningful work, we’d love to meet you.



The Junior Automation Specialist works alongside with our current Automation Specialist to build, maintain, and document automations that run Bare Group's finance operations. The role is hands-on technical from day one, with growing autonomy as trust and skill build. Reports to Automation Specialist. Day-to-day collaboration with finance tea
mbers in Slack



Primary responsibilities: 

-Build small-to-medium automations end-to-end under Automation Specialist's direction. 
 scenarios, Google Apps Script, occasional Python — typically 4-12 hours per build.

-Maintain existing automations. Investigate and fix breaks, rate-limit issues, schema changes, expired auth tokens. ~30% of weekly time.

-Write and maintain SOPs. Every live automation needs a written runbook — what it does, how to fix it if broken, who to escalate to.

-Document new builds. Each new automation ships with a build guide so it's not Automation Specialist's knowledge.

-Respond to finance team Slack queries. Automation Specialist still owns the strategic conversations; junior handles routine tactical follow-ups.

-Attend weekly Monday call 

-Co-prepare weekly FinOps live teaching sessions with Automation Specialist.



Must-haves:

-1-3 years of professional experience in automation, low-code platforms, or technical support roles.

-Strong working knowledge of at least one no-code/low-code platform: 
 (preferred), Zapier, n8n, Power Automate.

-Comfortable reading and writing JavaScript or Python at intermediate level — enough to read API documentation and write a script that fetches/transforms/posts data.

-Comfortable with Google Workspace (Sheets formulas, Apps Script, Drive permissions).

-Comfortable reading and consuming REST API documentation (HTTP requests, JSON, OAuth basics).

-Strong written English — Slack, documentation, build guides. Verbal English to a level where they can present in a teaching session.

-Detail-oriented mindset. The work is failure-mode intolerant — a $0.01 invoice rounding error or a wrong AccountCode causes real downstream pain.

-Self-managed and remote-ready. Will be working Manila hours collaborating with Australia-based finance team across timezone overlap.



Strong nice-to-haves:

-Direct experience with Xero API, HubSpot API, or Stripe API.

-Direct experience with 
 (over Zapier).

-Experience writing technical SOPs or runbooks.

-Experience using Claude, ChatGPT, or other AI tools as a working partner (not just for chat).

-Familiarity with funeral, healthcare, or other process-heavy industries (though not required).

-Background in finance operations, accounting, or accounts payable is a bonus but not essential.



Please send your resume with your application.

title: Paid Social Media Buyer (Meta/Google Ads)
description:
Do you live and breathe Meta Ads and Google Ads? Australia's leading fitness agency wants YOU to run the show.



ABOUT FITFAM

Fitfam is Australia's leading fitness creative and performance agency, based in Perth, WA. We work exclusively with fitness brands — gyms, studios, and ecommerce — running paid media on Meta and Google Ads. Our clients include some of Australia's most recognised fitness brands with 10+ active accounts across the country.

We're a small, tight-knit team. We move fast, we care about results, and we hold a high standard. The person in this role will work directly with our Founder and MD, and will be trusted to own paid advertising from day one.



JOB DESCRIPTION

We're looking for a full-time Paid Social Media Buyer to take complete ownership of our client ad accounts on Meta and Google Ads. This is not a support role — you'll be the person running the accounts, making decisions, managing budgets, testing creatives, and reporting results to clients.



YOUR DAILY RESPONSIBILITIES



Send a daily report detailing completed tasks, account status, and any flags across all active accounts.

Manage budgets, pacing, bid adjustments, and audience management across Meta Ads and Google Ads for 10+ active fitness clients.

Build and send weekly performance reports — pulling data, surfacing insights, and communicating clearly what's working and what isn't.

Brief the creative team on what's needed based on ad performance data, and run structured A/B tests to improve results.

Respond directly to client questions about their campaign performance with confidence and clarity.

Build monthly performance reports for all active accounts.





REQUIRED SKILLS AND EXPERIENCE

To qualify for this role, you will need proven experience in the following:



Meta Ads 
/Instagram) — campaign setup, optimisation, audience targeting, creative testing

Google Ads — search and/or Performance Max campaigns

Performance reporting — you can pull data, interpret it, and communicate results clearly



Important: We don't care where you worked. Show us your numbers. CPLs, ROAS, spend managed, results delivered. That's what gets you hired.



SOFT SKILLS

We work in a fast-moving industry with real client budgets on the line. You'll thrive here if you are:



Data-driven and decisive — you read numbers fast and act on them

A strong communicator — clients will hear from you directly

Self-managed — you don't need to be told what to check every morning

Calm under pressure — accounts don't always behave, and we need someone who troubleshoots fast

Someone who takes ownership — you treat these accounts like they're your own





DESIRED (BONUS) SKILLS

These aren't required to get hired, but they'll give you an edge:



- Experience with fitness or gym brands

- Familiarity with AI, Adspirer or similar performance reporting tools

- Experience with HighLevel (GHL) CRM



WORK SCHEDULE

This is a full-time position (40 hours/week), Monday to Friday. Hours are flexible — we care about outcomes, not clock-watching. You'll need to be available for a weekly check-in call with our Founder.

After completing a 3-month probation period, you'll qualify for:



5 paid vacation days per year

3 paid sick days per year

We observe most Philippine public holidays





SALARY

AUD $2,500/month (approximately USD $1,600/month) for full-time work (40 hours/week)



PERKS AND BENEFITS

Once you complete your 3-month probation period, you will receive:



13th month bonus

Performance review and salary increase opportunity at the 6-month mark

Cash equivalent for unused leave days





TRAININGS PROVIDED

You'll be onboarded into Fitfam's systems, reporting tools (Adspirer), and client account structure. We'll provide full context on each client's history, targets, and creative assets so you can hit the ground running.



CAREER POTENTIAL

You'll work directly with our Founder and MD. As Fitfam grows and takes on new clients, this role has a clear path to Head of Performance — overseeing a small team of media buyers and owning the performance function of the business.



HOW TO APPLY

Put "Fitfa
dia Buyer Ready" in the subject heading — applications without this will not be considered.

In your application, include:



A brief introduction — who you are and why this role is right for you

At least 2-3 specific campaign results — tell us the platform, the objective, what you spent, and the result (CPL, ROAS, lead volume). Numbers only. No vague descriptions.

Your total years of experience with Meta Ads and Google Ads

Any tools you're currently using (Adspirer, Meta Business Suite, Google Ads Editor, etc.)



We read every application that follows these instructions. We don't read the ones that don't.



Fitfam Group Pty Ltd | Perth, WA, Australia | "Tell Epic Stories."

title: Store Manager Shopify
description:
# Store Manager



Remote | Fashion eCommerce & Dropshipping | Part-time / Full-time Growth Opportunity



---



We run a fast-growing fashion dropshipping store and are looking for an experienced and reliable **Store Manager** to help manage the day-to-day operations of the business.



Right now, the company is growing fast and we need someone who is ready to step in immediately, bring structure, improve systems, and fix operational problems before they become bigger issues. This is not a passive role — we need someone who can take ownership, spot inefficiencies, and help build a more organized and scalable operation.



This role is for someone who understands how fashion eCommerce works behind the scenes — customer support, supplier communication, refunds, disputes, order management, and keeping operations running smoothly at scale.



You will work directly with the founders and play a major role in helping us build and improve our systems as the business grows.



---



## Growth Opportunity



We are looking for someone long-term.



This starts as a core operations role, but the right person can grow into a full Operations Manager position as the company scales. We value people who take ownership, improve systems, and solve problems without needing constant supervision.



---



## What We're Looking For



You’ve worked in eCommerce before — ideally in fashion dropshipping — and understand the common issues that come with it: supplier delays, long shipping times, refunds, disputes, angry customers, and operational pressure.



You know how to stay organized, communicate professionally, and keep everything under control even during busy periods.



• Experience managing Shopify stores

• Experience using Whop and Whop Payments

• Ability to process refunds, disputes, cancellations, and payment-related issues inside Whop

• Experience managing customer support and handling difficult customer situations

• Experience communicating with suppliers regarding fulfillment, delays, and inventory

• Comfortable using Slack for daily communication and team coordination

• Strong written English with professional communication skills

• Organized, detail-oriented, and proactive

• Able to work independently and solve problems quickly

• Someone who can improve structure, workflows, and operational systems instead of only following tasks

• Must be active and available during supplier working hours/timezones (primarily China) to ensure fast communication and issue resolution



Spoken English is a plus.



---



## Tools You'll Use



• Shopify

• Whop

• Slack

• Gmail / customer support systems



---



## What You'll Do



• Manage day-to-day store operations

• Handle customer support inquiries, refunds, tracking issues, and complaints

• Process refunds and payment issues through Whop Payments

• Manage subscriptions, customer access, and orders inside Whop

• Communicate with suppliers about order fulfillment and shipping updates

• Coordinate with suppliers during China business hours for faster operations and problem-solving

• Identify operational problems and help create better systems and workflows

• Improve organization, structure, and efficiency inside the business

• Track operational issues and help improve workflows and SOPs

• Maintain fast and professional communication with both customers and tea
mbers

• Stay active and reachable on Slack during working hours and join team calls when needed



---



## What We Offer



• Flexible remote work

• Long-term growth opportunity inside a fast-growing eCommerce brand

• Direct communication with the founder

• Competitive pay based on experience

• Opportunity to grow into a higher-level management role over time



---



## Requirements



• Previous experience in Shopify eCommerce operations

• Previous experience using Whop is strongly preferred

• Comfortable using Slack daily for communication and updates

• Available consistently and reliable during working hours

• Able to work around supplier timezones when needed

• Not currently overloaded with other full-time commitments

• Able to start relatively soon

• Self-motivated and proactive



---



## How To Apply



Send us a short message explaining:



• Your experience with Shopify stores

• Your experience with Whop and handling refunds/disputes

• What type of eCommerce brands you worked with

• Why you think you would be a good fit for this role



One small thing before you apply:



Most applicants copy-paste the same message everywhere. Attention to detail matters a lot in this role, so we added a small test.



If you actually read the full job post, start your application title with your favourite clothing brand.



Applications without this will be ignored.



---



*mathiwos Founder*

title: 3D Animator
description:
We need someone who can create dynamic, and exciting  3D animations.



MAIN RESPONSIBILITIES:

- Creating 3D Logo animations & making color changes to existing animation files (the pay is $100 per logo animation and $150 per color change package). 

- Conceptualize ideas for characters, scenes, backgrounds and other animation elements.

- Design backgrounds, sets and other elements of the animated environment.

- Create character sketches for new animations based on design briefs then develop storyboards for animation projects.

- Create 3D animated logos with different backgrounds (Sample: 2 logos with 3 different background each).

- These will be exported as MP4s and utilized on a large display screen.

- The artist will be provided with preexisting vector logo files, and original after-effect design files of previous animations for reference.

title: Customer Support Specialist
description:
**Let’s be very clear: we’re not looking for someone who just answers
s and calls.**



We’re looking for someone who genuinely cares about people, takes pride in helping others, and is open to learning new things every day.



We are a growing women’s wellness company helping thousands of women with intimate health concerns. Many customers come to us frustrated, embarrassed, or after years of struggling. Your role is to make them feel supported, heard, and cared for.



### This role is for someone who:



* Replies with urgency and empathy

* Is extremely accountable

* Loves solving problems

* Notices details others miss

* Learns quickly

* Takes ownership instead of making excuses

* Can work independently

* Wants to grow with a small company



### This role is NOT for someone who:



* Needs constant supervision

* Gets overwhelmed by a fast-paced environment

* Avoids responsibility

* Sends robotic replies or relies on AI to do the thinking

* Wants a low-effort remote job



### You would be responsible for:



* Answering
s, phone calls, and customer support requests

* Helping customers with orders, subscriptions, shipping, and product questions

* Reassigning medical questions to our medical team when needed

* Identifying recurring problems and helping improve systems

* Learning about our products and the conditions we support

* Taking on new responsibilities as the company grows



### Important:



This role is **not static**. Things change, improve, and evolve. We are looking for someone excited to grow, learn, and adapt. If you want a job that repeats the same tasks every day and never changes, this role is not for you.



### To apply, follow these instructions carefully:



1. Send your resume

2. Send a 2-minute Loom video introducing yourself to 

3. Use the subject line: **I CARE ABOUT PEOPLE**

4. In your video, tell us about a time you solved a difficult problem for someone



Please be creative. We value originality, heart, and out-of-the-box thinking.

title: YouTube Thumbnail Artist
description:
==============================

YouTube Thumbnail Artist Application

==============================



We’re looking for a visual storyteller who knows how to stop the scroll.

The "Living in Charlotte" team is growing, and we need a designer who understands that a thumbnail isn't just a "pretty picture"—it’s the front door to our business. We’re looking for someone who obsesses over click-through rates (CTR), understands human psychology, and can turn a real estate topic into a "must-click" visual.



If you’re the type of person who spends your free time analyzing why certain creators dominate the homepage, we want to talk to you.





IMPORTANT: Please read this entire listing. We’re big on the details here. The final step of our process involves a portfolio review and a reference check from a former client or team lead.



==============

ABOUT THE TEAM

===============





We operate like a fast-paced startup. We’re high-energy, high-standard, and we care deeply about the people we serve. If you have a growth mindset and love seeing your work directly impact a channel's success, you’ll fit right in.



What’s it like here? Check out this video to meet the crew. 



=============

Our Core Values:

=============



Delight the Client: We go beyond "good enough" to create visual 
nts that stick.



Master Your Craft: You aren't just using templates. You’re staying ahead of design trends and YouTube's ever-changing algorithm.



Follow Through, Always: Deadlines matter. When a video is ready to go live, the thumbnail needs to be ready to perform.





==========

ABOUT YOU

==========





Do you look at a boring Thumbnail and immediately see three different ways to make it visual? Do you understand how to use color, contrast, and facial expressions to create curiosity? Are you the person who catches a weird shadow or a messy crop that everyone else missed?

We need a high-level creative who wants to own the "packaging" of our brand. You should be comfortable taking raw ideas and turning them into high-performing assets without needing someone to hold your hand through the process.



====================

WHAT YOU’LL BE DOING

====================





Design & Strategy



The "Hook": Create 3 - 7 main thumbnails with different variations. High-performing thumbnails per week that drive clicks.



Psychology-Based Design: Use depth, lighting, and "the gap" (creating a question only the video can answer) to increase CTR.



A/B Testing: Design variations to see which colors or layouts the audience prefers.

Photo Editing: Clean up property photos, color-grade portraits, and make every asset look premium.







Operations & Growth



Performance Tracking: Look at the data. If a thumbnail isn't clicking, you’re the first to suggest a pivot.

Asset Management: Keep our library of headshots and Charlotte-specific b-roll organized and ready to use.

Collaboration: Jump into brainstorming sessions to help us title videos before we film them so the visuals and words work together perfectly.





======================

WHAT WE’RE LOOKING FOR

======================



A Killer Portfolio: You’ve done this before. You have examples of thumbnails that actually worked.



The Tools: You’re a pro in Photoshop or similar high-end design software. You also know how to use AI (like Midjourney or Generative Fill) to speed up your workflow, not replace your creativity.



Speed & Communication: We move fast. You need to be able to handle revisions quickly and keep us updated on Slack.



Charlotte Vibes: You don't have to live here, but you need to be able to capture the "vibe" of our city through your designs.



============

HOW TO APPLY

============





STEP 1: The Application Submit your info 
. 



To show us you’re paying attention to the details, please include the phrase "green kangaroo" in the Additional Comments field.



STEP 2: Quick Chat If your portfolio blows us away, we’ll hop on a 15-minute intro call.



STEP 3: The Design Challenge We’ll give you a title and some raw assets and ask you to show us your magic. This is a paid trial task.



STEP 4: Reference Check We’ll chat with one person you’ve worked with in the past.



STEP 5: 90-Day Trial If we’re a match, we’ll start with a 90-day trial period. We’ll give you the training and support you need to master our systems. If you crush it, you’ll be a permanent part of the team.





Application form here

title: SHORT FORM VIDEO EDITOR | Flexible Work Schedule
description:
We’re hiring someone who knows how to turn long-form content into sharp, high-retention short videos for platforms like TikTok, Instagram Reels, and YouTube Shorts.



This role is for someone who understands pacing, hooks, and visual rhythm in short-form content, and knows how to edit with intention rather than just cutting clips.



—-----------------------------------------------------------------------------



READ THE ENTIRE JOB LISTING CAREFULLY. The final step of the hiring process will require the candidate to provide at least 1 former employer/team lead reference and at least 1 character reference. These will be verified prior to extending an offer.



--- ABOUT THE TEAM ---

Want to work in a rewarding, fast-paced, start-up atmosphere? Looking for significant growth and performance bonus opportunities? Have a growth mindset, value relationships, and dedicated to getting results? Then we might be a fit!



What is it like to work with us? HEAR FROM OUR TEAM!   





Our Core Values:

1) DELIGHT THE CLIENT:  We consistently exceed expectations by anticipating needs, delivering outstanding service, and creating those “magic 
nts” where every client feels seen and heard.

2) MASTER YOUR CRAFT:  We commit to continuous learning, share our expertise openly, and tackle every challenge with precision and a deep sense of duty.

3) FOLLOW THROUGH, ALWAYS:  When we say something will happen, it does—every time. We own every task, ensuring that nothing falls through the cracks, and when mistakes occur, we learn and improve immediately.



Our core values are important and the right candidate will share our values. We are building an awesome place to work, not just cutting together videos for our real estate business.



--- ABOUT YOU ---

Do you have strong creative instincts and know how to spot 
nts that make people stop scrolling? Are you proactive, adaptable, and detail-oriented? Do you have a sharp sense of pacing, an instinct for hooks, and a clear understanding of how short-form videos need to flow to hold attention? Do you take pride in clean edits and delivering videos that feel intentional and finished? Do our core values sound like a fit for who you are?



Then keep reading to see if we're a fit!



Responsibilities:

Short-Form Editing & Story Selection

- Review long-form videos, transcripts, or raw footage to identify short-form clip opportunities

- Select 
nts that are clear, engaging, and platform-appropriate

- Edit vertical videos optimized for TikTok, Instagram Reels, and YouTube Shorts

- Create strong hooks, clean cuts, and natural pacing

- Deliver publish-ready videos that meet brand and platform standards



Captions, Visuals & Formatting

- Add on-screen captions (burned-in or SRT as required) with proper timing and readability

- Apply basic motion, zooms, punch-ins, and visual emphasis where appropriate

- Follow platform-specific formatting (aspect ratio, duration, safe margins)



Iteration & Workflow

- Implement feedback efficiently and meet agreed turnaround times

- Maintain clear file naming and folder organization

- Track edits, revisions, and delivery status as required



Requirements:

- A STABLE, HIGH-SPEED INTERNET CONNECTION, REQUIRED (at least 150mbps)

- Experience with Final Cut Pro X (or other editing software, such as Adobe After Effects and Premiere Pro) is required

- Strong preference for MacOS users

- Experience editing short-form vertical content for social platforms, required

- Strong understanding of short-form pacing, hooks, and retention

- Experience working from transcripts or long-form content, required

- Clean file organization and understanding of post-production workflo

- Portfolio of completed short-form video projects, required

- General understanding of brand, content marketing, YouTube, etc, required

- GREAT interpersonal and communication skills, required

- Ability to self-start, work on a tight schedule, and manage multiple project deadlines, required

- Ability to follow directions and a LOVE of completing lots of projects according to consistent specifications, required

- Growth mindset, required



--- APPLICATION & RECRUITMENT PROCESS ---

STEP 1:

Fill out the application form through the link below and write "green kangaroo" in the Additional Comments field.


 



STEP 2:

Qualified candidates may be invited to participate in two PAID test projects, $10-20 USD for each test project estimated to be 2-3hrs of work for each (a total of $40 USD!).



STEP 3:

Candidates who advance through the test project rounds will be invited to an interview.



STEP 4:

Before extending a trial offer, we will conduct a CHARACTER REFERENCE CHECK for the final candidate(s). CONDUCTING A REFERENCE CHECK will be the last step in the hiring process.



STEP 5:

Upon receiving a trial offer, you will be onboarded as a Video Editor with a 90-day PAID trial period. During this period, we expect you to demonstrate your video editing expertise, meet project deadlines, be a team player, and excel at what you do. A successful trial will lead to a permanent offer to join the team.

title: HR Intern (Dedicated to LEM Studio) — Remote Role
description:

 contributor).

mbers for LEM Studio

mbers with internal processes

0–1 years of experience in HR, recruitment, or similar roles

What You’ll Get

Training & Development



Access to internal programs like:

Global Work Environment



Collaborate with tea
mbers from different countries and cultures.



Growth Opportunities



Strong performers may be considered for long-term or full-time roles.



Remote Flexibility

Our Work Culture



At Pearl Lemon, we value:



Speed & Action — we move quickly and improve as we go

Ownership — you are responsible for your work and results

Transparency — open communication and clear expectations

Continuous Learning — we invest in growth and development

Remote Collaboration — we stay connected through daily communication and teamwork



This is a fast-paced environment — ideal for someone who wants to learn quickly and take on real responsibility.



Important Note



This role is fully dedicated to LEM Studio.

You will not be assigned to other departments — your focus will be on supporting this specific team.



How to Apply:



Apply directly via this platform You’ll receive a link to our official Pearl Lemon Application Form Submit the form and record a Loom video (minimum 5 minutes) ?? Applications without the Loom video (or under 5 minutes) will not be reviewed. Your application is only considered complete once both steps are submitted.

title: Jr Technology Analyst
description:
If you’re just looking for a routine accounting job, this isn’t it.

We’re looking for a hungry, high-potential Jr Technology & Finance Analyst who wants real exposure to how finance actually drives a business. This role is for someone early in their career who’s ready to learn fast, think critically, and grow quickly.



What You’ll Be Doing

Get hands-on with real financial data, reporting, and analysis

Support backend accounting while learning how it connects to bigger financial decisions

Assist in preparing insights and materials for leadership-level financial discussions

Work directly with management on financial and operational support

Help build and maintain systems, reports, and dashboards

Take on ad hoc projects that push you beyond your comfort zone



What We’re Looking For

Degree in Finance, Accounting, or a related field

Strong analytical mindset with attention to detail

Tech-savvy — comfortable with spreadsheets, tools, and learning new systems quickly

Not afraid to ask questions, take initiative, and figure things out

Someone who wants more than just a “job” — you want to build real skills



Why This Role Stands Out

You won’t be boxed into pure accounting — you’ll see how finance actually works

Direct exposure to real financial decision-making

Fast learning curve — you’ll gain more here in months than most roles in years

High-growth environment with real responsibility early on 



Applications will only be considered if submitted through our careers page.

title: Executive Marketing Assistant — AI Proficient | Social Media | Claude Required
description:
EXECUTIVE MARKETING ASSISTANT |AI Proficient | Social Media | Marketing Execution

Full-Time 



Compensation

$1,000/month Plus quarterly bonus potential of up to $2000



Mandatory Required Hours

Monday to Friday 6:00 AM to 12:00 PM US Eastern Time — non-negotiable



40 hours per week

Experience

3+ years in marketing, social media, or executive support

AI Requirement

Hands-on Claude experience is mandatory — not optional



Social Media

Instagram,
, TikTok, YouTube — all four platforms



Tools

Claude AI, Canva, 
, Google Drive, ManyChat, Meta Business Suite

Industry

Fitness / Health & Wellness (preferred)

Reports To

Ken Stewart — Owner/Founder, Tysons Playground



ABOUT TYSONS PLAYGROUND

Tysons Playground is a premium fitness facility with two locations in the Northern Virginia area. We are not a basic gym. We are built around world-class equipment — Panatta, Atlantis, Eleiko, and NewTech — and a member experience that reflects that standard at every touchpoint. Our tagline is Fitness Evolved and everything we put out has to live up to that.

We are building an in-house marketing operation that is lean, AI-powered, and built for growth. Our team includes a Social Media Strategist, a Video Editor, a GHL Systems Strategist, and a marketing agency handling paid ads. What we need now is someone who can sit at the intersection of all of it.  Supporting the founder directly and keeping the entire marketing operation moving forward.



THE ROLE

This is not a basic social media job and it is not a basic admin job. It is both — and more. You will work directly alongside Ken Stewart, the founder of Tysons Playground, supporting his marketing vision and helping him execute it across every channel we operate on.



Half of your role is marketing execution.   Owning our social media presence across four platforms, writing content, managing the community, and keeping our brand visible and consistent every single week. The other half is executive support.  Research, project coordination, team communication, and helping Ken move his priorities forward faster than he could alone.



WHO THIS IS FOR:  Someone who is equally comfortable writing a compelling Instagram caption and compiling a competitive research brief. Someone who uses Claude the way a skilled professional uses any powerful tool — to think faster, produce better work, and eliminate the blank page problem.



WHAT YOU WILL DO

Social Media — You Own This:

Schedule and publish posts across Instagram,
, TikTok, and YouTube Shorts minimum 5 posts per week

Write all captions in Tysons Playground brand voice — premium, direct, equipment and facility focused

Manage community across all platforms — respond to comments and DMs, escalate anything requiring a business decision

Manage Instagram and
 Stories — daily reposts, member tags, behind-the-scenes 
nts

Set up and manage ManyChat automations — DM response flows, comment triggers, and lead capture sequences

Repurpose content across platforms — one piece of content should fuel multiple posts across all four channels

Support Influencer Friday content amplification — the last Friday of every month is our biggest content day

Create basic graphics using Canva from existing brand templates and Claude for copy direction

Compile weekly social media performance reports and share observations with Ken and Ashley



Executive Marketing Support — You Keep Ken Moving:

Use Claude to conduct competitor research, local market research, and content research — summarize findings clearly and concisely

Draft communications,
s, briefs, and follow-ups on Ken's behalf — written in his voice, not yours

Manage and update 
 — keep all marketing projects, tasks, and deadlines organized and visible to the team

Coordinate with Ashley, Gerald, and Art to keep projects moving — you are the connective tissue between the team



Prepare weekly performance summaries and marketing reports for Ken

Research new tools, platforms, trends, and opportunities — bring Ken a clear recommendation, not just information

Help Ken prepare for meetings, calls, and strategic conversations — background research, talking points, follow-up notes

Manage Ken's marketing inbox and flag anything time-sensitive

Take on project-based research and execution tasks as they arise — this role grows with the business



REQUIREMENTS — MUST HAVE

Experience: 3+ years of hands-on experience in marketing, social media management, or executive assistant work — ideally combining both

Claude AI: Demonstrated, real-world experience using Claude specifically — not just ChatGPT or AI tools generally. You will be tested on this

Availability: Available and actively working from 6:00 AM to 12:00 PM US Eastern Time every weekday — this is non-negotiable



Writing: Exceptional written English — you will be writing captions, communications, and research briefs that represent a premium brand and its founder

Social Media: Experience managing Instagram,
, TikTok, and YouTube on behalf of a brand

ManyChat: Hands-on ManyChat experience — DM automations, comment triggers, and conversation flows

Canva: Comfortable in Canva working from existing brand templates

Self-Management: Highly organized and proactive — you do not wait to be told what to do. You see what needs to happen and you make it happen

Tools: Comfortable working in 
 and Google Drive

Setup: Reliable internet connection and a dedicated, distraction-free workspace



NICE TO HAVE

Experience in the fitness, gym, health, or wellness industry

Familiarity with GoHighLevel — Gerald owns the architecture but awareness is a plus

Experience supporting a founder or executive directly in a remote capacity

Experience with content repurposing across multiple platforms

Basic video editing or Reels experience

Experience with paid social media advertising



WHAT THIS ROLE IS NOT

This is not a role where you clock in, complete a task list, and clock out. Ken moves fast and expects the people around him to do the same. If you need constant direction and supervision to produce results, this is not the right fit.

This is also not a purely creative role. You will be writing captions but you will also be managing 
, compiling research, and coordinating between tea
mbers. If you thrive when you own a wide lane and can handle both creative and operational work in the same day — this is exactly the right fit.



WHAT SUCCESS LOOKS LIKE

In your first 30 days:

You are independently managing social media across all four platforms without being reminded

Ken is spending less time on tasks he used to handle himself because you have taken them over

The team — Ashley, Gerald, and Art — has a clear point of coordination for marketing projects

Your 
 board is clean, updated, and reflects the real status of every active project

You have produced at least one research brief or competitive analysis that Ken found genuinely useful



By day 90:

Ken trusts you to represent his voice in writing — captions,
s, and communications go out under his name and sound like him

You are proactively identifying opportunities, gaps, and problems before Ken has to flag them

You are the most reliable person on the marketing team — the one thing Ken does not have to think about

The social media channels are growing consistently and the community is engaged



HOW TO APPLY

Your application must include all of the following or it will not be reviewed:

A Loom video introduction — 2 to 3 minutes. Tell us who you are, show us your workspace, and walk us through one marketing or executive support project you are proud of. We want to see you, not just read about you

A written Claude AI example — describe a specific task you completed using Claude. What was the task, how did you prompt it, what did you refine, and what was the result. Be specific. Vague answers will not be considered

Links to at least one social media account you currently manage or have managed on behalf of a brand

Your completed test project — instructions and photos are included in the separate test project document provided with this posting

Your resume or OnlineJobs.ph profile link



Finally, include the phrase Tysons Executive Ready at the top of your application message. This confirms you have read the full posting.



Applications without the Loom video, the Claude AI example, and the completed test project will not be reviewed.

We are looking for someone who wants to grow with Tysons Playground for the long term. If that is you — we look forward to hearing from you.



A NOTE FROM KEN

I built Tysons Playground on the belief that serious people deserve a serious place to train. That same standard applies to the team I build around it. I need someone who is sharp, reliable, and genuinely invested in what we are building here.

This role will grow. The person who executes it well will have more responsibility, more ownership, and more compensation over time. I am not looking for someone to fill a seat. I am looking for someone who wants to own their lane and help drive this thing forward.



Ken Stewart

Founder, Tysons Playground

title: Virtual Executive Assistant (GoHighLevel Specialist)
description:
Fitfam is on the hunt for a game-changing Virtual Executive Assistant who thrives on delivering results and keeping the wheels turning at full speed. You’ll support our Managing Director and Creative Director, freeing them up to lead the charge while you handle the details with precision. If you’re a proactive operator with a passion for efficiency, exceptional communication, and a deep understanding of GoHighLevel, we want you on our elite team.



Who We Are:



We’re more than a content creation agency—we’re pioneers, redefining what it means to create world-class fitness content at lightning speed. We live and breathe fitness, capturing hair-raising 
nts that give our clients an undeniable edge.



Your Key Responsibilities:



1. Executive Support for Managing Director and Creative Director

- Calendar & Appointment Management: Keep schedules tight and priorities clear.

- Inbox Mastery: Manage
 correspondence and ensure key messages are actioned or delegated.

- Weekly KPI Reporting: Deliver concise and accurate reports to drive business decisions.

- Personal Task Assistance: Handle tasks such as travel planning, online shopping, and personal scheduling.



2. Office and Account Management

- Client Onboarding: Own the onboarding process for new clients and ensure their experience is seamless from day one.

- Strategy Session Support: Attend client strategy calls, document key insights, and prepare actionable shoot briefs for our creative team.

- Project Tracking: Ensure client projects are scheduled, deadlines are hit, and creative outputs are top-notch.

- Team Coordination: Collaborate with Creative Strategists to maintain 
ntum and ensure task completion in GoHighLevel.

- Payout Reports: Build and manage fortnightly reports for Creative Strategist payments.



3. GoHighLevel Expert

- Audit & Optimise Workflows: Continuously improve and streamline GoHighLevel automations for maximum efficiency.

- System Maintenance: Ensure project details, client info, and workflows are always current and correct.

- Custom Reporting: Build detailed reports and dashboards for the leadership team.



4. Special Projects

- Efficiency Audits: Review and refine automations to eliminate bottlenecks.

- Onboarding Workflows: Build onboarding systems for new tea
mbers to hit the ground running.

- Proposal Automation: Create sales proposal workflows to accelerate the sales process.

- Careers Funnel: Develop a system to recruit and onboard top-tier Creative Strategists who align with our athlete mindset.



What We’re Looking For:



Skills & Experience:

- Proven Executive Assistant Experience: You’re a master of organisation, communication, and task prioritisation.

- GoHighLevel Power User: You know GoHighLevel inside and out and can build workflows with your eyes closed.

- Dan Martell’s “Buy Back Your Time” Principles: Familiarity with efficiency-focused frameworks is a huge advantage.

- Client Management: Strong background in account management or customer service.

- Fitness Enthusiast: You’re passionate about the fitness industry and understand the lingo and culture.

- Google Workspace Whiz: Docs, Sheets, and Slides are second nature to you.



You’ll Fit Right In If You:

- Thrive in fast-paced environments and know how to handle the heat.

- Love solving problems and bringing solutions to the table before they’re even needed.

- Are detail-oriented and never let things slip through the cracks.

- Bring positive energy and a growth mindset to everything you do.



Why Join Fitfam?

We’re building something epic—a place where high-performance meets creativity and collaboration. By joining Fitfam, you’ll become part of a world-class team obsessed with making waves in the fitness industry. Here, you’ll sharpen your skills, grow alongside fitness industry leaders, and contribute to stories that inspire action.



How to Apply:

Ready to level up? Apply with your resume, a brief intro video, and examples of your GoHighLevel work. Let us know how your experience aligns with the Fitfam mission.

title: Careful, meticulous admin & operations person needed for UK treasure hunt company
description:
We're Paul and Ian, co-founders of Lindle. We make fun, interesting treasure hunts in cities around the UK.



We're looking for a careful, meticulous person to take over some of the day-to-day running of our business.



# Qualities we're looking for:



* Meticulous, careful: If something doesn't look right, you get to the bottom of it, you don't just move on. To demonstrate this quality, please include the word "harbour" in the subject of your application.



* Organised: you love systems and you use them to ensure things don't get dropped or forgotten.



* Flexible, adaptable: you're OK working with different systems and processes. You're comfortable that some of our processes today need improving.



# Background: help us transition our business!



We are a two-person, founder-run business. Our games are used by sightseers, hen parties and large corporate work teams.

We care a lot about thoughtful design and smooth delivery. We hate disappointing customers and so it's important to us that things are run well.

We started the business nearly 7 years ago. We avoided hiring and so we currently run every aspect of the business ourselves. Although we've automated many aspects of the business, there are still many tasks that need a thoughtful human. 

Running everything ourselves is limiting the business. We have d
 it's no longer sustainable and we are ready to get some help.

We are in the process of redesigning the business to rely less on the founder. We have started codifying how the business operates through standard operating procedures (SOPs) and preparing to let go of running everything ourselves.

That's why this job role exists: we need you to help transition our business from founder-run by taking some admin & operations load off the founders.



# Essential skills



* Strong written and spoken English.

* Strong familiarity with Google Docs, Google Sheets, Trello

* Thinking for yourself without relying on LLMs



# Detailed responsibilities 



We are looking for someone who can both follow instructions and take initiative when instructions aren't well defined. Specifically someone who can:



1. meticulously follow SOPs as tasks arise, and

2. use your initiative to improve the SOPs over time, identifying improvements and gaps.



We are currently still defining exactly the tasks we most need help with. The current list of responsibilities looks like this:



* Use the internet and your initiative to identify and research potential disruptions to our games, for example ticketed events in a city. Record this carefully in a spreadsheet. Use and improve the process we currently have for doing this.

* Process booking amendments and related customer admin - for example logging into a third-party portal, checking updated details, confirming the change, updating an entry in another system,

* Handle or triage routine
s in the shared inbox (typically not customer facing)

* Download receipts and reconcile recurring bank transactions each month for book-keeping purposes - for example logging into portals, downloading an invoice, attaching it to the transaction,

* Carry out recurring admin tasks accurately and on time, for example extracting a report from a portal, entering values into a spreadsheet, flagging changes or anomalies,

* Maintain clear records, trackers and checklists,

* Flag anything unusual, unclear or higher-risk to the founders,

* Help us to transition the business from a founder-run model. Maintain and suggest improvements to the SOPs to ensure they remain accurate and useful



# Working pattern



Currently we are looking for support 2 hours per day Monday-Friday.



Your preferred two-hour block should normally overlap at least one hour with 09:00 - 13:00 in the UK to enable some synchronous time.



# How to apply



To apply, please use treasurehuntbristol to answer this question:



If I were considering playing Treasure Hunt Bristol on Thursday 16th or Friday 17th July, what's the latest time I could start?



Thanks - Paul & Ian

title: Video Editor (Direct Response Ads)
description:
We're hiring 2-3 video editors to make
/TikTok ads for supplement brands. 

We’ve managed brands spending $4-5M+/month on paid social, and we pay editors a 0.5% bonus on ad spend on top of retainer. The retainer is intentionally lower because we want editors who are bought into the performance side. We'll do our best to guide you toward hitting the bonus, since it’s a win-win for everyone.

The role



Most of the time, you'll get a brief with all details included: an inspiration link, a script, editing notes, and access to our media library — sometimes a Loom walkthrough on top. Your job is to put it together cleanly and add craft on top of the brief.



You'll work across multiple ad formats: UGC, AI avatar (Veo3), Pixar-style animated, VSL, static-to-video, etc. You don't need to be a master of all of them on day one — we have senior editors on the team who can teach you these other formats you haven't made before.



---



Who we're looking for

- Solid on CapCut and/or Premiere (After Effects a plus)

- Solid on Generative AI prompting (higgsfield, veo3, etc)

- Has shipped direct-response ads before, or has the taste to pick it up fast

- Fast turnaround — typical brief is 24-48 hours (depending on the workload)

- English good enough to follow written briefs and Loom walkthroughs

- Detail-obsessed on pacing, hook, captions, and sound design



---



Trial task



To evaluate, we want to see you make two ads:

1. Classic AI Avatar ad using Veo3 — current industry-standard format

2. Pixar-style animated ad — you've seen these all over your IG and TikTok feed



Brief here: 





You can use any clips from any source — TikTok, Pinterest, YouTube, stock, AI-generated, etc. Feel free to problem-solve and figure out what works best.



This will be a paid trial for those who actually make good ads (with real effort — we can tell whether you've put effort in or not). It'll be $30 for the trial task.



---



What the role looks like day-to-day (once onboarded)

- Work directly with our strategists on briefs

- X ads per week expected output once you're fully onboarded

- Contractor role, async-friendly, but responsive during overlap hours

- Retainer + 0.5% of ad spend bonus on the brands you cut for



---



To apply, send us:

1. Both trial videos

2. Any portfolio links or past DR ad work you want us to see

title: AI Content Creator / Paid Social Ads Editor (B2B Agency) ROCKET FAST HIRE
description:
About Us

We are a fast growing B2B marketing agency that helps service businesses generate qualified appointments through paid social and content. We run paid ads, build funnels, and produce a high volume of creative across multiple client accounts every week. Our team is small, fully remote, and built around people who take ownership and move fast.

We are looking for a creative operator who can keep up with our output and help us scale our content engine across all of our subaccounts. If you love editing video, building scroll stopping graphics, and using AI tools to multiply your output, this role is built for you.



Heads Up on Speed

I am running interviews very, very quickly on this one. I want someone in the seat fast. If you take three days to apply, the role is probably already filled. Speed of response is the first thing I am evaluating.



The Role

You will be the creative engine behind our paid social ads and organic content across multiple B2B client subaccounts. Each client has their own brand, tone, and audience. You need to keep them separate, keep them consistent, and turn around new creative fast.

This is not a one off project role. We push out new ads every week. We test, we iterate, we scale what works. You will be the person making that creative happen.



What You Will Do

Edit short form UGC style video ads for Meta, Instagram Reels, TikTok, and YouTube Shorts.

Cut long form podcasts, webinars, and recorded calls into short clips with hooks, captions, b roll, and zooms.

Create static ad graphics, carousels, and feed posts for paid and organic social.

Use AI tools to multiply output. HeyGen, ElevenLabs, Higgsfield AI, Sora, Runway, Midjourney, Submagic, Descript, and whatever new tool actually helps us move faster.

Manage creative output across 3 to 10 client subaccounts at once without mixing brands.

Build and maintain a clean folder system for raw assets, finished creative, and client brand kits.



Repurpose top performing content into multiple formats and angles.

Keep up with what is actually working in B2B paid social and bring ideas to the table.



Must Have

Proven short form video editing skills in CapCut Pro, Premiere Pro, or DaVinci Resolve.

UGC ad editing experience (talking head ads, hook plus body plus CTA structure, dynamic captions, b roll overlays).

Graphic design skills in Canva at a minimum. Figma or Photoshop is a big plus.

Real hands on experience with AI content tools and writing solid prompts.

Ability to juggle multiple client accounts at the same time without dropping the ball.

Strong written English and clear communication. You will be getting briefs and giving updates in writing.

Reliable internet, your own machine that can handle video editing, and a quiet workspace.

Fast turnaround mindset. Same day or next day on most creative.



Nice To Have

Experience editing for B2B or service businesses, not just ecom, fashion, or beauty.

Working knowledge of Meta Ads Manager and what makes an ad actually perform.

Copywriting basics for hooks, captions, and CTAs.



GoHighLevel experience.

Motion graphics or simple After Effects work.

Experience working inside a marketing agency.



The Important Note on B2B

Most editors and content creators only have experience with ecom, fashion, beauty, or fitness brands. That is not us. Our clients are service businesses selling to other businesses. The pace, tone, and creative angles are different. If you have only edited dance videos and lip gloss ads, this role will be a tough fit. If you have edited founder content, talking head ads for software, agencies, or service businesses, this role will feel right at home.



Hours, Pay, and Bonuses

20 to 25 hours per week to start. 

$2 to $4 per hour + bonuses starting, based on skill and portfolio.

Performance bonuses on top of base pay for hitting creative output and ad performance targets.



Clear path to full time as we scale.

Long term growth role. We are not looking for a contractor for one project. We are looking for a long term tea
mber who grows with the agency and earns more as the agency earns more.



How to Apply

Read this part carefully. If you skip any step, your application will be ignored. I am moving fast on this hire so the sooner you apply, the better your shot.

Put the word PIXEL at the very top of your application. If it is not there, I will not read further.

Send a link to your portfolio or a Google Drive folder with your best work. Include at least 2 short form UGC video ads and 2 static ad graphics.

Record a Loom video where you do the following. Introduce yourself. Walk me through 1 UGC video ad you edited and explain why you made the choices you made (hook, pacing, captions, b roll). Walk me through 1 static ad you designed and explain the layout and visual hierarchy. Tell me one AI tool you use every week and how it actually saves you time. Walk me through your exact process for finding winning angles on a paid social campaign, including how you research, how you test, what you look at, and how you spot a winner early. Walk me through exactly how you would optimize a campaign once it is running, including what metrics you watch, what you change, when you kill, and when you scale.

Tell me how you would approach making a UGC style ad for a fictional B2B software company that helps small businesses with their cybersecurity. Just a short paragraph on your angle, hook, and visual style. I want to see how you think.

Tell me your current availability and how soon you could start. If you can start this week, say so.

That is it. The people who follow these steps and apply quickly are the only ones I will respond to.

Looking forward to seeing your work.

title: Inside Sales Agent - (PUUR Health and Wellness)
description:
Inside Sales Agent (ISA) —PUUR Health and Wellness | Base + Commission | Long-Term Role with Team Lead Path



We are Precision Scaling, a sales operations company that builds and runs inside sales teams for US-based clinics, coaches, and high-ticket service businesses. We're hiring our first dedicated Inside Sales Agent (ISA) to call leads and book appointments for a US-based wellness and aesthetic clinic in Texas.



This is a long-term role with a clear management path — the right person will become the ISA Team Lead as we onboard more clinics and build out an ISA team underneath them.



What You'll Be Doing:

Calling warm leads who filled out a form on the clinic's website

Re-engaging old/unconverted leads from the clinic's CRM (extensive follow-up — this is where most of the money is made)

Running short discovery conversations to understand what treatment fits the lead

Booking leads into the clinic for a consultation OR a treatment (IV drips, aesthetic services, wellness packages)

Taking payment over the phone where appropriate, OR directing the lead to pay at the clinic

Logging every call, outcome, and follow-up in GoHighLevel (our CRM + dialer — provided)

Submitting a short End-of-Day (EOD) report

Treatments range from $200 single sessions to multi-session packages worth a few thousand dollars. Familiarity with wellness, aesthetic, IV therapy, or med spa industries is a major plus.



Daily Volume

Around 100-200 dials per day plus follow-ups. Most leads are warm or previously interested — this is not a hard cold-calling grind.



Schedule

Core hours: 9 AM – 5 PM US Eastern Time (which is 9 PM – 5 AM Philippine Time — please only apply if you are committed to working US hours)

Flexibility: You can work as early as 8 AM ET or as late as 8 PM ET

Weekends encouraged: Saturday and Sunday afternoons (US time) are when many leads actually answer the phone — and where commissions can be easiest to earn



Because most of your income is commission-based, you have full freedom to find the hours that book the most appointments



Compensation

Base: $50/week ($200/month) — paid weekly

Commission: 4% of all cash collected from your booked appointments and sales

Realistic earnings: $600–$800+ per month at expected performance

Top performer: Promotion to ISA Team Lead with override commissions on the team you will help build and train



Requirements

Clear, confident spoken English with a neutral or American-friendly accent — non-negotiable. You will be on the phone with US patients all day.

At least 6 months of phone sales, appointment setting, or ISA experience

Bonus: Experience with medical, wellness, aesthetic, med spa, IV therapy, or healthcare clients

Working laptop or desktop computer

Reliable internet (minimum 25 Mbps recommended)

Headset with microphone (or a clear built-in mic — no echo, no background noise)

Quiet, professional work environment

Available for weekly Zoom team meetings and onboarding sessions



What We Provide

GoHighLevel CRM and dialer access (you don't pay for any of this)

US phone numbers (provided)

Scripts, objection-handling frameworks, and recorded calls to learn from

Fast 2–3 day onboarding before you go live on calls

Access to AI tools (Claude, etc.) to help you research leads and refine your pitch

Direct mentorship from Precision Scaling leadership



Growth Path

This is the first ISA hire on a team we are actively building. As we sign more clinics, we'll need more ISAs — and the person hired today will be first in line to become Team Lead, training new hires and earning override commissions. If you are competent, hungry, and reliable, this role can become a five-figure-per-year management position within 6–12 months.



How to Apply (Read Carefully — Most Applicants Will Be Filtered Out Here)

Your application MUST include all three of the following or it will not be reviewed:

1. Subject Line Keyword Start the subject line of your application with: PRECISION-DIAL Applications without this exact keyword will be deleted unread.

2. A 1-2 minute Voice Recording Upload to Google Drive, Vocaroo, or any free file host and paste the link. Record yourself doing this mock call:



you are calling Sarah, a lead who filled out a form on a wellness clinic's website 3 months ago asking about IV drip therapy. She never booked an appointment. You are calling her now. Open the call, build rapport, and try to book her into the clinic. Speak naturally as if you're actually on the call.



We are listening for: clear English, sales instincts, warmth, ability to lead a conversation.

3. A Short Written Paragraph (5–7 sentences) Cover:

Your relevant sales experience — be specific (what did you sell, what was your closing rate, what tools did you use)

Why this role specifically interests you

Your typical availability in US Eastern Time

Applications that look copy-pasted, generic, or AI-written will be ignored. We are hiring one excellent person, not screening a hundred mediocre ones.

title: Sales Lead - Social Media Partnerships - Hourly + Commission
description:
ABOUT THE ROLE

We're hiring a Social Media Partnerships Sales tea
mber to grow revenue across our creator roster. You'll be the primary driver of brand deal flow: sourcing, pitching, structuring, and closing social media campaigns for our talent network.

This is a high-autonomy, high-ownership position for someone who thrives working independently and within a supportive team environment utilizing the infrastructure, roster, and relationships Wellness Loud has already built.

WHAT YOU'LL DO

Prospect and develop brand relationships across health, wellness, lifestyle, and adjacent categories

Build and manage an outbound pipeline:
, DMs, and agency relationships

Package and position social media campaigns including posts, integrations, whitelisting, and usage rights

Price and structure deals based on market conditions, creator preferred rates, and creator performance data

Negotiate directly with brands and agencies through to close

Manage your deals from outreach through execution alignment, including but not limited to administrative processes

Communicate directly with creators and ensure deliverable completion 

Build repeatable, long-term brand relationships tied to our roster

WHO YOU ARE

An experienced sales professional with a proven track record in outbound, relationship-driven deals

A strong "hunter" who generates their own opportunities; you don't wait for inbound requests

A confident closer who can independently negotiate and finalize deals

Someone who thrives with autonomy and wants a performance-based upside

REQUIRED EXPERTISE

You are fluent in the economics of influencer marketing and social media sales. You already understand:

How to price social media and podcast campaigns

How to structure deliverables, usage rights, and timelines

Whitelisting, paid usage, and licensing mechanics

Performance metrics: views, engagement rate, CPMs, conversions

How to position creators and performance data effectively to brands

NICE TO HAVE

Existing relationships with brands or agencies

Experience selling creator-led campaigns

Background in health, wellness, or podcasting

COMPENSATION

This is a commission-based role with structure tied directly to deals you originate and close. High earning potential for strong performers. 

WHAT SUCCESS LOOKS LIKE

You consistently bring in new brand partnerships across our creator roster

You price and structure campaigns that work for both brands and creators

You build a repeatable, growing pipeline of revenue month over month

You develop long-term brand relationships that compound over time
