title: Cold Caller / Appointment Setter (B2B – Valet Trash Services)
description:
Job Title:

Cold Caller / Appointment Setter (B2B – Valet Trash Services) – Long-Term Opportunity



**About Us:**

We are a growing U.S.-based company (MT Valet) providing valet trash, junk removal, and dumpster rental services. Our focus is working with apartment communities, property managers, and local businesses.



We are looking for a confident and results-driven cold caller who can generate qualified leads and book appointments.



This is a **long-term opportunity** 



**Your Role:**

You will be calling:



* Apartment complexes

* Property management companies

* Real estate investors

* Local businesses



Your goal is to:



* Start conversations

* Qualify prospects

* Book appointments for our team



You are NOT just reading a script — you should be able to think, adapt, and improve conversations.



**What We’re Looking For:**



* Fluent English (clear and confident speaking)

* Experience in cold calling or sales

* Friendly, persuasive, and confident on the phone

* Able to handle objections and keep conversations going

* Comfortable contributing ideas to improve scripts and results

* Focused on **booking appointments (not just making calls)**



**Work Details:**



* Work during U.S. business hours

* Start part-time, with potential to move to full-time

* Use Google Drive for tracking leads and activity



**Compensation:**



* $2–$5/hour (based on experience)

* Opportunity for long-term role based on performance



What We Offer:



* $2–$5/hour (based on experience and performance)

* Performance-based bonuses for booked appointments

* Paid PH holidays (for long-term team members)

* Hands-on training and ongoing support

* Long-term opportunity with growth potential

* Supportive, respectful, and professional team

* 100% work-from-home flexibility



**IMPORTANT – How to Apply:**

We only want serious applicants. To apply, you MUST include:



1. A short voice recording introducing yourself

2. A **mock cold call recording** (pretend you are calling a property manager to offer valet trash service and try to book an appointment)

3. Your previous cold calling experience

4. Your availability (hours per week)



Applications without these will NOT be considered.



**What Success Looks Like:**



* Consistently booking appointments

* Improving conversations over time

* Helping us generate real business opportunities



Growth Opportunity:

Opportunity to earn additional income through bonuses or commissions based on closed deals





If you’re confident on the phone and ready to help grow a real business, apply now.

title: Lighting Designer / Lighting Design Engineer
description:
We are looking for a Lighting Designer / Lighting Design Engineer to support our UK-based lighting design team. We are open to candidates with a range of experience, from developing designers with strong CAD skills through to experienced lighting design engineers.



The salary is an auto guideline only from OnlineJobs and we welcome applications from all experience levels and salary expectations



About Us



We are a long-established UK lighting manufacturer with over 100 years of experience in the commercial and domestic lighting industry.



We combine technical expertise, product innovation and a strong commitment to customer service. Our values are centred around customer experience, teamwork, vision and passion, and these principles guide how we work with customers, partners and colleagues.



As the business continues to grow, we are looking to expand our lighting design capability with support from talented designers based in the Philippines.



About the Role



We are looking for a Lighting Designer / Lighting Design Engineer to support the creation of high-quality lighting layouts, calculations and specifications for customer projects.



This role may suit candidates at different stages of their career. We are open to speaking with people who already have strong lighting design experience, as well as candidates with solid CAD/design skills who are looking to develop further within lighting.

The successful candidate will work closely with our UK-based lighting design team, technical team and wider commercial 

departments to help deliver accurate, well-presented and practical lighting design solutions for customers.



Key Responsibilities



Depending on experience level, responsibilities may include:



• Creating lighting designs and layouts from customer briefs, drawings and project information.

• Producing CAD drawings of lighting layouts and ensuring designs meet customer specifications.

• Preparing lighting calculations and detailed plans using software such as Relux and/or Dialux.

• Supporting both internal and external lighting design requirements.

• Assisting with the preparation of finished design presentations and customer-facing project documents.

• Liaising with internal teams to discuss ideas, concepts, product options and alternative solutions.

• Working with the lighting design manager, technical lead and other departments to ensure projects meet required standards, regulations and compliance expectations.

• Helping to manage lighting projects from initial brief through to final design output.

• Reviewing project information carefully to ensure accuracy, attention to detail and technical consistency.

• Contributing ideas and solutions as part of a wider design and technical team.

• Supporting project administration, specifications and numerical information where required.



For more experienced candidates, the role may also include greater ownership of full projects, direct technical input, advanced design work and support in improving lighting design processes.



Skills and Experience



We are looking for candidates who can demonstrate some or all of the following:



Essential



• Experience using AutoCAD or similar CAD software.

• A good understanding of lighting fundamentals, layouts and specifications.

• Experience or strong interest in lighting design software such as Relux and/or Dialux.

• Strong attention to detail and the ability to produce accurate design work.

• Good numerical and organisational skills.

• Ability to manage project information, specifications and deadlines.

• Good written and verbal communication skills.

• Ability to work collaboratively with remote teams.

• A proactive attitude and willingness to learn our products, processes and design standards.



Desirable



• Previous experience working in the lighting industry.

• Experience designing commercial, industrial, retail, warehouse, office, residential or external lighting schemes.

• Experience preparing customer-facing lighting design presentations.

• Knowledge of lighting calculations, lux levels, emergency lighting or building compliance requirements.

• Experience working with UK, European or international lighting projects.

• Ability to interpret technical drawings, customer briefs and product specifications.

• Experience working remotely with overseas clients or colleagues.

title: Customer Experience Virtual Assistant (Phone Based)
description:
Note: Interested applicants must submit their application exclusively through the OnlineJobs platform. Do not
 the company directly. Any candidate who contacts the company outside of the OnlineJobs system will be disqualified from consideration.



Customer Experience Virtual Assistant (Phone-Based, Process-Driven)



Job Overview



Are you someone who takes pride in handling customer interactions the right way—calmly, professionally, and consistently? Do you do well with clear expectations, scripts, and processes, and enjoy improving quickly through feedback? If so, Maid In America Cleaning Services, based in Clarksville, TN, wants to hear from you.



We’re seeking a Customer Experience Virtual Assistant to serve as a frontline point of contact for our customers and a dependable executor of structured processes. Working closely with our sales and customer experience teams, you’ll be responsible for answering inbound calls, handling customer requests, following defined scripts, and routing issues accurately.



This role is process-driven and phone-heavy, especially during training. The work can be fast-paced at times, but it is highly structured. Your ability to stay calm, follow instructions precisely, and take coaching seriously will have a direct impact on customer satisfaction and team efficiency.



What You’ll Do



- Answer & Handle Inbound Customer Calls: Be the first point of contact for customers and new inquiries, answering calls promptly, professionally, and calmly while following provided phone scripts.

- Follow Scripts & Decision Trees: Handle common customer needs—such as scheduling questions, reschedules, basic service inquiries, and initial issue intake—by following clear scripts and escalation rules exactly.

- Route Requests Accurately: Determine when a request can be handled directly and when it should be escalated to the appropriate tea
mber, ensuring clean handoffs and no dropped balls.

- Create a Positive Customer Experience: Make customers feel heard, cared for, and confident that their request is being handled, even when issues or complaints arise.

- Document Interactions & Updates: Log accurate notes and updates in our systems so the internal team always has clear context and next steps.

- Support Structured Administrative Workflows: Execute defined backend processes (task tracking, updates, file movement, and follow-through) by following SOPs and checklists without skipping steps.

- Receive Coaching & Improve Quickly: Actively apply feedback on calls, scripts, and workflows, improving speed, accuracy, and confidence over time.



Who We’re Looking For



- Process-Driven & Detail-Oriented: You’re comfortable following scripts, checklists, and SOPs exactly, and you don’t skip steps or “freestyle” your work.

- Calm & Professional on the Phone: You communicate clearly and confidently, stay composed with customers, and can handle questions or mild frustration without getting flustered.

- Highly Coachable: You take feedback seriously, apply it quickly, and improve fast—especially when it comes to phone scripts and customer handling.

- Reliable & Consistent: You show up on time, follow through on tasks, and can be counted on to do things the right way every time.

- Comfortable with Structure: You prefer clear expectations, defined processes, and knowing exactly what “good” looks like in your role.

- Tech-Comfortable: You’re comfortable working inside tools like Slack, shared documents, and task systems—or you can learn them quickly with instructions.

- Strong Communicator: Whether by phone, chat, or written notes, you communicate clearly, professionally, and respectfully.



Our Core Values



- Communication

- Connection

- Quality

- Service

- Teamwork



If you share these values, we want you on our team to help drive our company forward.



Important Note: Screening Step



SERIOUS APPLICANTS ONLY:

Complete our personality test to see if there’s a mutual fit:


/p/fzxN5FC9302s 

Give honest answers; there are no right or wrong results.



Submit your application with the subject line beginning with the core value we’ve listed that you most resonate with.



IMPORTANT: When applying, please use AT LEAST 5 Apply Points



Skills & Requirements

- Fluent English: Strong spoken and written English is required. This is a phone-based role, and customers must be able to understand you clearly and comfortably.

- Customer Service Experience: Prior experience handling customer inquiries or support requests over the phone is required.

- Process & Administrative Competence: You’re comfortable following multi-step processes, documenting information accurately, and keeping systems up to date.

- Attention to Detail: You consistently capture the right information, follow instructions precisely, and avoid careless errors.

- Coachability: You’re open to feedback, willing to be corrected, and able to apply coaching quickly—especially when learning phone scripts and customer-handling expectations.

- Technical Readiness:

  - Reliable computer with backup power options

  - Quality headset and microphone

  - Quiet workspace suitable for phone calls

- Ability to Work Monday-Friday, 8AM-5PM CST.

- Reliable Internet & Backup Options: Stable internet connection with a backup plan to ensure consistent availability and responsiveness.



Why Join Maid In America Cleaning Services?



- Impactful Role: Your quick execution and initiative will directly affect customer satisfaction and operational efficiency.

- Growth-Oriented Culture: We embrace new ideas, reward proactive thinking, and train daily for continual improvement.

- Supportive Team: Collaborate with a group that values each other’s contributions and thrives on a feedback-rich environment.



If you’re passionate about productivity, eager to work in a fast-paced setting, and confident in your ability to deliver high-quality results quickly, apply now and become an integral part of the Maid In America family!



Apply Today: Submit your application per the instructions above. We look forward to learning more about you!

title: Operations Associate - Revenue
description:
We are seeking a sharp, organized, and finance-savvy Revenue Operations Associate to support our growing business. This Philippines-based role will work directly with US-based leaders to keep our revenue engine running smoothly — owning day-to-day billing, AR, and finance operations work, running revenue operations QA, building and maintaining automations, and flexing into executive administrative support and broader operational initiatives as needed.



The ideal candidate has prior hands-on experience in billing, finance, or accounting, is methodical about catching errors before they ship, enjoys building lightweight automations to eliminate manual work, communicates clearly and professionally in writing and on calls, and is comfortable representing the company directly to finance and billing contacts at customer and vendor organizations.



- Start Date: Ideally immediately (or within 2 weeks)

- Rate: Competitive, commensurate with experience

- Hours: 40 hours per week

- Timezone: Monday to Friday, aligned with US business hours (PST/EST overlap required)



Key Responsibilities

- Revenue Operations (Primary Responsibility)

- Own day-to-day billing operations: invoice generation, delivery, follow-up, and reconciliation.

- Manage accounts receivable workflows — track outstanding balances, send dunning communications, and proactively follow up on overdue invoices.

- Partner with finance leadership on revenue reporting, customer billing data hygiene, and month-end close support.

- Maintain accurate customer billing records across our CRM, billing platform, and accounting tools.

- Assist with revenue recognition, contract-to-billing handoffs, and ensuring billing terms match signed agreements.

- Support light bookkeeping tasks, expense categorization, and finance system upkeep as needed.



External Finance & Billing Communication

- Serve as a professional point of contact for customer and vendor finance/billing teams.

- Hop on calls with external AP/AR contacts to resolve billing disputes, payment questions, vendor onboarding requirements, or tax/W-9 documentation.

- Send polished, executive-grade written communications on behalf of the Vooma Finance team.

- Manage customer billing inquiries with care and professionalism, escalating complex issues appropriately.



Executive Administrative Support

- Draft and send executive notes, internal updates, and external correspondence on behalf of the CEO.

- Manage inbox triage, calendar coordination, and meeting prep as needed, primarily related to billing but may include additional tasks.

- Organize documents, contracts, and signed agreements in our internal systems.

- Coordinate logistics for executive priorities — from vendor signups to expense workflows.

- May also be tasked with assisting on associated tasks such as commissions QA.



Revenue Operations QA

- Run QA on billing, invoicing, and revenue workflows — catch discrepancies between contracts, CRM data, and what gets invoiced before they reach the customer.

- Audit customer accounts for data integrity issues (mismatched billing terms, missing PO numbers, incorrect contract dates, stale contacts, etc.).

- Spot-check automated billing runs and reconcile outputs against expected results.

- Maintain QA checklists and test cases for recurring revenue processes.

- Surface patterns in errors or near-misses and recommend process or system fixes.



Automations & Systems Work

- Build and maintain automations across our revenue stack — primarily HubSpot, Stripe, and Zapier, plus LedgerUp for billing automation — to reduce manual data entry and handoffs.

- Help maintain and improve our internal revenue and finance systems (HubSpot CRM, Stripe billing, LedgerUp, and supporting accounting tools).

- Identify repetitive workflows that are good candidates for automation and propose solutions.

- Document standard operating procedures (SOPs) for billing, AR, QA, and automation processes.

- Identify recurring issues or bottlenecks and surface them to leadership with proposed solutions.

- Support ad hoc operational projects across the business as priorities shift.



Requirements

- 2+ years of prior experience in billing, finance, accounting, or AR/AP operations is required. This is non-negotiable.

- Strong written and verbal English communication skills — comfortable drafting executive-quality
s and notes.

- Confidence and professionalism on live calls with finance and billing contacts at other companies.

- Demonstrated attention to detail, especially with numbers, dates, contract terms, and reconciliation.

- Ability to work independently in a fast-paced environment and manage multiple priorities with minimal supervision.

- Strong judgment about when to act independently vs. when to escalate.

- Comfort with US business hours and direct collaboration with US-based personnel.

- Hands-on experience with our core revenue stack — HubSpot, Stripe, and Zapier — is strongly preferred.





Preferred Skills

- Background supporting a US-based startup or high-growth company.

- Experience working directly with founders, CEOs, or other senior executives.

- Familiarity with revenue operations workflows (lead-to-cash, contracts, renewals).

- Comfort with AI tools (e.g., ChatGPT, Claude) for drafting and productivity.

- Light spreadsheet modeling skills (formulas, pivot tables, basic financial analysis).

- Exposure to QA testing, process automation, or systems integration work.





Training and Expectations

- Training and playbooks will be provided for our tools and systems.

- We expect fast learners who can quickly adapt, work efficiently with minimal supervision, communicate clearly, and know when to escalate.

- Strong emphasis on accuracy, discretion, and professionalism — this role handles sensitive financial and executive information.





Application Instructions

- To confirm you've read the entire job description, please respond with the subject line "Ready For Vooma RevOps".



Be sure to include the following in your application:

- Resume

- A short note (3–5 sentences) describing your prior billing, finance, or accounting experience

- Photo of your work area

title: DM Appointment Setter - Premium Coaching - Instagram & LinkedIn
description:
**IF YOU HAVE NO EXPERIENCE AS A DM SETTER FOR A FITNESS OR COACHING BUSINESS ON INSTAGRAM — DO NOT APPLY.



We are looking for an All Star DM appointment setter to join a premium coaching business with over 35,0000 organic followers in the health industry.



This is not your typical DM setter role.

It's your chance to work 1-1 with the founder, sharpen your sales skills, and play a key role in scaling a premium coaching business.

If you're hungry, coachable, and already experienced in DM setting, this could be a massive growth opportunity for you.

Check us out on 



THIS ROLE IS FOR YOU IF

— You're hungry to grow as a sales professional

— You take initiative and don't need to be chased

— You're reliable, proactive, and highly accountable

— You genuinely care about fitness, health, and personal development

— You thrive in a performance-driven environment



KEY RESPONSIBILITIES

— Engage with qualified leads via Instagram DMs and LinkedIn

— Run warm outreach and outbound conversations daily

— Consistently execute high-volume, high-quality outreach (100+ DMs/day)

— Build relationships and nurture prospects toward booking calls

— Keep the CRM organized and up to date in Notion



REQUIREMENTS

— Proven experience as a DM setter for a fitness or coaching business on Instagram

— Native-level English with natural, conversational written communication

— Ability to work independently and consistently hit daily and weekly KPIs

— Available 6–8 hours per day, 6 days per week

— Able to overlap with UK and US business hours

— Familiarity with CRM systems (Notion experience is a bonus)



DO NOT APPLY IF

— You have no experience DM setting for a fitness or coaching brand

— You rely on AI to write your messages for you

— You give up when things get hard

— You're not willing to put in extra effort to secure more calls



COMPENSATION & BENEFITS

— Competitive base salary + commission bonus for every closed deal (Coaching offer ranges from 2-4k per client)

— Strong earning potential for the right fit and overachievers



UNIQUE BENEFITS

— Proven sales training, scripts, and SOPs to rapidly level up your sales skills

— Access to cutting-edge AI tools and systems to help you work smarter & faster

— Direct 1-1 mentorship from the founder with over 7 years experience in the industry

— Growth opportunities to step into a closing or strategy role as you prove yourself

— Fully remote with flexibility, autonomy, and trust



HOW TO APPLY



Applications that miss any step will be ignored.



Title your submission: JOINING THE DREAM TEAM



STEP 1 — RECORD A LOOM VIDEO (30–60 SECONDS)

Answer the following 

— Why are you unique?

— Why would you be a great fit for this role?

— What experience do you have as a DM setter and in sales?



STEP 2 — COMPLETE THE WRITTEN TASK



DM SETTER SIMULATION

Context: Marcus is 31, works at a tech company in New York, and recently 
 Instagram features gym content, travel, and career wins. His latest caption says: "Been slacking on training lately, work's been insane."



Write the following responses:

1. Your opening DM to Marcus (keep it short and personalized)



2. Your follow-up message if he doesn't reply after 24 hours



Hint: Your follow-up should provide some form of value — for example, a helpful insight, resource, or lead magnet.



Both messages should feel natural, personalized, and specific to Marcus.



Generic outreach — or anything that sounds like it was written by ChatGPT — will be ignored.

title: Virtual Assistant — Platform Operations & Client Support
description:
About the Role

We're looking for a reliable, detail-oriented Virtual Assistant to support the day-to-day operations of our SaaS platform. You'll be the first line of defense for platform reliability, subscriber communications, and customer support — making sure our tools work, our
s go out on time, and our users feel heard.

This role is perfect for someone who thrives on consistency, takes ownership of recurring tasks, and communicates clearly with both clients and internal teams.



What You'll Do

• Platform Monitoring: Run daily platform health checks (calling, texting,
) and report status to the team.

•
 Operations: Build and schedule our Daily Insider
 each morning using Canva and Flodesk, and finalize the full week's schedule every Friday.

• Customer Support: Respond to incoming tickets in GoHighLevel, resolve standard issues, and log feature requests in Asana with the right priority and context.

• Weekly Reporting: Pull subscriber data from Stripe each week, build a clean report with analysis, and
 it to the team.

• Campaign Checks: Verify drip campaign delivery on the 1st and 15th of every month, and flag any delivery issues immediately.



What We're Looking For

• Hands-on familiarity with at least some of the following: GoHighLevel, Flodesk, Canva, Stripe, Asana.

• Strong written English — you'll be writing customer replies and internal reports.

• Extremely detail-oriented — you double-check dates, times, and numbers before hitting send.

• Dependable schedule — able to complete daily checks Monday through Friday without prompting.

• Comfortable following SOPs exactly as written, and flagging anything that doesn't match expectations.

Nice to Have

• Experience triaging and categorizing customer feedback into product/feature backlogs.

• Basic understanding of SaaS subscription metrics (MRR, churn, net growth).

• Graphic design comfort in Canva (beyond template editing).



How to Apply

Send us a brief introduction, your relevant experience, and your available hours per week. Bonus points if you mention which of the tools above you've used before and for how long.

title: Content Creator (Instagram)
description:
Why This Role Exists

We are not looking for a "Social Media Manager" to post updates and monitor comments. We need a Content Architect and Growth Operator who understands the mechanics of virality and the leverage of a creator ecosystem.



This role exists to transform our organic social presence into a high-performance acquisition channel. You will bridge the gap between creative storytelling and algorithmic performance, ensuring our Reels, Shorts, and Creator partnerships aren't just "aesthetic"—they are engineered for reach, retention, and revenue. By building a scalable Creator Program, you provide the Founder and Marketing Team with massive leverage, turning our brand into a content powerhouse that operates far beyond the capacity of a traditional internal team.



What You’ll Be Responsible For (Outcomes)

Architect and execute a high-velocity short-form video strategy across Instagram, YouTube, and LinkedIn. You own the hook, the script, and the retention logic that forces the algorithm to distribute our content.

Design, launch, and scale our Creator Program from the ground up. This includes structuring incentive models, creating "Virality Playbooks," and building the infrastructure to manage a fleet of external voices.

Provide strategic input on high-level assets—including website headlines, campaign visuals, and landing page structures—ensuring a cohesive, conversion-focused narrative across all touchpoints.

Identify emerging cultural and platform trends early and translate them into our B2B niche before they become saturated, maintaining our position as a forward-thinking market leader.

Move beyond vanity metrics. You will analyze watch-time data and drop-off points to relentlessly iterate on formats, doubling down on what drives follower growth and pipeline velocity.

Requirements

What You’ve Done Before

You have a proven track record (and the case studies to prove it) of growing accounts and generating millions of views through strategic short-form video.

You have experience recruiting, onboarding, and managing creators or influencers, moving past one-off posts into long-term performance partnerships.

You are an expert in narrative tension and retention editing. You know how to stop the scroll in the first 1.5 seconds.

You understand how to make professional services "bingeable" without sacrificing brand authority or institutional trust.

Who You Are

You don't wait for a content calendar. You spot a gap in the market, script the solution, and coordinate the production autonomously.

You use metrics to validate your creative intuition, but you understand that "virality" requires a human touch that a spreadsheet can't always predict.

You don't think in "posts"; you think in "franchises." You build repeatable content formats that scale and compound over time.

You are constantly studying platform updates and creator psychology to find the next 1?ge in distribution.

Who This Is NOT for

The "Aesthetic" Curator: If your main focus is on color palettes and grid layouts rather than watch-time and shareability, this is not a fit.

The Task-Follower: If you need a script provided to you to start filming, you will struggle in this high-autonomy role.

The Generalist: If you treat Reels the same way you treat a static LinkedIn post, you won't achieve the scale we are looking for.

What Success Looks Like

Month 1: Comprehensive audit of current social performance; first "Viral Format" pilot launched; Creator Program incentive structure finalized.

Month 3: A consistent 2x–3x lift in organic reach via Reels/Shorts; first cohort of 5–10 creators actively producing content under your guidelines.

Month 6: Organic social is a primary driver of top-of-funnel awareness; our Creator Program is a self-sustaining engine providing a constant stream of high-quality assets for the marketing team.

Minimum Technical and Work Environment Requirements:



Internet Connection:

Primary internet connection with a minimum speed of 15 Mbps.

Backup internet connection with at least 10 Mbps.

Backup connection must be capable of supporting work during a power outage.

Primary Device:

Desktop or laptop equipped with at least:

Intel Core i5 (8th generation or newer), Intel Core i3 (10th generation or newer), AMD Ryzen 5, or an equivalent processor.

A minimum of 8 GB RAM.

Backup Device:

Must meet or exceed the performance of an Intel Core i3 processor.

Must be functional during power interruptions.

A functioning webcam.

A noise-canceling USB headset.

A quiet, dedicated home office space.

Peripherals and Workspace: A smartphone for communication and verification purposes.

title: AI Automation Specialist
description:
Do you look at a manual, repetitive task and think, "There’s an API for that"?



We are looking for a brilliant AI Automation Specialist to help us move at the speed of light. This isn't just a technical role; it’s a creative one. You will be the architect of our digital nervous system—connecting our tools, automating our workflows, and layering in AI to make our team 10x more efficient.



The Mission

Your goal is to eliminate friction. You’ll audit our current workflows, identify bottlenecks, and build automated solutions that allow our humans to focus on high-level strategy while your bots handle the rest.



What You’ll Own:

* Workflow Engineering: Designing and maintaining sophisticated automations (using tools like Zapier, Make/Integromat, or custom scripts).

* AI Integration: Implementing LLMs (OpenAI, Anthropic) and AI tools into our daily operations to enhance content, data analysis, and customer touchpoints.

* System Audits: Constantly looking for "waste" in our processes and proposing automated fixes.

* Database Management: Ensuring data flows seamlessly and accurately between our CRM, project management tools, and communication channels.

* Troubleshooting: Being the first responder when a "zap" breaks or an API changes.



Are You Our Ideal Candidate?

* The Logic Master: You understand "If This, Then That" logic at an advanced level.

* The AI Early Adopter: You aren't just using ChatGPT for
s; you’re building with it. You understand prompt engineering and how to connect AI to external data.

* The Problem Solver: You don’t wait for instructions. You see a broken process and you fix it.

* The Communicator: You can explain a complex automation to a non-tech tea
mber so they understand the value.



Why Join Us?

We don't want a "yes-person." We want a builder. If you have a better way to do things, we’ll give you the tools and the autonomy to build it. Help us define what the future of our firm looks like.



Ready to build the future with us?

title: Paralegal
description:
Join Our Legal Team: High-Impact Paralegal (U.S. Private Company)



Are you a master of organization with a sharp legal mind? We are looking for a proactive Paralegal to serve as the backbone of our legal operations. This isn't just about filing paperwork; it’s about ensuring our legal team moves with precision and speed in a fast-paced corporate environment.



The Mission

As our Paralegal, you will be the right hand to our attorneys. You’ll take ownership of the "legal engine"—managing the flow of information, conducting deep-dive research, and ensuring no deadline ever slips through the cracks. We need someone who prides themselves on being three steps ahead.



Your Day-to-Day Impact

* Document Architecture: Beyond just drafting, you will refine contracts, pleadings, and correspondence to ensure they are airtight and professional.

* Strategic Research: You’ll dig into the facts and the law, providing clear, concise summaries that help our attorneys make informed decisions.

* Command & Control: You will own our case management systems, maintaining a digital and physical filing structure that keeps us audit-ready at all times.

* Litigation & Hearing Support: From due diligence to trial prep, you’ll be the logistics expert behind our successful hearings and mediations.

* Liaison Excellence: Serve as a primary point of contact for clients, court officials, and outside counsel, representing the firm with poise and clarity.

* Deadline Defense: You’ll manage complex attorney calendars, ensuring every filing and regulatory requirement is met ahead of schedule.



What You Bring to the Table

* The Foundation: An Associate’s degree (or equivalent professional experience) in a legal or high-level administrative capacity.

* The Mindset: You don't just find problems; you find solutions. You thrive when things are moving fast and can pivot between tasks without losing your focus.

* Technical Precision: An obsession with detail. You catch the typos and inconsistencies that others miss.

* Integrity: Absolute discretion. You understand the weight of handling sensitive, confidential corporate information.



How to Apply

Ready to take the next step? Please submit your application here:

title: Merchandising Specialist, Websites
description:
Spotix is a US-based e-commerce retailer specializing in premium hearth, patio, and BBQ products. We are looking for a highly meticulous Product Specialist to manage our online catalog and ensure every product on our site is accurate and high-quality. 



In this role, you will handle the entire product lifecycle on Shopify. This involves onboarding new items quickly, retiring old ones, and performing regular audits to make sure all data and images are accurate. You will be expected to perform regular self-audits to ensure all product data, descriptions, and digital assets meet the highest standards of accuracy. You need to be a fast learner who can quickly understand our product lines and a great researcher who is comfortable searching for technical specs to ensure our listings are complete and helpful for customers.



A big part of your day will involve mastering our tech stack, specifically NetSuite, Shopify, and Celigo. You will handle data uploads, fix sync errors, and ensure all product filters are mapped correctly. We want someone who is tech-savvy and comfortable using AI tools to work faster. You will also be responsible for keeping our pricing accurate across all channels and coordinating with our brand partners to get the information you need. Additionally, you will assist in optimizing the search visibility of assigned categories by implementing SEO best practices across all digital touchpoints.



We need someone with an extreme attention to detail who takes pride in near-perfect work. You should be an expert in Excel or Google Sheets and comfortable with complex formulas. Because our pace is fast, you must be able to switch directions quickly when urgent tasks pop up. We value people who are accountable, work well without constant guidance, and are always looking for ways to take on more responsibility.



Test Requirement



After we review your application, qualified candidates will be asked to complete a short sample task. This task mirrors the actual daily work and is a mandatory step to get an interview. We will be looking specifically at your ability to research products, your spreadsheet skills, and your attention to detail.

title: Amazon Virtual Assistant
description:
Amazon PPC Assistant – Remote (Full-Time)



Are you detail-oriented, love working with data, and want to grow inside one of Europe's leading Amazon PPC agencies?

Then keep reading – this might be exactly the role you've been looking for.



About Us

We are Fox Performance, an Amazon PPC agency founded in 2018. We work mainly with German clients, but also serve international brands across Europe and the USA. Our clients come from all kinds of industries – beauty, supplements, home & living, electronics, pet products, fashion, you name it.



We're a team of true Amazon nerds: always on top of new features, always testing, always looking for the next edge to push our clients ahead. We don't believe in autopilot – we believe in craftsmanship, data, and constant improvement.

Now we're looking for an Amazon PPC Assistant to support our Amazon Account Managers and help us scale even faster.



What You'll Be Doing



Keyword Research – using tools like Helium 10, Cerebro, Brand Analytics and Amazon's own data to find the keywords that drive sales.

Campaign Setup – building out Sponsored Products, Sponsored Brands and Sponsored Display campaigns based on the structures and templates we've developed.

Bulk Sheet Work – preparing, editing and uploading Amazon bulk files cleanly and accurately.

Negative Keyword Mining – pulling search term reports, identifying waste, and adding negatives to keep ACoS healthy.

Reporting Support – helping prepare weekly and monthly client reports, pulling data from Seller Central, Helium 10 and our internal dashboards.

Listing Support – helping with keyword integration into titles, bullets and backend search terms.

Operational Tasks – supporting your Account Manager with whatever needs to be done to keep accounts running smoothly.



You will be the right hand of our PPC Managers – the person who keeps everything organized, accurate and on time.



What We're Looking For



At least 1 year of hands-on experience with Amazon Seller Central and/or Amazon Advertising Console or eCommerce work would be great BUT the most important thing for us is that you are completely reliable and are truly committed to growing your skills in the Amazon business, and that you’re willing to give it your all



Familiarity with Helium 10 (Cerebro, Magnet, Frankenstein) or similar tools.



Strong Excel / Google Sheets skills (filters, pivot tables, VLOOKUP / XLOOKUP – the basics that matter).



Excellent written and spoken English.



High attention to detail – you double-check your work before hitting submit.



Reliable, organized, and great at following SOPs.



A stable internet connection and a quiet remote work setup.



Bonus: experience with bulk file operations, Amazon DSP, or German marketplace (DE).





WHAT WE DON'T NEED

Whether you're looking for a temporary position, have multiple jobs at once, or just want to take a break from life—we're looking for top-notch part-time workers



What We Offer

The Essentials



100% Remote – work from anywhere in the Philippines.



Full-time, long-term position – we're looking for someone to grow with us, not a short-term gig.



Competitive salary in USD, paid reliably every month. (no limits on the long run)





If you read the full Text start your message with "HI WOLF"

title: Gaming YouTube Editor — Bertii (100K Views/Month, Scaling Fast)
description:
About the Role:

Looking for a part-time video editor who lives and breathes gaming content. You'll be editing Marathon (Bungie extraction shooter) gameplay and commentary into polished long-form YouTube videos, cutting Shorts, and helping scale Bertii — a fast-growing gaming channel currently at 841 subs with 67K views in the last 28 days, racing to 10K subs.

What You'll Be Doing:



Editing 5-8 minute Marathon commentary/analysis videos from raw webcam footage + gameplay B-roll + voiceover

Cutting 30-45 second Shorts from long-form content and standalone clips

Adding text overlays (max 3 words, bold white/yellow/red), zoom-ins on key lines, cinematic transitions, and SFX timed to voiceover

Syncing Marathon gameplay footage under commentary with smart cutaways (no talking head 10+ seconds without break)

Layering royalty-free background music that shifts mood per section (excitement ? worry ? hype ? unease)

Building retention-first pacing — every edit must serve a purpose, not variety for variety's sake

Following detailed editor briefs provided per video (audio notes, visual direction, Shorts to cut)

Delivering final exports ready to upload



Brand Style You'll Be Working In:



Colors: Red, teal/cyan, black

Captions: Max 3 words per caption, animate in (never pop-in)

Transitions: Whoosh on scene changes, risers before key 
nts, hits on reveals

Pacing: No dead air, cuts keep the eye in the same screen spot, graphics animate in

Tone: Fast, direct, high-energy — matches the talent's on-camera style



Requirements:



Experience editing gaming YouTube content (send samples — bonus if FPS, extraction, or Destiny/Bungie content)

Proficiency in CapCut (primary) or Premiere / DaVinci Resolve

Strong understanding of YouTube retention mechanics — hooks, retention loops, curiosity resets, Shorts pacing

Fast turnaround — 24-48 hour delivery from receiving raw footage + brief

Reliable communication and consistent delivery (this role is built on deadlines)

Strong English communication



Nice to Have:



Active Marathon player or extraction shooter knowledge

Thumbnail design experience (Pikzels, Photoshop, or similar)

Understanding of YouTube Shorts strategy and algorithm signals

Familiarity with OpusClip for Shorts workflow

You actually watch gaming YouTube and can reference creators like Penguinz0, Asmongold, Bellular News, etc.



Compensation & Structure:



Pay per video (rate based on experience — send your rate with samples)

Starting at 2-3 long-forms per week + associated Shorts cutdowns

Opportunity to scale with the channel as it grows



How to Apply:



Portfolio of 2-3 gaming edits

Your CapCut/Premiere proficiency level

Your rate per long-form + rate per Short

Quick note on why you want to work on Marathon content specifically

title: Real Estate Media Virtual Assistant (Photo QC + Media Delivery) | Photoshop / Lightroom
description:
Job Description



We are looking for a detail-oriented Virtual Assistant to help with quality control and delivery of real estate media.



This role is primarily responsible for reviewing real estate photos and videos before they are delivered to clients to ensure everything looks correct, complete, and professional.



You will review large batches of photos quickly and accurately, catching editing issues before delivery.

A typical shift may involve reviewing 100–200+ photos, so speed, focus, and attention to detail are extremely important.

This role is ideal for someone who enjoys structured work, visual detail, and organized systems.

Compensation: $4–$8 USD/hour

Hours: 10–20 hours per week

Preferred schedule: Morning EST or CST



Your Main Responsibility (Quality Control)



This is the most important part of the role.



You will:

• Review 100+ real estate photos per shift

• Check for editing issues such as:

exposure problems

color balance issues

crooked vertical lines

cropping mistakes



HDR blending errors



object removal mistakes (trash cans, cords, etc.)

• Ensure photo order and folder structure are correct

• Confirm files are ready for delivery to clients

• Flag issues to the editing team when something needs fixing



You must be able to move through large batches of photos efficiently without missing mistakes.



Additional Responsibilities

File Organization

• Maintain organized Google Drive folders

• Upload and deliver final media



Instagram Outreach

• Send outreach messages to potential clients

• Track conversations and follow-ups



QC and media delivery are the core responsibilities, outreach is secondary.

Required Skills

Candidates must have real photo editing experience, specifically:

• Adobe Lightroom

• Adobe Photoshop



Important:

Canva experience does NOT count as Photoshop experience for this role.

You do not need to be a full editor, but you must be able to recognize when an image looks incorrect.

You should understand:



• exposure issues

• color balance

• vertical line correction

• cropping problems

• HDR blending issues



Major Bonus Experience

Experience with real estate media workflows is a major advantage.



Examples include:

• HDPhotoHub

• Spiro

• AutoHDR

• Real estate media delivery platforms

• HDR editing workflows



Candidates with these skills usually ramp up much faster.



Ideal Candidate Background



The best candidates often come from:

• Photo editors

• Real estate media virtual assistants

• Real estate marketing assistants

• Photo retouchers

• Post-production assistants



Traits We Look For



You are likely a great fit if you are:

• Extremely detail oriented

• Comfortable reviewing large batches of images quickly

• Organized and process-driven

• Able to work independently after training

• Reliable and consistent with your schedule

• Comfortable communicating when issues arise



Non-Negotiables

• Availability: 10–20 hours per week

• Morning availability (EST/CST preferred)

• Reliable internet connection (large files involved)

• Clear written English

• Photoshop and Lightroom familiarity

• Ownership mindset



How to Apply



Please include the following in your application:



A brief introduction about your experience with Photoshop and Lightroom



Your internet speed



Links to any photo editing work or portfolio



Your availability (days and hours)



To confirm you read this entire job post, please include the phrase:

“I care about details.”

at the top of your application.

Applications that do not include this phrase will not be considered.

title: Texting Outreach Specialist
description:
ABOUT THE ROLE

JM Land is a small, family-run land flipping company based in the US. We find vacant land, reach out to owners, and make deals that work for everyone. We started this business in 2023, and we're a tight team of 3, remote, growing fast, and having fun doing it.



We're looking for a Texting Outreach Specialist to join us. You'll be texting real landowners in the US every day, having conversations with them, figuring out if they're open to selling, and passing the right ones to our acquisitions team.



IMPORTANT: This is NOT a formal or corporate role. You'll be texting regular Americans - farmers, retirees, everyday people. Messages need to sound like they came from a real person, not a business. If you naturally write in a stiff or overly formal way, this role probably isn't the right fit.



WHAT YOU'LL DO DAY-TO-DAY:

- Send outbound text batches to landowners using Smarter Contact

- Reply to incoming messages and keep conversations going naturally

- Screen leads and figure out who's motivated to sell

- Update statuses and notes in Follow Up Boss

- Tag and pass warm and hot leads to our acquisitions team

- Track your daily KPIs (texts sent, replies, leads qualified)

- Use Land ID to look up basic property info when needed



Full training provided on all tools: Smarter Contact, Follow Up Boss, and Land ID.



WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR:

- Excellent written English that's casual, warm, and conversational - not formal

- Comfortable sending and managing a high volume of texts daily

- Organized and consistent - you follow up without being told to

- Quick to respond and good at reading tone in messages

- Self-directed - you manage your own time and hit your numbers

- Available to work US daytime hours (EST)



OUR CORE VALUES

We believe in real communication - understanding first, then being understood. We care about the small details, because a name, a word, or a timely follow-up can make all the difference. We're growth-oriented and always hungry to do more. We're a small team that supports each other, and we want someone who's a go-getter and doesn't wait to be told what's next.

One more thing - if you've read this far and you're detail-oriented like we need you to be, start your application message with the word "Pineapple." Don't mention it, don't explain it, just start with it. This is how we know you actually read this.



HOW TO APPLY

Send us your resume and a quick intro about yourself. Then answer these two things:

First, write two different versions of a first text you'd send a landowner - one for someone in their 60s who owns a rural lot they probably haven't visited in years, and one for someone younger who bought land recently and might be more guarded. Keep both casual and short. Then in one or two sentences, explain what you changed between the two and why.

Second, tell us about a time you had to figure something out on your own without being given clear instructions. What did you do?

Use the subject line: "I Am Ready to Connect"

Applications without all of the above will not be reviewed.

title: Short-form Video Editor & Content Manager
description:
We are a fast-growing beauty & wellness ecommerce brand selling across Singapore, Malaysia, and Hong Kong. We are looking for a Multimedia Content Designer to create and manage all of our TikTok, Instagram, and ecommerce visuals.



This is a long-term remote role for someone who enjoys producing content that looks good and performs well.



What you will do

???? Video Editing (Main focus)



Edit short-form videos for:



TikTok



Instagram Reels



Shopee & TikTok Shop product pages



Track which videos and designs perform best



Suggest improvements based on results



???? Graphic Design



Design:



Social media posts



Ecommerce banners



Promotion visuals



Campaign creatives



Maintain brand look and consistency





What we’re looking for



Strong video editing skills (CapCut, Premiere Pro, etc.)



Graphic design skills (Photoshop, Canva, Illustrator, etc.)



Experience creating content for TikTok and Instagram



Able to follow brand style and improve it



Reliable, fast, and organised



Good English communication



You do NOT need to be on camera.

We provide all raw footage and creative direction.



At least 30% of content should beat average performance



Submit a short weekly performance report



Salary



USD 700 – 1,000 per month

(based on skill, speed, and experience)



Long-term role with growth potential.



How to apply



Please send:



Your resume to 
 with the title [VIDEO EDITOR APPLICATION]



Your portfolio (video + design samples)



Applications without portfolios will not be reviewed.

title: Remote Care Coordinator Assistant
description:
About TeamUp Therapy



TeamUp Therapy is a pediatric telehealth practice providing speech and occupational therapy to families across Georgia. We believe in removing barriers to care—making therapy ultra-convenient, family-centered, and no-waitlist. Our mission is to help every child reach their full potential through compassionate, high-quality care.



Position Summary



The Care Coordinator Assistant plays a key supporting role in helping children begin therapy quickly and ensuring families have a smooth onboarding experience. You’ll work closely with our Care Coordinator to match families with therapists, manage scheduling logistics, and keep our systems organized.



This role is perfect for someone who is detail-oriented, compassionate, and tech-savvy—with strong communication skills and a heart for helping families access care.



Core Responsibilities

-Therapist Matching & Waitlist Management

-Update and maintain the Therapist Matching Tracker daily.

-Assist in matching families with available therapists based on schedule, language, and insurance.

-Send text messages to confirm family availability and preferences.

-Track matched families and update their records in Dock and Fusion Web Clinic.



Scheduling Coordination

-Ensure families who have completed evaluations are scheduled promptly.

-Send reminders to therapists for monthly availability updates.

-Coordinate with the Care Coordinator to address any scheduling conflicts or delays.



Communication Support

-Communicate with families via text or phone to confirm appointments and share updates.

-Join phone calls with the Care Coordinator when needed for family follow-up or matching.

-Maintain a warm, professional, and family-centered communication style at all times.



Reporting & Organization

-Prepare short weekly summaries of new referrals, pending matches, and bottlenecks.

-Maintain organized records in Google Sheets, Docs, and Slides.

-Support ad-hoc admin projects related to scheduling and family coordination.



Must-Have Skills & Experience

-Excellent English communication skills—clear and confident on phone calls.

-Strong organizational and data entry skills.

-Comfortable using Google Sheets, Docs, and Slides.

-Professional, calm, and compassionate communicator.

-Experience in healthcare coordination, scheduling, or customer service is a plus.





Schedule & Work Environment

-Weekly Hours: 40 hours/week

-Work Hours: 9am-5pm ET, Monday–Friday



Location: Remote (Philippines)



Training: Initial onboarding and shadowing with the Care Coordinator



Compensation & Classification

-Type: Independent Contractor

-Hourly Rate: $5-7 per hour (USD), depending on experience

-Plus a structured, performance-based bonus program



Success Metrics

-Families are matched with therapists quickly (within 48 hours of evaluation).

-Waitlist and scheduling records are consistently accurate and up to date.

-Communication with families is timely, warm, and professional.

-The Care Coordinator’s time is freed up to focus on high-value family conversations.



You can upload either a Google Drive sharing link or a YouTube link. Please submit it through this Google Form: 



Only candidates who meet the qualifications will be contacted.

title: Outreach Specialist - Creator, Affiliate, Influencer & Press Partnerships
description:
We’re looking for a proactive Outreach Specialist to lead partnerships with creators, affiliates, influencers, and media. Your role is to identify relevant partners, build relationships, and drive collaborations that expand brand awareness and revenue.



You’ll also help monitor conversations happening online about our brand and category, engaging with posts and comments to build relationships and identify partnership opportunities.



Responsibilities



- Identify and research creators, influencers, affiliates, and journalists aligned with our brand

- Conduct high-volume outreach via
, DMs, and partnership platforms

- Build and manage relationships with creators and media contacts

- Coordinate collaborations, product seeding, and affiliate partnerships

- Monitor social platforms for posts or discussions related to our brand and engage thoughtfully with comments and conversations

- Find relevant posts and threads where our brand is being discussed and respond appropriately

- Track outreach performance and maintain organized CRM/contact lists

- Help generate earned media opportunities and press mentions



Ideal Candidate



- Strong communicator who is comfortable reaching out to strangers

- Highly organized and persistent with follow-ups

- Experience with influencer marketing, affiliate programs, community engagement, or PR outreach

- Familiar with platforms like Instagram, TikTok, YouTube, X, Reddit, Substack, and podcasts

- Self-starter who can work independently and hit outreach targets



Bonus



- Existing relationships with creators or journalists

- Experience scaling affiliate programs

- Familiarity with health, wellness, or consumer brands

title: Creative Coordinator
description: We run a growing e-commerce brand (Sleep Karma) and produce a high volume of ads, videos, landing pages, and marketing content every week. We are looking for a highly organized, detail-oriented operator whose job is to make sure nothing falls through the cracks. You will manage our content production tracker, coordinate designers, editors, and contractors, follow up on deadlines, ask clarifying questions when work is stuck, and keep projects moving from idea ? draft ? final delivery. This is not a creative role — it is a coordination and execution role. The ideal person enjoys spreadsheets, checklists, and structure, communicates clearly, and takes ownership of making sure tasks get completed on time without constant supervision. You will work directly with the founder and become the central hub of our content workflow. Long-term position with stable hours and increasing responsibility for the right person.

title: Video Editor — Facebook Ads + AI TOOLS (EU/USA Markets)
description:
We run a fast-moving e-commerce brand selling health and wellness products across Europe — Germany, Sweden, UK, Norway, and more markets launching soon.



You'll be part of a dedicated creative team producing video ads that actually sell. Not brand fluff — direct-response video that drives clicks, leads, and purchases on Meta 
/Instagram).



You'll work closely with our Creative Strategist who briefs every ad with a clear angle, hook, and reference. Your job is to bring that brief to life using AI tools — fast, at quality, across multiple products and markets.



What You'll Be Doing



Producing short-form video ads (15–60 sec): UGC-style, talking head, animated AI video, product demo

Using AI tools to generate and enhance footage — Higgsfield, Kling, VEO3, HeyGen, or equivalent

Adapting winning ads into EU languages (German, Swedish, French, Norwegian) using AI dubbing and TTS

Sourcing B-roll from TikTok, YouTube Shorts, and stock libraries for compelling hooks

Iterating fast based on performance feedback

Working across multiple products simultaneously

Must Have



Proven direct-response video ads (Meta / TikTok / YouTube)

Hands-on with AI video tools: Higgsfield, Kling, VEO3, HeyGen, or similar

EU language adaptation via AI dubbing/TTS

Strong sense of hook and pacing — knows why the first 3 seconds matter

Fast turnaround

Strong Plus



Familiar with Ecom Talent creative strategy frameworks

Health/beauty/wellness product ad experience

Not Required



Studio equipment

Traditional editing background — we care about AI leverage and output quality

What We Offer



Stable consistent work — full creative pipeline, briefs always ready

Weekly creative strategy call to align on direction and performance

Bonus system tied to ad performance — winning ads = more earnings

Starting $8/hr, open to more for strong AI skills

Remote, async-friendly

Multiple products and markets — always something new

How to Apply



3–5 examples of video ads you've produced (direct-response preferred)

List all AI tools you use for video creation and describe what you've made with each

Short note: how you'd adapt a video ad from English into German or Swedish using AI

Applications without examples will not be reviewed.



List all AI tools you've used to create video ads and describe what you made with each

title: E-commerce Assistant Store Manager
description:
We operate three profitable E-commerce stores and are currently launching our fourth. As we continue to scale, we’re looking for a highly experienced E-commerce Assistant Store Manager to handle day-to-day operations, support customers across multiple channels, and help keep our systems running smoothly.



This is a senior-level role with long-term potential for the right candidate. Please read the full job description and answer all questions for your application to be considered.



IMPORTANT: Please read the entire job description and follow the application instructions carefully to be considered.



Responsibilities

• Manage customer inquiries via phone,
, and chat with professionalism and accuracy.

• Handle RFQs, returns/exchanges, complaints, disputes, and negative reviews.

• Collect and maintain positive customer reviews and overall satisfaction.

• Support sales-related tasks and assist in improving store performance.

• Collaborate with the CS, Orders, and Product teams to share insights and ensure a consistent customer experience.

• Identify process gaps, recommend improvements, and contribute to SOP updates.

• Perform daily administrative tasks, including EOS reports and operational updates.

• Proactively manage assigned tasks without waiting for instructions.



What You Need to Succeed -



Required Experience:

• 2+ years in E-commerce operations (customer service + order management + product management).

• Proven Shopify experience (listings, inventory, bulk updates, app usage).

• Strong phone communication skills and ability to handle challenging conversations calmly.

• Ability to manage multiple priorities in a fast-paced environment.

• Strong attention to detail (include the word mushroom in your application).



Technical Requirements:

• Proficiency in Shopify, ClickUp, Airtable, CRM tools, and Google Workspace.

• Reliable computer + 20 Mbps+ internet.

• Backup solutions for both power and internet outages.



Work Style:

• Self-directed - you take initiative and solve problems independently.

• Detail-oriented with a focus on accuracy.

• Customer-focused - complaints are opportunities to improve systems.

• Process-minded - you document and refine workflows naturally.



Work Schedule:

• Full-time, 40 hours/week

• US business hours: 9 PM–6 AM or 10 PM–7 AM PHT

• 1-hour break

• Five days per week



You're NOT a Fit If:

• You need micromanagement or detailed daily task lists

• You can't work 9 PM–7 AM PHT consistently

• You experience frequent power/internet outages without backup solutions

• You view this as temporary income between other opportunities



Before You Apply - Please Confirm:

• Weekly payments for the first 4 weeks (starting from week 3), then bi-monthly every other Tuesday.

• Full-time role, US hours.

• Must be open to a two-month trial period.

• Daily End of Shift (EOS) report answering:

a) What did you do today? (detailed description)

b) What issues did you run into?

c) Anything you need help with?

If you agree to all terms, write “I AGREE TO ALL TERMS” and answer the questions below.



Application Instructions (Follow Exactly) -



Subject Line:

[Your First Name] – I Am Your New E-commerce Assistant Store Manager

Example: Kevin – I Am Your New E-commerce Assistant Store Manager



Submit:

• Cover letter (focused on relevant e-commerce experience)

• Resume



Answer These Questions (Complete Sentences Required):

1. Describe your most relevant e-commerce operations experience (platforms used, team size, order volume, responsibilities).

2. What specific Shopify tasks have you performed?

3. What are your current work commitments and availability?

4. Provide your internet speed (include screenshot), computer specifications, and backup solutions for power & internet issues.

5. Provide one example of a difficult customer situation you handled and how you resolved it.

6. Why are you interested in this specific role instead of other VA positions?



Important: AI-generated or template responses will be immediately disqualified. We're looking for thoughtful, specific answers that demonstrate you read and understood this posting.

description:

- Experience in Adobe Premiere Pro

- With own Adobe Premiere Pro software

- Excellent written and verbal English communication skills

- Creative and innovative with attention to detail

- Using MacBook or being able to edit Mac files is PREFERRED

- Knowledge of graphic design (Adobe Photoshop/Illustrator) is a PLUS

Tasks:

*Editing 4k videos for a YouTube channel

*Editing short-form videos for TikTok, YouTube, and Instagram

*Creating/editing content for social media

*Organizing video files and storage



Perks:

*You can work as much as you want. I will pay you a salary but if you work extra hours you will get paid.

*Flexible Vacation, if you need time off just let me know.

*Opportunity to advance/get bonuses, If you do a good job I will give you a raise and bonuses.



TO APPLY FOR THE JOB:

1. Change the subject line to “I Want to Work for You [Insert the name of my mom who is the co-owner of Bdancewear]

2. At the top of your message, write 2-3 sentences on why you would like this position, and why you are a good fit. Do not write more than that, or else your application will be deleted.

3. Write out the name of one of the passion products I featured on my channel (check out my vlogs on my YouTube channel: Travis Marziani)

5. Link to a sample video that you've edited in the past.



Make sure to follow all the steps above. This is a great job opportunity with the ability to get bonuses and raises, so I will only look at applicants who really want the job. If I interview you, there will be a short call between us, and a video will be required



Do not write more than what I have asked you above. If you write more than what is requested above, I will ignore your job post.



Thank you,

Travis Marziani

title: Executive Assistant to CEO
description:
Position Overview:



As the Executive Assistant to the CEO, you will play a pivotal role in ensuring the smooth and efficient functioning of the executive office. Your primary responsibility will be to provide comprehensive administrative support to the CEO, managing their schedule, and coordinating various tasks to enhance productivity. Your ability to maintain confidentiality, exercise sound judgment, and proactively handle administrative duties will contribute to the overall effectiveness of the CEO's office.





Pay Range: $8 per hour with a performance review scheduled after 90 days of employment. We believe in rewarding exceptional talents.





About Power Plus Systems:



Power Plus Systems LLC has been a dominant force in the residential electrical contracting industry for two decades, and we continue to lead the way. Our vision is to successfully wire 28,000 homes to completion by the year 2029, ensuring safe and efficient electrical solutions, thereby making a positive impact on the lives of our customers and communities. At Power Plus Systems, LLC, a position with us isn't just a job; it's an opportunity to grow and develop within a company that genuinely appreciates your contributions and dedication to our shared mission.





Objectives:

• Manage and organize the CEO's daily schedule, including meetings, appointments, and travel arrangements.

• Act as a gatekeeper, screening and prioritizing communications to the CEO.

• Coordinate and facilitate communication between the CEO and internal/external stakeholders.

• Anticipate the CEO's needs and proactively handle tasks to ensure optimal time management.

• Coordinate special projects and initiatives as assigned by the CEO.





Competencies:

• Exceptional organizational and multitasking skills, with keen attention to detail.

• Strong written and verbal communication skills.

• Ability to maintain confidentiality and exercise discretion in handling sensitive information.

• Proficient in using Microsoft Office and Google Suites.

• Familiarity with scheduling software; experience with additional productivity tools is an advantage.

• Strong interpersonal skills with the ability to interact effectively with individuals at all levels.

• Proactive problem solver and resourceful thinker.





Equipment Requirements:

• Must own a reliable computer or laptop capable of handling administrative tasks efficiently.

• Must own and actively use an iPhone and/or MacBook or Mac computer for efficient communication and task management.

• High-speed internet connection to support video calls, cloud-based collaboration, and remote work.





Physical Requirements:

• Extended periods of sitting at a desk and working on a computer.



Benefits:

• Growth opportunities in a well-established company.

• Ongoing training and professional development opportunities.

• Opportunity for advancement within the company.

• A supportive and collaborative work environment.

• Company-observed paid United States holidays (full time).

• Paid vacation.





How to Apply:



If you are ready to join Power Plus Systems, LLC, a well-established residential electrical contractor that values its tea
mbers and offers excellent benefits, please submit your application through the link below.




/internationalcareers



Power Plus Systems, LLC is an equal opportunity employer and welcomes applicants from all backgrounds to apply.



Join us at Power Plus Systems, LLC, and be part of our continued success as we embark on the next 20 years of excellence in residential electrical contracting!

title: Virtual Assistant – HR, Payroll, Bookkeeping & Operations (Full-Time)
description:
Job Overview



We are a growing U.S.-based company seeking a highly organized, detail-oriented, and trustworthy Virtual Assistant to manage HR administration, payroll, bookkeeping, sales tax reporting, and general office operations.



This role is critical to our daily operations and financial accuracy. You will handle contractor and employee administration, weekly payroll, commissions, bookkeeping in QuickBooks, sales tax reporting, annual renewals, and serve as the primary person answering incoming customer service calls.



This is a full-time (40 hours per week), long-term position.



Work Schedule & Pay



Hours: 40 hours per week



Pay Rate: $3–$6 USD per hour, based on experience



Pay Schedule: Paid weekly every Thursday



Pay Period: Friday through Thursday, paid on the same Thursday



Payment Method: Wise (USD converted to PHP and deposited directly into your bank account)



Tools & Equipment



Must have your own computer and stable internet connection



We will provide:



Company
 address



Company phone number via RingCentral



Access to QuickBooks, Google Workspace, and shared Google Sheets



Key Responsibilities

HR & Workforce Administration



Manage onboarding and offboarding for 1099 contractors



Prepare for and assist with onboarding of W-2 employees (coming soon)



Maintain accurate personnel and contractor records



Track Paid Time Off (PTO) and holiday pay (where applicable)



Maintain confidentiality of all HR and payroll information



Serve as an administrative point of contact for tea
mbers



Payroll & Commissions



Process weekly payroll for:



1099 contractors



W-2 employees (as they are added)



Ensure payroll is processed accurately for the Friday–Thursday pay period and paid the same Thursday



Handle commission calculations and payroll splits



Maintain and update commission tracking in Google Sheets



Coordinate hourly pay for office staff and commission-based pay for sales reps



Review payroll data for accuracy before processing in QuickBooks



Bookkeeping & Financial Management



Perform general bookkeeping in QuickBooks, including:



Recording incoming payments (income)



Recording outgoing payments (expenses)



Reconcile weekly and monthly transactions



Maintain clean, organized financial records



Generate financial reports, including:



Profit & Loss (P&L) reports



Expense and income summaries



Prepare bookkeeping records for quarterly and annual review



Sales Tax & Monthly Reporting



Generate monthly sales tax reports



Prepare sales tax filings due on the 15th of each month



Present sales tax reports for management approval prior to submission



Maintain proper documentation of all sales tax filings



Annual, Compliance & Renewal Tasks



Maintain a master renewal tracker for all annual and recurring items, including:



Business annual reports (EIN/state filings)



General liability insurance renewal



Lease renewals



Chamber of Commerce memberships



Other required licenses, subscriptions, and renewals



Prepare financial documentation for our CPA, including:



Expense reports



Income summaries



Payroll records



Assist with year-end preparation and annual reviews



Customer Service & Phone Support



Serve as the primary person answering incoming phone calls



Handle basic customer service inquiries professionally and efficiently



Route calls internally as needed



Maintain a friendly, professional phone presence



Allow showroom staff to focus on in-person customers without interruption



General Administrative & Operations Support



Maintain organized digital filing systems



Track deadlines and follow up on pending tasks



Communicate clearly with management and internal teams



Identify opportunities to improve processes and organization



Provide general administrative support as needed



Required Qualifications



Proven experience in HR administration, payroll, and bookkeeping



Strong working knowledge of QuickBooks



Experience handling 1099 contractors (W-2 experience is a plus)



Strong skills in Google Sheets / Excel



Experience managing commissions and payroll splits



High attention to detail and accuracy



Strong organizational and time management skills



Clear written and spoken English



Comfortable answering phone calls and speaking with customers



Preferred Qualifications (Nice to Have)



Experience working with U.S.-based companies



Familiarity with U.S. payroll and sales tax processes



Experience supporting remote teams in multiple countries



Background in bookkeeping, accounting, or business administration



What We’re Looking For



Reliable and consistent work ethic



Honest and trustworthy with sensitive financial information



Proactive, organized, and detail-oriented



Comfortable handling multiple responsibilities



Interested in a long-term role with growth potential



How to Apply



Please include:



A short introduction video about yourself sent on WhatsApp to
Your experience with QuickBooks, payroll, HR, and bookkeeping



Your expected hourly rate (USD)



Your availability (hours per week)

title: English On-Camera Spokesperson (YouTube News Channel)
