title: Operations Manager
description:
Company: SHOPLALA PTE. LTD. (Singapore)

Industry: Amazon E-commerce – Gardening Products

Location: Remote (Philippines or Vietnam preferred)

Remuneration: USD $1,000–$3,000/month (based on experience and skill set; latest 6 months salary proof required)

Commitment: Full-time Remote (Flexible Hours: Monday to Saturday)



Interested candidates, please fill in: 



Who We're Looking For

We’re seeking an Operations Manager (Amazon) to lead and manage our growing e-commerce operations team. You’ll be responsible for ensuring smooth execution of all workflows related to Amazon Seller Central and preparing for expansion into future marketplaces such as TikTok Shop and Shopify.



Role Responsibilities

Team Management for Seller Central & Future Marketplaces: Lead and coordinate the team across all tasks related to Amazon Seller Central, while building readiness for TikTok Shop and Shopify operations.

Oversee daily operations including listings, inventory, and documentation.

Ensure compliance with platform policies and company standards.

Monitor performance metrics and implement process improvements.

Collaborate cross-functionally to align operations with business goals.

Drive efficiency and stability in workflows.

Maintain high levels of customer satisfaction through operational excellence.



Qualifications

Fluent in English (written and spoken).

Minimum 5 years of proven experience in Amazon Seller Central operations and team management.

Strong knowledge of e-commerce platforms, with exposure to TikTok Shop or Shopify preferred.

Excellent leadership, communication, and organizational skills.

Analytical mindset with the ability to link performance data to operational outcomes.

Self-motivated and capable of working independently in a remote setting.



What We’re Looking For

Demonstrated success in managing e-commerce operations teams.

Ability to streamline complex workflows into efficient execution.

Experience in cross-border e-commerce operations is a plus.

Candidates from Philippines and Vietnam are strongly encouraged to apply.



Company Description

SHOPLALA PTE. LTD. is a Singapore-based Amazon seller specializing in premium gardening products under the brand LaLaGreen. We are expanding across multiple marketplaces and seeking a strategic, detail-oriented Operations Manager to lead our team and drive growth across Amazon and emerging platforms.

title: Advertisement Video Editor
description:
We are a UK-based digital marketing agency working with a range of clients and brands. We are looking for a creative and detail-oriented video editor to join us on a freelance/gig basis to produce short-form video and image ads for our clients' Meta ads using Da Vinci, Adobe Premiere Pro or equivalent professional NLE.



The ideal candidate will have experience editing fast-paced, engaging content for platforms such as Instagram and TikTok, with a strong eye for brand consistency, typography, basic colour grading, and music-driven cuts. You should be comfortable working from a creative brief, taking feedback, and turning around revisions efficiently.



This starts as a small test project with one client, with the successful candidate moving into an ongoing role producing 5+ videos per month. There is strong potential for this to grow as we bring additional clients on board.



You must be comfortable communicating in English and available for occasional short video calls during UK daytime hours.

title: Associate Graphic Designer
description:
SBFM are a Facilities Management business operating in the UK.



We are looking for an Associate Graphic Designer with sharp ideas and an eye for detail. If you love turning concepts into eye-catching visuals and want to be part of a collaborative, fast-moving team, this is your chance. You’ll help shape how our brand shows up across digital and print - bringing creativity, consistency, and a bit of flair to everything you touch.



Duties and Responsibilities

• Design of impactful marketing assets, including:

- Social media visuals for LinkedIn and Instagram.

-
 templates for both internal and external communications.

- Logo creation for new business ventures

• Produce layouts/design solutions for the following:

- Brochures

- Reports

- Support Bids & Tenders

- Cleaning Specifications

- Information Posters

• Design and development of PowerPoint presentations for both internal and external audiences, including visual solutions for flow diagrams, organisational structures, and data visualisation - ensuring content is clear, engaging, and easy to understand.

• Edit and optimise imagery in Photoshop to meet specific requirements and prepare visuals for online use.

• Team up with the marketing, technology, and other teams to create smart, on-brand design solutions.

• Get files prepped and ready to shine - whether they’re headed to print or going online.

• Stay sharp. Spot trends. Bring the best of design and digital into everything you do.

• Basic motion graphics and video editing (e.g. After Effects, Premiere Pro).





Qualifications and Skills

• A strong portfolio demonstrating a solid foundation in design.

• Proficient in Adobe Creative Suite (especially Photoshop, Illustrator, InDesign, XD); familiarity with Figma or similar tools is a plus.

• A good eye for typography, layout, and colour.

• Strong attention to detail and commitment to quality.

• Ability to manage multiple tasks and meet deadlines in a fast-paced environment.

• A relevant degree or equivalent experience in Graphic Design or a related field.

• Experience / knowledge with web / UI design.

• Comfortable using project management tools such as Asana.

title: Operations Coordinator
description:
Are you an organised, detail-driven coordinator who thrives in a fast-paced environment where no two days look the same? If so, we want to hear from you.



The Role:

We are looking for a sharp and proactive Operations Coordinator to join our team at Indigenous Wealth. You will rotate across our three core delivery departments -- Wealth Planning, Property, and Contracts -- providing hands-on coordination support wherever it is needed most. As you rotate, you will report directly to the department head of whichever area you are supporting, giving you exposure to three different leaders and three different disciplines.



This is the operational engine room of the business. You will help manage SMSF setups and super rollovers, support property sourcing and client matching, coordinate settlements and leasing, and keep the detail right across all of it. You will be the person who makes sure nothing falls through the cracks as clients move from sign-up to settlement and beyond.



This role will give you the opportunity to:

* Work across the full client delivery lifecycle, from finance setup to property acquisition to settlement

* Build deep knowledge of property investment operations, SMSF structures, lending, and contracts

* Learn from three different department leaders and develop a well-rounded operational skill set

* Collaborate with a small, high-performance team that values accountability and results

* Contribute to a growing organisation with a clear purpose: supporting Indigenous economic empowerment

* Gain genuine visibility and influence in a business where your work directly impacts client outcomes



About You

You are someone who brings structure, energy, and relentless attention to detail to everything you do. You have:

* A natural bias for action. You chase, follow up, and close the loop without being asked.

* Exceptionally capable and naturally humble. No ego. You let your work speak for itself.

* Strong organisational skills. You can manage multiple workstreams, track deadlines, and keep stakeholders informed.

* A collaborative, can-do attitude and the confidence to work across different teams and adapt to different management styles.



Essential:

* Certificate IV, Diploma, or Bachelor's degree in Business, Finance, Property, or a related field (or equivalent experience)

* 3+ years of experience in a coordination, operations, or administrative role, ideally in property, financial services, or professional services

* Strong written and verbal communication skills with high attention to detail

* Proficiency in Google Workspace and confidence working across CRM and project tracking tools

* Ability to manage multiple tasks, prioritise workloads, and meet deadlines in a fast-paced environment

* Experience coordinating across multiple internal teams or departments



Desirable but not essential:

* Familiarity with property investment processes (purchases, settlements, leasing)

* Exposure to SMSF, superannuation, or lending administration

* Experience with HubSpot, DocuSign, or similar workflow tools

* Understanding of conveyancing or contract management processes

* Experience in a start-up or high-growth business environment



Why This Role?

You will work across every part of the delivery engine and gain exposure most coordinators never get. You will build relationships with three department leaders and develop skills across finance, property, and contracts. The company culture is professional yet fun. We move fast, back each other, and do not hide behind corporate jargon. If you want a role where your work actually matters and you can see the direct impact of what you do, this is it.



How To Apply:

To apply, send your CV and a cover letter (one page) on why this role interests you and what you would bring to a fast-moving, multi-disciplinary operations team. Bonus points if you include a 2-minute Loom video introducing yourself and telling us about a time you kept a complex process on track.

title: TikTok Video Editor for TikTok Shop

We are hiring a video editor for short-form TikTok Shop content.

title: Video Editor (Ads & Content)
description:
We're scaling fast and we need a sharp Content Editor as soon as humanly possible to join our growing international team -- we've generated $7m for clients in the last couple years and just getting started. 



We've spent 100s and 1000s of hours building elite training systems, tools, and more to help level up anyone on our team os they can reach their personal goals and become the kind of person that wins as AI takes over more and more. 



What you'll actually do:



Edit short-form ad creative + design static visuals at speed. Think 10 ad variations per day, 1080×1350 + 1080×1920, hooks that scroll-stop, captions, banners, all of it. We move fast. The right person ships clean cuts in hours, not days.



What we look for:



Real shipped work — paid ad creative, not personal projects

Speed instinct — you think in templates and batches, not one-offs

AI-fluent — you already use Claude / ChatGPT / Runway / Submagic / Topaz daily as your leverage tool

Taste — you can articulate WHY a hook works, not just that it does

Attention to detail — we test it through every step

Bonus (not required): any technical chops — GoHighLevel workflows, Make / Zapier automations, basic HTML, Notion. We use AI as hyper-leverage, the more cross-functional you are the better.

What you'll work with:



Premiere Pro, DaVinci Resolve, After Effects, CapCut, Photoshop, Illustrator (need 2-3 strong)

Modern AI editing stack — Submagic for captions, Runway for B-roll, Whisper for transcripts, Topaz for upscale

Trust but verify is our motto. Our hiring process is built to verify skills:



Step 1: Apply (this post). Subject must include your favorite food — that's our first filter.



Step 2: We send you a short typeform (~12 min). Mostly about your editing, your taste, how fast you ship.



Step 3: It auto-redirects you into a 10-12 minute AI-led interview with our agent Riley. Riley is an AI — it'll tell you upfront. A human reviews everything.



Step 4: If you advance, a paid 3-hour project — about an hour learning our editing process, then 2 hours editing real client work using our templates. We move fast.



Step 5: If that goes well, we onboard you.



If a structured AI-augmented hiring process feels wrong to you — this isn't your role, and that's a fine answer. If it feels right, we want to hear from you.

title: Senior Paid Social Ad Designer (Ecommerce)
description:
About Neon Growth

- We're a performance marketing agency that operates like a DTC rocketship. Our clients are scaling ecommerce brands, and we treat their P&L like our own.

- We move fast, test aggressively, and iterate based on real performance data. Creative isn’t decoration here - it’s one of the biggest levers for growth.

- You’ll be working alongside media buyers and creative strategists managing millions in ad spend, building ads that drive real revenue for brands in fashion, beauty, and lifestyle.





The Role

- We're looking for a Senior Paid Social Ad Designer who knows how to design high-converting static ads for ecommerce brands.

- You’re someone who understands both great design craft and performance marketing. You know how to work inside brand systems, keep things visually sharp, and still produce creative variations quickly for testing.

- This role is perfect for a designer who enjoys fast-paced creative environments, thrives on iteration, and wants their work seen by millions of people every week.





What You'll Do

- Design high-performing static ads for paid social platforms (Meta, TikTok, Reddit, Snap)

- Translate creative briefs into multiple polished ad variations for testing

- Work within brand design systems while keeping creatives fresh, clean, and conversion-focused

- Design product-focused ads that communicate value, offer, and product benefits instantly

- Collaborate closely with media buyers and strategists to iterate on winning creative concepts

- Produce high-volume creative testing packages while maintaining strong design quality

- Continuously refine creatives based on real performance data and testing insights





What Makes You a Fit

3+ years designing paid social ads for ecommerce brands

Strong portfolio featuring high-quality ad creative, not just social posts or brand graphics

Experience designing for fashion, footwear, beauty, or lifestyle brands

Comfortable working within brand design systems and guidelines

Advanced proficiency in Adobe Creative Suite and/or Figma

Strong typography, layout, and visual hierarchy skills

Ability to produce multiple high-quality variations quickly

Strong English communication for async collaboration





Compensation & Benefits

Competitive salary benchmarked to senior creative roles

Fully remote - work from anywhere

Long-term role with growth opportunities as our creative team scales

Work alongside performance marketers managing millions in ad spend per month

High-autonomy environment

title: HR Recruiter
description:
We are looking for a results-driven Recruiter to join our team (remote role, US business hours). The Recruiter will be responsible for sourcing, screening, and submitting qualified candidates for open positions while maintaining accurate records and effective communication throughout the hiring process. The ideal candidate is highly organized, proactive, and experienced in using applicant tracking systems like Bullhorn.



Key Responsibilities



Sourcing Candidates:

- Identifying and attracting potential candidates through various channels like job boards, social media, professional networks, and employee referrals. 

- Developing and implementing sourcing strategies to reach passive candidates. 

- Utilizing applicant tracking systems (ATS) to manage candidates and track recruitment efforts.



Screening and Evaluating Candidates:

- Reviewing resumes and applications to identify qualified candidates. 

- Conducting initial interviews to assess skills, experience, and cultural fit. 

- Using various assessment tools and techniques to evaluate candidates. 



Building Relationships:

- Maintaining strong relationships with hiring managers and candidates. 

- Providing excellent candidate experience throughout the recruitment process. 

- Promoting the company's employer brand and attracting top talent. 



Other Responsibilities:

- Staying up-to-date on recruitment trends and best practices. 

- Participating in job fairs and other recruitment events. 

- Other duties as required. 



Qualifications & Skills

- Strong written and spoken English is required 

- Proven experience as a Recruiter or in a similar role.

- Strong organizational and time management skills.

- Excellent communication and interpersonal skills.

- Proficiency with applicant tracking systems, particularly Bullhorn.

- Ability to manage multiple roles and priorities simultaneously.

- Experience using job boards, LinkedIn, and other recruiting tools.

- Strong attention to detail and ability to maintain accurate records.



If you are a motivated recruiter who thrives in a fast-paced environment, we encourage you to apply.

title: US Payroll Tax Specialist
description:
US Payroll Tax Specialist (Remote – Eastern Time Hours)

 

Location: Remote

Hours: Must be available Monday–Friday, 8:30 am - 5:00 pm EST

Job Type: Full-Time

Department: Payroll & Compliance

Reports To: Director of Finance

 

About the Role

We are seeking an experienced and detail-oriented Payroll Tax Specialist to join our growing team. In this role, you will play a critical part in ensuring timely and accurate payroll tax compliance across multiple states and jurisdictions. You will regularly interface with the IRS, state Departments of Revenue (DORs), and Departments of Labor (DOLs) to conduct tax research, respond to notices, and remit tax payments multiple times per week.

 

If you're highly organized, thrive under pressure, and never miss a deadline, this is the perfect opportunity for you.

 

Key Responsibilities

Ensure accurate and timely remittance of payroll tax payments (federal, state, and local) multiple times per week.

Interface directly with the IRS, state DoRs, and DoLs to resolve tax issues, research changes in tax laws, and respond to 

inquiries or audits.

Perform regular reconciliations of payroll tax liabilities and filings.

Maintain accurate records of all tax payments and communications for audit and compliance purposes.

Track and manage tax notices, resolve discrepancies, and ensure full compliance with applicable laws and filing deadlines.

Collaborate with payroll and finance teams to maintain accuracy in payroll processing and tax calculations.

Use tools such as Excel and Asana to manage tasks and track progress.

Support payroll-related projects and audits as needed.

 

Required Qualifications

Minimum of 2 years' experience in US payroll tax operations, with demonstrated experience interacting with tax agencies.

Strong knowledge of US federal and state payroll tax regulations.

High proficiency in Excel (formulas, pivot tables, VLOOKUP, etc.).

 

Experience with payroll software systems (e.g., ADP, Paychex, Paylocity, etc.).

Strong written and verbal communication skills—you’ll regularly represent the company with agencies.

Extreme attention to detail—accuracy is critical, and deadlines cannot be missed.

Self-motivated and organized, with the ability to manage priorities in a remote setting.

 

Qualifications

Experience using Asana or other project/task management tools.

Multi-state payroll tax experience.

Familiarity with filing amended returns or prior period corrections.

 

This is a remote position, but you must be available to work Eastern Time hours from 11:00 AM to 7:00 PM, Monday through Friday.

 

Occasional overtime may be required during peak periods or deadlines.

title: Project Accountant

 invoices to clients using templates

title: Operations & Admin Assistant
description:
Important Note Before Applying



This role provides administrative and tracking support to our internal operations team. You

will assist with structured, repeatable processes that keep our reporting, notes, and action items

accurate and up to date.

This role does not involve decision-making, strategy, or people management. It requires strong

attention to detail, comfort with routine tasks, and reliable follow-through using clear templates

and instructions.



JOB DESCRIPTION



Snoice is a community-driven dessert and catering brand based in San Diego. Our operations

team manages hiring, scheduling, performance reviews, events, and internal systems.

We are hiring an Operations & Admin Assistant to support our operations leaders by taking

ownership of tracking, reporting, documentation, and follow-through tasks that currently

take up significant admin time. This role helps ensure our systems stay clean so leaders can

focus on coaching, decisions, and execution.

This is a support and coordination role, not a leadership role.



KEY RESPONSIBILITIES



Tracking & Reporting Support

? Update weekly trackers for reviews, loyalty, and internal metrics

? Pull date-range reports and enter results into templates

? Format and post flash reports or summaries as instructed

? Maintain consistency and accuracy across reports



Meeting Notes & Action Item Admin

? Pull meeting summaries from Fathom

? Format and share summaries in the appropriate documents or channels

? Review auto-created Trello action items and:

? Assign owners when clearly stated

? Add due dates if already discussed

? Move cards to the correct lists

? Flag items that need clarification before assignment



Shift Notes & Ops Documentation

? Collect shift notes from Discord

? Log notes into Sheets or Trello using templates

? Tag issues related to equipment, inventory, or store operations

? Flag items that require ops lead review



Admin Support & Board Updates

? Keep Trello boards clean and up to date

? Update card statuses based on instructions

? Ensure required fields are completed

? Log outcomes of meetings, check-ins, or decisions once finalized



Weekly Support

? Send one short weekly recap outlining:

? Work completed

? Items needing clarification

? Any blockers or missing information



TOOLS & COLLABORATION

? Google Sheets & Google Drive

? Trello

? Fathom (viewing summaries only)

? Discord (for task-related communication)



REQUIRED QUALIFICATIONS (NON-NEGOTIABLE)

? Strong attention to detail and organization

? Experience with admin work, data entry, or reporting

? Comfortable working with Google Sheets and Trello

? Clear, professional written English

? Ability to follow templates and instructions closely

? Reliable availability for 5–10 consistent hours per week



WHAT SUCCESS LOOKS LIKE

? Trackers and reports are consistently up to date

? Action items are clearly assigned and easy to follow

? Shift notes and ops issues are logged and organized

? Ops leaders spend less time on admin and follow-ups

Accuracy, consistency, and reliability matter more than speed.



COMMITMENT & EXPECTATIONS

? Long-term role with consistent weekly engagement

? Support-focused position assisting operations leadership

? Clear processes and expectations provided

? Reliability and follow-through are essential



HOW TO APPLY

Please include:

? A brief summary of your experience with admin, data entry, tracking, or reporting

? Your availability within the 20 hrs/week range

? Confirmation that you are comfortable working from defined processes at $4/hour

Applications that demonstrate attention to detail, reliability, and clarity will be prioritized.

title: Creative Strategist (Breakthrough Advertising Focus) - $2,000+ Uncapped Potentional
description:

If you don’t understand market sophistication, awareness levels, and mechanism-based selling — this is not for you.



We are a performance-driven DTC supplement brand.

We do not “make content.” We engineer ads that convert.



We’re looking for someone who:

Understands why people buy, not just what to say

If you’ve read and actively apply principles from Breakthrough Advertising, keep reading.



The Role

Research ? Angles ? Scripts ? Briefs ? Editors ? Iteration ? Performance



You are responsible for winning ads. Not effort. Not volume. Wins.

mber (not freelance)

title: Creative Strategist (Performance Ads) – E-commerce/Dropshipping
description:
About Us



We’re a fast-growing e-commerce group operating multiple dropshipping and branded e-commerce funnels.

We scale aggressively through paid ads, high-volume creative testing, and data-driven decision making.



Our team consists of media buyers, funnel builders, video editors, and customer support.

We are now hiring a Creative Strategist to own and systemize everything related to ad creatives.



The Role

As a Creative Strategist, you own the strategy behind all paid ad creatives.

You do not edit videos or launch ads.



Your job is to d
:

- Do creative research.

- What creatives get made.

- Which angles get tested.

- Why something wins or loses.

- How winners are iterated and scaled.



You will work closely with the CEO, media buyers, and video editors to lower CPA and unlock scale.

- What You’ll Do

- Develop creative angles and concepts for Meta ads across multiple funnels.

- Translate ad performance data into actionable creative insights.

- Write clear, detailed creative briefs for video editors.

- Define weekly creative testing priorities and roadmaps.

- Analyze hooks, retention, watch time, scroll stop, and fatigue.

- D
 when to iterate, kill, or scale creatives.

- Ensure strong alignment between ads, landing pages, and funnels.

- Collaborate with media buyers to improve CPA, stability, and scalability.

- Maintain structured creative documentation and testing learnings.



What You Bring

- Minimum IQ of 120

- Fluent in English (written and spoken)

- 2+ years experience with performance creatives for E-commerce Meta ads.

- Strong direct response mindset. You care about results, not just aesthetics.

- Deep understanding of hooks, angles, retention, and creative testing.

- Ability to read ad data and turn it into clear creative direction.

- Experience briefing and managing video editors or creators.

- High attention to detail and structured way of thinking.

- Ownership mentality. You spot problems early and act without hand-holding.

- Comfortable working with Google Sheets and performance reports.

Note on assessments. Short skills or aptitude tasks may be part of our selection process.



How We Work (and What You’ll Get)

- Part-time with flexible hours. Clear path to full-time for top performers.

- Compensation: $5–$8/hour depending on experience + performance bonuses.

- Approved expense reimbursement if applicable.

- Merit-based raises as your impact grows.

- Direct collaboration with the CEO and media buyers.

- Access to proven funnels, ad accounts, SOPs, and real ad spend.

- Long-term growth opportunities into Head of Creative or broader strategy roles.



How to Apply

- Put your favorite movie or series in the subject line or title. This helps us spot detail-oriented applicants.



Please include:

- Your CV or Resume.

- Examples of ad creatives or brands you worked on. Screenshots or Looms are fine.

- A short paragraph explaining how you approach creative testing and iteration.

- Your availability. Hours per week.

- Your IQ in your account. You can do this for free on OnlineJobs.



No AI-generated applications. We read carefully and can tell.

title: Executive Assistant to the CEO (CPA Preferred)
description:
About The Company

The Company is a family owned, operated and Texas-based automotive services company. This role will report to the CEO/Owner.



Position Overview

We are seeking a highly skilled Executive Assistant to the CEO to provide high-level executive and financial support to our leadership team. This role combines the strategic oversight of a finance professional with the discretion and organizational excellence of an executive assistant. Essentially, the candidate should be a well-rounded business professional that values innovation. 



The ideal candidate will be a trusted advisor to the CEO, leveraging strong financial acumen and business judgment to assist in decision-making, reporting, and project execution. This is an excellent opportunity for a professional who thrives in a dynamic, fast-paced environment and enjoys being at the intersection of operations, finance, and executive leadership.





Key Responsibilities

Executive & Strategic Support:  Proactively manage and optimize complex schedules, ensuring the CEO is prepared for meetings, travel and critical business decisions. Provide high-level administrative and analytical support, ensuring efficiency across multiple store locations. Collaborate with the CEO and senior leadership on strategic initiatives, leveraging data-driven insights. Work closely with finance and accounting teams to track financial performance, budgets, cash flow and financial forecasts.  Assist in preparing financial reports, executive summaries, and operational analyses. Create or maintain a well organized and accessible system for storing documents.



Project & Business Operations Support:  Own and manage a variety of special projects, ensuring on-time delivery and successful execution. Analyze key business metrics and market trends to provide insights that inform strategic decisions. Track deliverables, deadlines, and performance indicators to ensure alignment across teams. Serve as a liaison between the CEO and internal/external stakeholders, ensuring effective communication.



Relationship & Stakeholder Communications:  Build strong relationships with key partners, executives, and stakeholders, ensuring seamless collaboration. Handle sensitive financial and strategic information with the highest level of confidentiality and integrity. Represent the CEO professionally, facilitating effective communication across teams.



Travel & Event Coordination:  Manage complex travel arrangements, ensuring seamless execution for business trips and engagements. Oversee logistics for board meetings, investor presentations, and executive events.



Technology & Productivity Optimization:  Leverage AI tools, automation platforms, and data-driven systems to improve efficiency. Identify and integrate cutting-edge software solutions to streamline workflows. Utilize Excel, financial modeling tools, and business intelligence platforms to support decision-making.



Other High-Level Support: Could potentially include HR support as needed, such as benefits and HR administration. 







Key Performance Objectives



First 2 Months:

Develop a strong understanding of company operations, financial systems, and executive priorities.

Establish trust and communication flow with leadership and key stakeholders.



First 4 Months:

Lead financial reporting support for leadership reviews and begin managing special projects.

Strengthen knowledge of business operations and regulatory requirements.



First 6 Months:

Become a key strategic resource for the CEO, providing both operational and financial insight that supports company growth.





Qualifications





Required:



Bachelor’s degree in Accounting, Finance, or related field

Minimum 3 years of accounting experience, including full-cycle accounting

Minimum 6 years of professional working experience 

Proven experience supporting C-suite or upper-level executives, especially Entrepreneur-led organizations

U.S. Company experience with mid-sized or large multi-location companies

Exceptional communication and interpersonal skills

Highly organized, proactive, and able to manage multiple priorities with discretion

Advanced proficiency in Microsoft Excel and Word

Comfortable working independently in a fast-paced, evolving environment, with the ability to handle ambiguity with professionalism and grace

Strong business judgment, project management and problem-solving skills



Preferred:

Background in automotive services, retail services or real estate accounting

Public accounting experience or exposure to executive-level reporting

Prior experience managing sensitive or confidential projects



Work Environment

Full-time, remote, independent contractor status

Align to the organization’s Central time zone hours (8 AM - 5 PM CST), Monday through Friday

Candidate must agree to hold this role exclusively, with no other projects or clients, and that no sub-contracting of work will occur.

Candidate must own a personal laptop and at least one additional monitor that will be your exclusive work laptop (not used or shared by others).

Have a backup device in case of a laptop or equipment failure.

A backup internet connection (such as a secondary ISP or mobile hotspot) must be available in case of an outage to ensure work continuity.





Compensation & Benefits:

Competitive independent contractor pay commensurate with experience

Vacation Pay

US Holiday pay



To Apply

Please submit your resume, cover letter, and three professional references.

Include "Executive Assistant to CEO - [Your Name]" in the subject line of your application.

We encourage early applications as interviews will be conducted on a rolling basis.

title: Senior Creative Strategist — Direct-Response Dropshipping (Meta Ads)
description:
WHO WE ARE

We run a seven-figure direct-response dropshipping business across Europe and the UK. We're not a brand. We're a product-and-cashflow machine — we find winning products, build funnels, and scale them hard on Meta.

We don't mass-test. We test with purpose. Every product, every angle, every creative is chosen for a reason and built to a standard that gives it a real chance to win. Sloppy work doesn't survive here.

THE ROLE

We already have a junior Creative Strategist in place. We're now hiring a second, senior Creative Strategist to run their own products and their own creative team in parallel.

You won't share workload with the junior. You'll own a separate set of products end to end — concept, creative system, team, output, performance. Two strategists, two pods, more throughput, less bottleneck on any single person (including the founder).

You're not inheriting a polished setup. You'll build the system for your side of the business — briefs, feedback loop, hiring, testing pipeline, standards. We want someone experienced enough to do this independently.

This isn't a brand role. But we're not a churn-and-burn shop either. We test with intention — strong products, strong angles, strong execution. Your job is to make that machine run cleanly on your products.

WHAT YOU WILL DO



Own your product pod end to end. Your own products, your own creative pipeline, your own team. The junior runs theirs. You run yours.

Build the creative system for your side. Research process, brief templates, feedback loop, performance review cadence. Whatever's missing, you build it.

Hire and manage your own creative team. Video editors, designers, whoever you need. We expect you to know who's good and who's not.

Run a purposeful testing pipeline. Each test has a clear hypothesis. We learn something every time.

Write scripts and copy that convert. You set the standard by example.

Mine angles and hooks. Competitor libraries, Reddit, reviews, comments. Real customer language goes into briefs.

Use Claude and AI tools as core infrastructure — for research, scripts, briefs, iteration. Not as a shortcut.

Handle basic Meta media buying — enough to read the data, know what's scaling, and make decisions without waiting.



OUR VALUES

Cash Flow Over Vanity. We care about ads that print. Quality matters because sloppy work loses money, not because we're chasing prestige.

Geniuses and Owners. We work with builders who see a problem and fix it. Not people waiting to be told what to do.

Iterations over Hours. We measure success by how well you test, learn, and improve. Ship it. Learn. Repeat.

Truth over Ego. No politics. No BS. Just data and results.

WHO YOU ARE



You have real experience running creative for direct-response e-commerce or dropshipping. We're hiring someone who's already done this, not someone hoping to learn on our budget.

You understand direct-response dropshipping — multiple offers, intentional testing, aggressive scaling on winners. Not a Nike-style brand playbook.

You're an operator first, creative second. You build systems and teams, not just ads.

You can run your own pod independently. No hand-holding, no task assignment. You see what's missing and build it.

You hold a high quality bar. You know the difference between "tested with intent" and "spray and pray."

You know how to spot and manage creative talent. Bonus if you've already built a small creative team before.

You understand DR fundamentals — awareness levels, hooks, angles, customer psychology. (Cialdini, Schwartz, Bencivenga is a plus.)

You're fluent with Claude and AI tools as part of your daily workflow — not "I've tried ChatGPT."

You know the metrics: CTR, CPA, CVR, ROAS, hook rate, hold rate.

You close loops without being chased.



THIS ROLE IS NOT FOR YOU IF



You want to be told what to do.

You think the answer to bad performance is "test more stuff faster."

You've never managed creative talent or built a workflow from scratch.

You only want to write scripts and let someone else handle the rest.

You think AI can do the thinking for you.

You're not willing to touch ad accounts or basic media buying.



COMPENSATION

Base salary is paid monthly in USD.

On top of that, a performance bonus tied to the ads you create. For every creative that hits $3,500 in ad spend at a strong ROAS, you earn $100. No cap.

10 winning creatives in a month is $1,000 on top of base. That's a conservative month. Strong performers earn significantly more.

For consistent performers, we move to a better structure — a direct percentage of profit on the ads you create. Upside grows with you.

HOW TO APPLY

Show us proof, not a portfolio.



2 to 3 ads you personally created. Video or static. The actual creative, not a description.

Your brief or script for each ad. No brief = not considered.

A performance screenshot for each ad. Spend, ROAS, CTR — whatever you have. No screenshot = not considered.

2 to 3 sentences per ad explaining the angle and why you chose it.

Attention check: add the words "War Strawberry" at the top of your application. Applications without it will not be reviewed.



Real, thoughtful applications only. If your application was clearly written by AI, it will not be considered. If your English is not perfect but your work is genuine, that's fine. If you read this far, you're already ahead of 90% of the competition.

title: Virtual Assistant (Eviction Specialist) – Eviction Command
description:
Company: Eviction Command

Industry: Legal Document Processing / Eviction Support Services

Location: Remote

Job Type: Full-Time / Part-Time (Flexible)



About Us:

Eviction Command is a fast-growing document processing company specializing in eviction support services across the United States. We assist landlords, property managers, and tenants by providing accurate, timely, and compliant documentation throughout the eviction process.



Position Overview:

We are seeking a detail-oriented and reliable Virtual Assistant with hands-on experience in U.S. eviction processes. The ideal candidate understands eviction workflows, legal documentation, and client communication, with a strong focus on client retention and service quality.



Key Responsibilities:

Process and prepare eviction-related documents (notices, affidavits, filings, etc.)

Communicate with clients to gather necessary information and provide updates

Ensure accuracy and compliance with state-specific eviction laws

Manage case timelines and follow-ups

Maintain organized digital records and documentation

Assist in onboarding new clients and ensuring a smooth service experience

Focus on client retention by delivering consistent, high-quality support

Handle inbound and outbound communication 
, chat, occasional calls)



Requirements:

Proven experience with U.S. eviction processes (required)

Familiarity with legal documentation and court procedures

Strong English communication skills (written and verbal)

High attention to detail and organizational skills

Ability to work independently and meet deadlines

Experience with CRM systems and document management tools is a plus

Reliable internet connection and work setup



How to Apply:

Please submit the following to 

A link to your resume

A short voice recording introducing yourself and your experience with eviction cases



Why Join Eviction Command?

Remote, flexible work environment

Opportunity to grow with a specialized and in-demand service company

Supportive team and structured workflows

Competitive compensation based on experience



We’re looking for someone who understands the urgency and sensitivity of eviction cases and can deliver professional, client-focused service every step of the way.

Apply today and be part of a team that makes a real impact in the eviction process.

title: Legal Assistant

Generate and send monthly invoices to all clients and follow up on financial arrangements

Case file and document organization

o  Open, maintain, and organize client case files and ensure files are properly organized, and documents are up to date.

o  Review court website and update client files accordingly.

o  Review and process mail that is scanned and sent to the firm via
. (Review, summarize, create task lists, calendar, and file in the appropriate client matter.

Communication

o  Translate legal documents,
s, letters, meeting summaries, and other correspondence accurately and efficiently.



Research and follow-up

o  Track deadlines, pending actions, and follow up on required filings or tasks.



Requirements

o  Minimum of 1–2 years of experience as an executive assistant, legal assistant, or in a similar support role in US law firm

o  Clio Experience is preferred but not required.

Remote position

Our Core Values

Excellence & Meticulousness

title: Litigation Support Assistant (U.S. Personal Injury Law Firm – Growth to Full-Time)
description:
About Us

We are a U.S.-based personal injury law firm with a strong litigation focus. Our team handles serious cases and is building a high-performance litigation department. We value reliability, organization, and proactive communication.



We are looking for a long-term tea
mber who can start part-time and grow into a full-time role with expanded responsibilities.



Role Overview

You will support our litigation team with scheduling, document organization, and case management tasks. This is a detail-heavy role that requires strong English communication skills and excellent organizational habits.



Key Responsibilities



Manage
 communications related to deposition scheduling and rescheduling

-Coordinate with clients, attorneys, and opposing counsel

-Ensure all parties are informed and aligned

Client coordination

-Communicate clearly and professionally with clients regarding scheduling

Document organization in Filevine (FV)

-Organize incoming discovery and case documents into proper folders

-Maintain clean, consistent file structures

Calendaring and deadline tracking in Filevine

-Enter and track discovery deadlines in the discovery tab

-Calendar Notices of Deposition (NODs), both incoming and outgoing

-Ensure accuracy and timeliness of all entries



Requirements



-Excellent written and spoken English

-Strong attention to detail (this is critical)

-Highly organized and process-driven

-Experience with legal work or U.S. law firms is a strong plus

-Experience with Filevine or similar case management software is a plus

-Ability to manage multiple tasks and deadlines



Preferred Traits



-Proactive (doesn’t wait to be told what to do)

-Reliable and consistent

-Comfortable with repetitive but detail-sensitive tasks

-Interested in growing into a larger role over time



Growth Opportunity



This role is designed to grow. As you prove reliability and skill, responsibilities and hours will increase, with the opportunity to move into a full-time position and take on more advanced litigation support tasks.



How to Apply



Please include:



A brief VIDEO introduction about yourself

Your relevant experience (especially legal or administrative)

A short paragraph explaining how you stay organized when handling multiple deadlines

Your internet speed and computer setup

title: Remote Recruiting Assistan
description:
Remote Recruiting Assistant — Climate Experts Air, Plumbing & Electric (USA)

Climate Experts Air, Plumbing & Electric is a fast growing residential home services company based in Melbourne, Florida. We specialize in HVAC, Plumbing, and Electrical and we are scaling quickly. We hire frequently and we need a sharp, reliable recruiting assistant to help us find, contact, and screen great candidates.

We are looking for someone who is confident on the phone, professional in writing, and able to follow a process while also using good judgment when talking to real people. This is not a passive data entry role. You will be the first voice many candidates hear from Climate Experts Air, Plumbing & Electric so professionalism and clear English communication are essential.

If you are organized, a strong English communicator, and enjoy working in a fast paced environment where your work directly impacts company growth — this could be a great fit.

This role is primarily focused on candidate outreach and phone screening (about 60% of the workload) with scheduling, platform management, and admin support making up the remaining 40%.



???? Primary Responsibilities

???? Candidate Outreach and Phone Screening (60%)



Message candidates daily on Indeed, via text, and via
 using provided scripts and templates

Conduct initial phone screening interviews using a provided script and question guide

Use good judgment to assess candidate responses and flag strong or weak fits for our team

Follow up with candidates who have not completed their video interview on Hireflix

Maintain a professional, warm, and confident tone on every interaction



???? Scheduling and Coordination (25%)



Schedule phone interviews and manage candidate calendars

Schedule in person interviews for our Staffing Operations Manager at Climate Experts Air, Plumbing & Electric

Track all candidate activity and update the team daily on pipeline status

Send reminders and follow ups to keep candidates moving through the process



????? Platform and Admin Support (15%)



Manage our Hireflix video interview platform — send links, track completions, and follow up

Help edit and update job postings on Indeed as directed

Maintain organized candidate tracking in Google Sheets or similar

Communicate daily with our team via Slack





? Requirements



Excellent spoken and written English — non-negotiable as you will be speaking directly with candidates in the United States by phone on behalf of Climate Experts Air, Plumbing & Electric

Confident, clear, and professional phone presence

Ability to follow a script while thinking independently and reading the conversation

Strong attention to detail and ability to manage multiple candidates at once

Reliable internet connection and a quiet professional environment for phone calls

Available to work Wednesday through Sunday during US Eastern Time business hours

Organized, responsive, and able to meet daily deadlines

Self motivated and able to work independently with minimal supervision



???? Nice to Have (Not Required)



Experience in recruiting, HR, customer service, or sales

Familiarity with Indeed Employer tools

Experience working with US based employers





???? Work Details

Company: Climate Experts Air, Plumbing & Electric

Location: Remote — Philippines preferred

Schedule: Wednesday through Sunday

Hours: 9:00 AM to 5:00 PM Eastern Time with a 1 hour unpaid lunch break — 7 paid hours per day, 35 hours per week

Pay: $5.71 USD per hour — $800 USD per month

Long term opportunity with room to grow as we expand our recruiting operation



???? How to Apply

To be considered please include:



The word "HIRED" in your subject line

A short introduction about yourself and your background

Confirmation that you are available Wednesday through Sunday 9:00 AM to 5:00 PM Eastern Time



This is a long term role for the right person. Climate Experts Air, Plumbing & Electric values reliability, professionalism, and people who take pride in representing a company well. If you are confident on the phone, organized, and excited about helping a fast growing US company build a great team — we would love to hear from you.

manage priorities and eco-system partners to meet established milestones and achieve sales growth objectives. A

title: Part-time Online Math Tutor (Work From Home!)
description:
Brighterly is a dynamic EdTech startup on a mission to transform how children learn and love math. We provide a world-class after-school math excellence program for students from kindergarten to grade 8 in the USA.



We believe math can shape a child’s future — giving them the confidence, skills, and curiosity to excel in school and beyond. Our lessons are not just about solving problems; they’re about opening doors to a bright tomorrow.



*! Apply via this link - only applicants who apply via the link will be considered:


 



As Part Of Our Team, You Will:

- Deliver fun, engaging, and interactive 1-on-1 math lessons using our ready-made scripts and materials.

- Share valuable feedback with our office team to continually improve lessons.

- Provide detailed reports on your students’ progress.

- Keep students motivated and engaged in every session.

- Bring your creativity to the table to enhance learning experiences.



What You’ll Love About Working With Us:

- Flexible schedule — work from home and choose hours that suit you.

- Comprehensive training to prepare you for success.

- All lesson materials provided — focus on teaching, not creating content.

- Supportive environment with ongoing guidance from experienced mentors.

- Fun, youthful, and friendly team culture.

- Opportunities to share and implement your ideas.

- Professional growth — regular training to sharpen your skills.



What We’re Looking For:

- Advanced English (C1+) with a clear, neutral accent.

- Passion for working with young children.

- Minimum 6 months’ experience teaching young learners.

- High school-level math proficiency (or higher) with a diploma.

- Strong communication and problem-solving skills.

- Ability to work weekends and/or weekday afternoons and evenings.

- Self-employed status.

- Patience, punctuality, and a positive attitude.



If you’re passionate about making math exciting and empowering for children, we’d love to have you on board!

title: Part-Time Real Estate Operations & Executive Assistant

Please answer the following questions in your reply:



2. Are you a CPA?

3.  How many years of experience do you have as an Accountant? Do you have a US experience? How many years?

4. Do you have experience with QuickBooks? If yes, how long?

7 How many years of professional accounting experience do you have (excluding any training or coursework)?

Thank you!

title: Female Schedule Coordinator/Call Intaker
description:
JOB SUMMARY:

We are looking for a dependable and detail-oriented Homecare Scheduler/call Intaker to manage caregiver and client schedules, handling all inbound calls, serving as a knowledgeable first point of contact for prospective clients and families for our US-based home care operations. This role plays a key part in ensuring accurate scheduling, timely communication, and high-quality service delivery while maintaining confidentiality and compliance.





KEY RESPONSIBILITIES

* Create, manage, and update schedules for caregivers/home health aides (HHA)

* Coordinate client schedules based on care plans and staff availability

* Communicate daily schedule changes with caregivers, clients, and healthcare personnel

* Maintain accurate staff and client records in scheduling and database systems

* Track and update compliance requirements (e.g., TB, CQA, admissions, discharges)

* Prepare and maintain scheduling reports and statistics

* Ensure scheduling systems are accurate and up to date

* Escalate scheduling conflicts to the Team Manager

* Build professional relationships with clients to ensure excellent service delivery

* Perform general administrative and office support tasks as needed

* Answer, screen, and direct all incoming calls from both locations in a professional and timely manner

* Accurately transfer calls to the appropriate location, department, or staff member

* Serve as the first point of contact for new client inquiries — explaining services, pricing, and care options 

* Document all call activity, client inquiries, and scheduling changes in the agency's software system

* Communicate clearly with caregivers, clients, family members, and office staff across both locations

* Support Care Coordinators by relaying intake information and pre-qualifying prospective client calls

* Maintain confidentiality and comply with HIPAA guidelines at all times



WORK SCHEDULE/SHIFT AVAILABILITY:

Must be open to potential on-call shifts as operational needs evolve



QUALIFICATIONS (Preferred):

High school diploma or GED required

Nursing experience is  highly preferred

Minimum 1–2 years of experience in home care, healthcare, or a medical office setting

Prior scheduling or call center experience strongly preferred

Ability to identify clinical concerns when speaking with clients or caregivers and escalate appropriately

Strong understanding of care levels, service types, and insurance/private pay basics

Strong phone etiquette and interpersonal communication skills

Ability to multitask and work under pressure in a fast-paced environment

Strong organizational, time-management, and communication skills

High attention to detail and accuracy

Ability to manage frequent schedule changes

Familiarity with healthcare databases and compliance requirements

WellSky CRM Experience is a plus

Knowledge of HIPAA and patient privacy standards





APPLICATION INSTRUCTIONS (Important):

Attach your updated resume

Subject line must be formatted exactly as: Last Name, First Name – Homecare Scheduler

Only 10 application points will be accepted

Applications that do not follow these instructions will be disregarded

title: Email Marketing & Lifecycle Manager
description:
We’re looking for an
 Marketing & Lifecycle Manager to own and execute retention across
 and SMS. This is a hands-on role focused on driving revenue through lifecycle marketing—optimizing flows, launching campaigns, and continuously improving performance.

You’ll work directly with existing systems, data, and creative assets to identify opportunities and implement changes that increase retention and customer lifetime value (LTV). This role is ideal for someone who combines strategic thinking with strong execution and a bias toward measurable results.

Responsibilities



Own and optimize all lifecycle flows (welcome, abandoned cart, post-purchase, win-back, etc.)

Build and execute campaign calendars aligned with promotions and product launches

Continuously test and improve flows and campaigns to drive revenue

Analyze performance across
 and SMS (open rates, CTR, conversion, revenue contribution)

Identify gaps and opportunities across the lifecycle funnel

Run A/B tests on subject lines, creative, offers, and messaging

Iterate quickly based on data and performance insights

Write and refine high-converting
 and SMS copy aligned with brand voice

Collaborate on messaging that increases engagement and sales

Ensure consistency across all lifecycle touchpoints

Audit Klaviyo and SMS platforms (e.g., Postscript) and implement improvements

Leverage existing flows, segments, and creative assets to improve performance

Execute efficiently using available creative, data, and campaign resources

Requirements

Core Experience



Proven experience in
 and SMS lifecycle marketing (eCommerce required, DTC preferred)

Hands-on experience with:

Klaviyo (required)

Postscript or similar SMS platform (required)

Shopify or similar eCommerce platform (required)



Strong understanding of retention, LTV, and lifecycle optimization

Experience building and optimizing:

Welcome flows

Abandoned cart flows

Post-purchase flows

Win-back campaigns



Strong analytical mindset with a data-driven approach to decision-making

Ability to both strategize and execute (not just manage)

Experience working within DTC / eCommerce environments

Basic design sense or experience guiding creative direction

Comfortable working within Shopify-based ecosystems

Preferred



Experience working with distributed or remote teams

Strong data-driven decision-making skills

Experience leveraging creative assets and segmentation to improve performance

Ability to independently drive lifecycle marketing initiatives end-to-end

title: Takeover & Billing Operations Specialist (Full-Time | Remote)
description:
Company: Waste Solution Services

Location: Remote (Philippines)

Schedule: US Hours (Night Shift PH)

Employment Type: Full-Time

________________________________________

About the Role

Waste Solution Services is seeking a detail-oriented and dependable Operations Specialist to manage account takeovers and billing setup for client properties.

In this role, you will be responsible for ensuring that each property is accurately verified, properly linked to vendor accounts, and fully prepared for billing. Success in this position requires strong attention to detail, persistence in follow-ups, and confidence when communicating with vendors.

________________________________________

Key Responsibilities

•	Review properties marked as “Ready to Bill” 

•	Verify contract details and ensure service addresses match 

•	Locate and link vendor accounts to each property 

•	Contact vendors to: 

o	Confirm account status 

o	Request account updates 

o	Add, remove, or update contacts 

•	Update billing information and enable paperless billing 

•	Handle inactive, missing, or newly created accounts 

•	Perform follow-ups (weekly and monthly) to confirm updates 

•	Accurately document all actions in Airtable 

________________________________________

Qualifications

•	Experience in administrative support, billing, or account management 

•	Comfortable making outbound calls to US-based vendors 

•	Strong attention to detail and accuracy 

•	Excellent written and verbal English communication skills 

•	Highly organized with the ability to manage multiple tasks 

•	Able to follow structured processes and SOPs 

________________________________________

Preferred (Not Required)

•	Experience working with waste management vendors 

•	Familiarity with Airtable or similar CRM systems 

•	Background in billing operations or back-office support 

________________________________________

Role Expectations

•	Some vendors follow strict verification processes—accuracy is critical 

•	Certain issues may require multiple follow-ups or repeat calls 

•	This role prioritizes accuracy and completeness over speed 

________________________________________

Compensation & Benefits

•	Competitive salary based on experience 

•	Paid training provided 

•	Long-term, stable position 

________________________________________

Application Instructions (Important)

To be considered, please submit:

1.	A brief introduction (2–3 sentences) 

2.	A summary of your relevant experience 

3.	Your answer to this question:

“If a vendor refuses to update an account because you are not listed, how would you handle the situation?” 

4.	Include the word “TAKEOVER” in your subject line 

Applications that do not follow these instructions may not be reviewed.

________________________________________

Why Join Waste Solution Services

•	Structured processes and clear expectations 

•	Supportive and collaborative team environment 

•	Opportunity for long-term growth within operations
